jobs.title: Solutions Partner Manager (100% remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de partenaires de solutions (100 % à distance)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, the Solutions Partner Manager is responsible for managing, enabling, and governing a network of consulting firms, system integrators, and delivery partners who implement Tether products (WDK, QVAC, and MOS). The role ensures partners deliver high-quality projects, align with Tether’s interests, meet certification standards, and drive customer satisfaction. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 1. Partner Relationship & Capability Management 
 
• Act as the primary relationship owner for all Solutions Partners. 

• Coordinate the assessment of partner capabilities, delivery maturity, and resources. 

• Ensure partners maintain sufficient certified consultants and technical capacity. 

• Conduct regular capability reviews and develop partner improvement plans as needed. 

 2. Partner Onboarding & Certification 
 
• Lead the onboarding of new implementation partners, including due diligence and contract execution. 

• Coordinate partner training and certification programs 

• Ensure adherence to implementation playbooks, best practices, and delivery frameworks. 

 3. Delivery Governance 
 
• Oversee partner-led implementations to ensure alignment with methodology, quality standards, and timelines. 

• Participate in project kick-offs, milestone reviews, and governance checkpoints. 

• Validate partner deliverables (e.g., configurations, integration setups, testing documentation). 

• Manage escalations and coordinate resolutions with internal Technical, Support, and Product teams. 

 4. Project Portfolio Monitoring 
 
• Maintain visibility over the entire portfolio of partner-led projects. 

• Identify and flag cross-sell opportunities with other Tether products or with services offered by Tether portfolio companies, where relevant. 

• Track delivery risks, resourcing gaps, and escalations across the partner ecosystem. 

• Ensure Partners receive Technical support as required during their implementations 

 5. Quality Assurance & Performance Management 
 
• Monitor KPIs such as project success rate, CSAT, and partner delivery quality. 

• Perform quarterly partner performance reviews. 

• Define corrective action plans or temporary delivery restrictions when required. 

• Manage re-certification cycles and partner tiering. 

 7. Cross-Functional Coordination 
 
• Work closely with Customer Success, Delivery, Support, Product, and Training teams. 

• Ensure smooth transitions between sales-to-delivery and delivery-to-support phases. 

• Provide feedback from partner projects to internal teams to improve product quality and implementation processes. 

 8. Partner Lifecycle Management 
 
• Manage partner renewal, re-certification, and (if necessary) offboarding. 

• Maintain partner records, capability matrices, and project performance logs. 

 

 
 
• 4–8 years in Partner Management, Delivery Management, Professional Services, or Project Governance roles. 

• Experience working with implementation partners, system integrators, or consulting firms. 

• Strong understanding of software/IT implementation processes (integration, configuration, change management, UAT, go-live). 

• Collaborate with world-class technical and business teams across multiple regions. 

• Experience in SaaS, fintech, AI, blockchain, digital content platforms, or enterprise open source software. 

• Previous work with partner-led delivery models or certification programs. 

• Knowledge of partner governance tools, PMO frameworks, and QA processes. 

• English is a must, any other language a plus 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, oltre a servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, lavorando da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Nell'ambito del team di distribuzione della tecnologia di Tether Data, il responsabile dei partner Solutions è responsabile della gestione, abilitazione e gestione di una rete di società di consulenza, integratori di sistema e partner di consegna che implementano i prodotti Tether (WDK, QVAC e MOS). Il ruolo assicura ai partner progetti di alta qualità, in linea con gli interessi di Tether, soddisfare gli standard di certificazione e guidare la soddisfazione del cliente. ## Responsabilità 1. Partner Relationship & Capability Management - Agite come titolare del rapporto primario per tutti i partner di Soluzioni. - Coordinare la valutazione delle capacità dei partner, la maturità di consegna e le risorse. - Assicurare ai partner di mantenere sufficienti consulenti certificati e capacità tecniche. - Condurre revisioni regolari delle capacità e sviluppare piani di miglioramento dei partner secondo le necessità. 2. Partner Onboarding & Certification - Guidare l'imbarco di nuovi partner di implementazione, tra cui due diligence ed esecuzione dei contratti. - Coordinare i programmi di formazione e certificazione dei partner - Assicurare l'adesione a manuali di implementazione, best practice e framework di consegna. 3. Delivery Governance - Superare le implementazioni guidate dai partner per garantire l'allineamento con la metodologia, gli standard di qualità e le tempistiche. - Partecipa ai kick-off del progetto, alle recensioni di pietre miliari e ai checkpoint di governance. - Convalida dei prodotti partner (ad esempio, configurazioni, configurazioni di integrazione, documentazione di prova). - Gestire escalation e coordinare le risoluzioni con i team tecnici, di supporto e di prodotto interni. 4. Project Portfolio Monitoring - Mantenere la visibilità sull'intero portafoglio di progetti partner. - Identificare e contrassegnare le opportunità di cross-sell con altri prodotti Tether o con i servizi offerti dalle società di portafoglio Tether, ove pertinenti. - Tracciare i rischi di consegna, risolvere le lacune e le escalation in tutto l'ecosistema partner. - Assicurare ai partner di ricevere supporto tecnico come richiesto durante le loro implementazioni 5. Quality Assurance & Performance Management - Monitorare i KPI come il tasso di successo del progetto, CSAT e la qualità della consegna dei partner. - Eseguire recensioni trimestrali sulle prestazioni dei partner. - Definire piani di azione correttiva o restrizioni di consegna temporanea quando necessario. - Gestire cicli di certificazione e tiering dei partner. 7. Coordinamento trasversale - Lavorare a stretto contatto con i team di successo, consegna, supporto, prodotto e formazione del cliente. - Assicurare transizioni fluide tra le fasi di vendita-a-consegna e consegna-a-supporto. - Fornisci feedback da progetti partner a team interni per migliorare la qualità dei prodotti e i processi di implementazione. 8. Gestione del ciclo di vita del partner - Gestisci il rinnovo del partner, la ri-certificazione e (se necessario) l'offboarding. - Mantenere record di partner, matrici di capacità e registri delle prestazioni del progetto. ## Requisiti - 4-8 anni in Partner Management, Delivery Management, Servizi Professionali o Project Governance ruoli. - Esperienza di lavoro con partner di implementazione, integratori di sistema, o società di consulenza. - Forte comprensione dei processi di implementazione software/IT (integrazione, configurazione, gestione dei cambiamenti, UAT, go-live). - Collabora con team tecnici e aziendali di livello mondiale in più regioni. - Esperienza in SaaS, fintech, AI, blockchain, piattaforme di contenuti digitali, o software open source enterprise. - Lavoro precedente con modelli di consegna con partner o programmi di certificazione. - Conoscenza degli strumenti di governance dei partner, dei framework PMO e dei processi QA. - L'inglese è un must, qualsiasi altra lingua un plus ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati truffa di reclutamento sono diventati sempre più comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: - Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - No. Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. - Doppio indirizzo email. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether. io - Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalarlo immediatamente. - No. Quando in dubbio, non esitate a raggiungere il nostro sito ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, the Solutions Partner Manager is responsible for managing, enabling, and governing a network of consulting firms, system integrators, and delivery partners who implement Tether products (WDK, QVAC, and MOS). The role ensures partners deliver high-quality projects, align with Tether’s interests, meet certification standards, and drive customer satisfaction. Responsibilities 1. Partner Relationship & Capability Management • Act as the primary relationship owner for all Solutions Partners. • Coordinate the assessment of partner capabilities, delivery maturity, and resources. • Ensure partners maintain sufficient certified consultants and technical capacity. • Conduct regular capability reviews and develop partner improvement plans as needed. 2. Partner Onboarding & Certification • Lead the onboarding of new implementation partners, including due diligence and contract execution. • Coordinate partner training and certification programs • Ensure adherence to implementation playbooks, best practices, and delivery frameworks. 3. Delivery Governance • Oversee partner-led implementations to ensure alignment with methodology, quality standards, and timelines. • Participate in project kick-offs, milestone reviews, and governance checkpoints. • Validate partner deliverables (e.g., configurations, integration setups, testing documentation). • Manage escalations and coordinate resolutions with internal Technical, Support, and Product teams. 4. Project Portfolio Monitoring • Maintain visibility over the entire portfolio of partner-led projects. • Identify and flag cross-sell opportunities with other Tether products or with services offered by Tether portfolio companies, where relevant. • Track delivery risks, resourcing gaps, and escalations across the partner ecosystem. • Ensure Partners receive Technical support as required during their implementations 5. Quality Assurance & Performance Management • Monitor KPIs such as project success rate, CSAT, and partner delivery quality. • Perform quarterly partner performance reviews. • Define corrective action plans or temporary delivery restrictions when required. • Manage re-certification cycles and partner tiering. 7. Cross-Functional Coordination • Work closely with Customer Success, Delivery, Support, Product, and Training teams. • Ensure smooth transitions between sales-to-delivery and delivery-to-support phases. • Provide feedback from partner projects to internal teams to improve product quality and implementation processes. 8. Partner Lifecycle Management • Manage partner renewal, re-certification, and (if necessary) offboarding. • Maintain partner records, capability matrices, and project performance logs. • 4–8 years in Partner Management, Delivery Management, Professional Services, or Project Governance roles. • Experience working with implementation partners, system integrators, or consulting firms. • Strong understanding of software/IT implementation processes (integration, configuration, change management, UAT, go-live). • Collaborate with world-class technical and business teams across multiple regions. • Experience in SaaS, fintech, AI, blockchain, digital content platforms, or enterprise open source software. • Previous work with partner-led delivery models or certification programs. • Knowledge of partner governance tools, PMO frameworks, and QA processes. • English is a must, any other language a plus Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreiben Sie Tether und Gestalten Sie die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Pionier einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen befähigen Unternehmen – von Börsen und Geldbörsen bis zu Zahlungsprozessoren und Geldautomaten –, über Blockchains lückenlos recycelte Token zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist der Grundstein für alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jede Transaktion zu gewährleisten. Innovate mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite verfügt über das weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stallcoin, USDT, das von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit begehrt wird, sowie wegweisende digitale Asset-Tokenization-Dienste. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Fahren Sie nachhaltiges Wachstum, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Leistung für Bitcoin Bergbau mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiverse Anlagen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie reduzieren wir die Infrastrukturkosten und erhöhen die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und gig-Wirtschaften zu leben, das globale Wachstum und die Chance zu treiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drängen wir die Grenzen von dem, was möglich ist, und schaffen eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in mächtigen, beispiellosen Weisen verschmelzen. Warum bei uns? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von jeder Ecke der Welt entfernt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran sind, eine Marke im Fintech-Raum zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zu kooperieren, Grenzen zu drängen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, blieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Marktführer in der Branche. Wenn Sie hervorragende englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten haben und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform auf dem Planeten beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Im Rahmen des Technologie-Vertriebsteams von Tether Data ist der Solutions Partner Manager für die Verwaltung, Freigabe und Steuerung eines Netzwerks von Beratungsfirmen, Systemintegratoren und Lieferpartnern verantwortlich, die Tether-Produkte (WDK, QVAC und MOS) implementieren. Die Rolle stellt sicher, dass Partner hochwertige Projekte liefern, sich an die Interessen von Tether richten, Zertifizierungsstandards erfüllen und die Kundenzufriedenheit steigern. 1. Partner Relationship & Capability Management - Act als primärer Beziehungsbesitzer für alle Solutions Partner. - Koordinieren Sie die Bewertung der Partnerfähigkeiten, Lieferfrist und Ressourcen. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass Partner ausreichende zertifizierte Berater und technische Kapazitäten unterhalten. - Führen Sie regelmäßige Leistungsbewertungen und entwickeln Sie Partnerverbesserungspläne nach Bedarf. 2. Partner Onboarding & Certification - Führen Sie den Einstieg neuer Implementierungspartner, einschließlich Due Diligence und Vertragsabwicklung. - Koordinierte Partner-Trainings- und Zertifizierungsprogramme - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Implementierungs-Playbooks, Best Practices und Lieferrahmen. 3. Liefer-Government - Beaufsichtigen Sie die partnergeführten Implementierungen, um die Anpassung an Methodik, Qualitätsstandards und Zeitlinien zu gewährleisten. - Nehmen Sie an Projekt-Kick-offs, Meilenstein-Rezensionen und Governance-Checkpoints teil. - Gültige Partnerauslieferungen (z.B. Konfigurationen, Integrations-Setups, Testdokumentation). - Eskalationen verwalten und Auflösungen mit internen technischen, Support- und Produktteams koordinieren. 4. Projekt Portfolio Monitoring - Bewahren Sie die Sichtbarkeit über das gesamte Portfolio von Partnerprojekten. - Erkennen und Flag Cross-Selling-Möglichkeiten mit anderen Tether-Produkten oder mit Dienstleistungen, die von Tether-Portfoliounternehmen angeboten werden, gegebenenfalls. - Verfolgen Sie Lieferrisiken, Resourcing von Lücken und Eskalationen im gesamten Partner-Ökosystem. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass Partner bei der Umsetzung 5. Qualitätssicherung & Performance Management - Überwachen Sie KPIs wie Projekterfolgsrate, CSAT und Partnerlieferqualität. - Führen Sie vierteljährliche Partner-Performance-Bewertungen durch. - Definieren Sie bei Bedarf Korrekturaktionspläne oder vorübergehende Lieferbeschränkungen. - Verwalten Sie Rezertifizierungszyklen und Partnerbindung. 7. Cross-Functional Coordination - Arbeiten Sie eng mit Kundenerfolg, Lieferung, Support, Produkt und Training Teams zusammen. - Gewährleistung reibungsloser Übergänge zwischen Verkaufs-zu-Lieferung und Liefer-zu-Unterstützungsphasen. - Feedback von Partnerprojekten zu internen Teams zur Verbesserung der Produktqualität und Implementierungsprozesse. 8. Partner Lifecycle Management - Verwalten Sie Partnererneuerung, Rezertifizierung und (falls erforderlich) Offboarding. - Bewahren Sie Partner-Aufzeichnungen, Leistungsmatrizen und Projekt-Performance-Logs. Requisiti - 4–8 Jahre in Partnermanagement, Liefermanagement, Professional Services oder Project Governance Rollen. - Erfahrungen mit Implementierungspartnern, Systemintegratoren oder Beratungsfirmen. - Starkes Verständnis von Software/IT Implementierungsprozessen (Integration, Konfiguration, Change Management, UAT, go-live). - Zusammenarbeit mit erstklassigen technischen und Business-Teams in verschiedenen Regionen. - Erfahrung in SaaS, Fintech, AI, Blockchain, digitalen Content-Plattformen oder Enterprise Open Source Software. - Vorherige Arbeiten mit partnergeführten Liefermodellen oder Zertifizierungsprogrammen. - Kenntnisse über Partner Governance-Tools, PMO-Frameworks und QA-Prozesse. - Englisch ist ein Muss, jede andere Sprache a plus; Informazioni importanti per i candidati Recruitment Betrug sind immer häufiger geworden. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte bei der Beantragung von Rollen: - Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine Plattformen oder Agenturen von Drittanbietern für die Rekrutierung, sofern nicht klar angegeben. Alle offenen Rollen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Rekruten. Alle unsere Rekrutierer haben LinkedIn-Profile überprüft. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie Ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. - Ja. Seien Sie vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen. - E-Mail-Adressen überprüfen. Alle Kommunikation von uns wird von E-Mails kommen, die in @ tether.to oder @ tether enden. io - Wir werden keine Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten verlangen. Wenn jemand während des Einstellungsprozesses persönliche Finanzinformationen oder Zahlung an jedem Punkt verlangt, ist es ein Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es sofort. - Ja. Wenn im Zweifel, fühlen Sie sich frei, durch unsere offizielle Website zu erreichen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Rejoignez Tether et façonnez l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne nous contentons pas de créer des produits, nous sommes les pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises (des bourses et portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques) d'intégrer de manière transparente les jetons adossés à des réserves dans les blockchains. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et à l'échelle mondiale, le tout pour une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance : notre suite de produits innovants comprend le stablecoin le plus fiable au monde, l'USDT, sur lequel s'appuient des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services pionniers de tokenisation d'actifs numériques. Mais ce n’est qu’un début : Tether Power : favorisant une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l’énergie excédentaire pour l’extraction de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques respectueuses de l’environnement dans des installations de pointe et géodiverses. Tether Data : En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : en démocratisant l'accès à un apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous permettons aux individus de s'épanouir dans l'économie numérique et des petits boulots, stimulant ainsi la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, en créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une centrale mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance depuis tous les coins du monde. Si vous souhaitez vous démarquer dans le domaine de la fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les limites et d'établir de nouvelles normes. Nous avons connu une croissance rapide, sommes restés minces et avons assuré notre place de leader du secteur. Si vous possédez d'excellentes compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est fait pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos du poste Au sein de l'équipe de distribution technologique de Tether Data, le responsable des partenaires de solutions est responsable de la gestion, de l'activation et de la gouvernance d'un réseau de sociétés de conseil, d'intégrateurs de systèmes et de partenaires de livraison qui mettent en œuvre les produits Tether (WDK, QVAC et MOS). Ce rôle garantit que les partenaires réalisent des projets de haute qualité, s'alignent sur les intérêts de Tether, répondent aux normes de certification et améliorent la satisfaction des clients. ## Responsabilités 1. Relations avec les partenaires et gestion des capacités - Agir en tant que principal responsable des relations pour tous les partenaires de solutions. - Coordonner l'évaluation des capacités des partenaires, de la maturité de la livraison et des ressources. - Veiller à ce que les partenaires maintiennent suffisamment de consultants certifiés et de capacités techniques. - Effectuer des examens réguliers des capacités et élaborer des plans d'amélioration des partenaires si nécessaire. 2. Intégration et certification des partenaires - Diriger l'intégration de nouveaux partenaires de mise en œuvre, y compris la diligence raisonnable et l'exécution des contrats. - Coordonner les programmes de formation et de certification des partenaires. - Assurer le respect des manuels de mise en œuvre, des meilleures pratiques et des cadres de livraison. 3. Gouvernance de la livraison - Superviser les mises en œuvre dirigées par les partenaires pour garantir l'alignement avec la méthodologie, les normes de qualité et les délais. - Participer aux lancements de projets, aux revues d'étapes et aux points de contrôle de gouvernance. - Valider les livrables des partenaires (par exemple, configurations, configurations d'intégration, documentation de test). - Gérer les escalades et coordonner les résolutions avec les équipes techniques, de support et de produit internes. 4. Suivi du portefeuille de projets - Maintenir une visibilité sur l'ensemble du portefeuille de projets dirigés par les partenaires. - Identifier et signaler les opportunités de ventes croisées avec d'autres produits Tether ou avec des services proposés par les sociétés du portefeuille Tether, le cas échéant. - Suivez les risques de livraison, les déficits de ressources et les escalades dans l'écosystème des partenaires. - S'assurer que les partenaires reçoivent le support technique requis lors de leurs mises en œuvre. 5. Assurance qualité et gestion des performances - Surveiller les KPI tels que le taux de réussite du projet, le CSAT et la qualité de livraison des partenaires. - Effectuer des évaluations trimestrielles des performances des partenaires. - Définir des plans d'actions correctives ou des restrictions de livraison temporaires lorsque nécessaire. - Gérer les cycles de recertification et la hiérarchisation des partenaires. 7. Coordination interfonctionnelle – Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de réussite client, de livraison, de support, de produit et de formation. - Assurer des transitions fluides entre les phases de vente à livraison et de livraison à support. - Fournir des retours sur les projets partenaires aux équipes internes pour améliorer la qualité des produits et les processus de mise en œuvre. 8. Gestion du cycle de vie des partenaires - Gérez le renouvellement, la recertification et (si nécessaire) le départ des partenaires. - Tenir à jour les dossiers des partenaires, les matrices de capacités et les journaux de performances du projet. ## Requisiti - 4 à 8 ans dans des rôles de gestion des partenaires, de gestion des livraisons, de services professionnels ou de gouvernance de projet. - Expérience de travail avec des partenaires de mise en œuvre, des intégrateurs de systèmes ou des sociétés de conseil. - Forte compréhension des processus de mise en œuvre logicielle/informatique (intégration, configuration, gestion du changement, UAT, go-live). - Collaborer avec des équipes techniques et commerciales de classe mondiale dans plusieurs régions. - Expérience en SaaS, fintech, IA, blockchain, plateformes de contenu numérique ou logiciels open source d'entreprise. - Travail antérieur avec des modèles de prestation dirigés par des partenaires ou des programmes de certification. - Connaissance des outils de gouvernance des partenaires, des cadres PMO et des processus d'assurance qualité. - L'anglais est indispensable, toute autre langue est un plus ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Les escroqueries au recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder les points suivants à l'esprit lorsque vous postulez à des postes : - Postulez uniquement via nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plateformes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement, sauf indication contraire. Tous les postes ouverts sont répertoriés sur notre page officielle des carrières : https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. En cas de doute, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. - Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toutes les communications se font via les e-mails et les plateformes officielles de l'entreprise. - Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toutes les communications de notre part proviendront d'e-mails se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ tether.io - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu’un demande des informations financières personnelles ou un paiement à tout moment du processus d’embauche, il s’agit d’une arnaque. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. - En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter via notre site officiel.

jobs.title: AI Filmmaker (100% Remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Filmmaker AI (100% Remote)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As an AI Filmmaker, you will leverage AI-based photo and video tools to conceptualize, create, and edit short films and videos. These videos will be used to tell stories, showcase products, and bring the visions of Tether and its affiliated companies to life. You’ll work closely within the marketing department to ensure that each video aligns with the brand’s message, tone, and visual style.
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Create short films and videos using AI-driven photo and video generation tools.

• Edit and refine AI-generated content to produce high-quality, engaging visuals.

• Collaborate with the marketing team colleagues to develop video concepts for Tether, and other affiliated brands.

• Ensure all video content aligns with brand guidelines and communicates key messages effectively.

• Stay updated on the latest AI filmmaking tools and techniques, incorporating innovations into your workflow.

• Manage multiple projects with tight deadlines, ensuring timely delivery.

• Experiment with creative formats, styles, and effects to produce unique, memorable content.

 
 
• Proven experience in video production and editing, with a strong portfolio of work.

• Proficiency in AI video generation tools (e.g., Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E, or others).

• Expertise in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve).

• Creative storytelling skills with a keen eye for visual composition and detail.

• Ability to conceptualize and execute ideas quickly using AI tools.

• Familiarity with digital marketing and the ability to tailor content for social media platforms.

• Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

• A passion for technology, bitcoin, and innovation is a plus.

 
 What we offer 
 
• Competitive compensation.

• Opportunity to work with a global team on cutting-edge projects.

• Flexibility to work remotely.

• Access to advanced AI tools and resources.

• A collaborative environment where your creativity will have a direct impact on the brand’s narrative.

descriptionByLocale.it: Tether e la tua futura carriera ### Descrizione Unisciti a Tether e contribuisci a plasmare il futuro della finanza digitale At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, stiamo rivoluzionando il panorama finanziario globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende - dalle borse e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e alle bancomat - di integrare in modo fluido token garantiti da riserve su blockchain. Sfruttando il potere della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere token digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, a un costo inferiore del 10%. L'innovazione è il nostro pilastro, assicurando la trasparenza in ogni transazione. ### Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra suite di prodotti innovativi comprende la stablecoin più affidata al mondo, USDT, utilizzata da centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi di tokenizzazione di asset digitali pionieristici. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: La nostra soluzione per il potenziamento sostenibile ottimizza l'energia in eccesso per il mining del Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture di ultima generazione e geo-diverse. Tether Data: I nostri strumenti di avanzata tecnologia riducono i costi di infrastruttura e migliorano le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni come KEET, il nostro app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione di dati sicuri e privati. Tether Education : La democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello consente alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig, promuovendo la crescita e l'opportunità globali. Tether Evolution : Al confine tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i limiti di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui l'innovazione e le capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e inediti. ### Perché unirti a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, che lavora a distanza da ogni angolo del mondo. Se sei appassionato di lasciare il tuo segno nel settore fintech, questo è il tuo momento per collaborare con alcuni dei cervelli più brillanti, spingendo i limiti e stabilendo nuovi standard. Abbiamo cresciuto rapidamente, mantenuto la nostra struttura snella e assicurato il nostro posto di leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti abilità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire al più innovativo platform del pianeta, Tether è il posto giusto per te. Sei pronto a essere parte del futuro? ### Informazioni sul lavoro Come Filmmaker AI, utilizzerai strumenti di generazione di foto e video basati sull'intelligenza artificiale per concepire, creare e editare cortometraggi e video. Questi video saranno utilizzati per raccontare storie, presentare prodotti e portare le visioni di Tether e delle sue società affiliate alla vita. ### Responsabilità - Creare cortometraggi e video utilizzando strumenti di generazione di foto e video basati sull'intelligenza artificiale. - Editare e perfezionare il contenuto generato dall'intelligenza artificiale per produrre visuali di alta qualità e coinvolgenti. - Collaborare con i colleghi del team di marketing per sviluppare concetti di video per Tether e altre marche affiliate. - Assicurarsi che tutti i contenuti video siano in linea con le linee guida della marca e comunicino i messaggi chiave in modo efficace. - Restare aggiornato sulle ultime tecnologie e tecniche di filmmaking con AI, incorporando innovazioni nel proprio workflow. - Gestire più progetti con scadenze strette, assicurando la consegna tempestiva. - Sperimentare con formati, stili e effetti creativi per produrre contenuti unici e memorabili. ### Requisiti - Esperienza provata nella produzione e editing di video, con un portafoglio di lavoro solido. - Abilità nella generazione di video con strumenti AI (ad esempio, Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E o altri). - Esperto in software di editing video (ad esempio, Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). - Abilità di raccontare storie creative con un occhio attento per la composizione visiva e i dettagli. - Capacità di concepire e eseguire idee rapidamente utilizzando strumenti AI. - Familiarità con il marketing digitale e capacità di adattare il contenuto per piattaforme di social media. - Abilità di gestire progetti e organizzare il lavoro, con la capacità di lavorare indipendentemente e rispettare i tempi di consegna. - Passione per la tecnologia, il bitcoin e l'innovazione (un plus). ### Cosa offriamo - Compensazione competitiva. - Opportunità di lavorare con un team globale su progetti all'avanguardia. - Flessibilità di lavorare a distanza. - Accesso a strumenti e risorse di AI avanzati. - Un ambiente collaborativo in cui la tua creatività avrà un impatto diretto sulla narrazione della marca.

These videos will be used to tell stories, showcase products, and bring the visions of Tether and its affiliated companies to life. You’ll work closely within the marketing department to ensure that each video aligns with the brand’s message, tone, and visual style. Responsibilities • Create short films and videos using AI-driven photo and video generation tools. • Edit and refine AI-generated content to produce high-quality, engaging visuals. • Collaborate with the marketing team colleagues to develop video concepts for Tether, and other affiliated brands. • Ensure all video content aligns with brand guidelines and communicates key messages effectively. • Stay updated on the latest AI filmmaking tools and techniques, incorporating innovations into your workflow. • Manage multiple projects with tight deadlines, ensuring timely delivery. • Experiment with creative formats, styles, and effects to produce unique, memorable content. • Proven experience in video production and editing, with a strong portfolio of work. • Proficiency in AI video generation tools (e.g., Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E, or others). • Expertise in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). • Creative storytelling skills with a keen eye for visual composition and detail. • Ability to conceptualize and execute ideas quickly using AI tools. • Familiarity with digital marketing and the ability to tailor content for social media platforms. • Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines. • A passion for technology, bitcoin, and innovation is a plus. What we offer • Competitive compensation. • Opportunity to work with a global team on cutting-edge projects. • Flexibility to work remotely. • Access to advanced AI tools and resources. • A collaborative environment where your creativity will have a direct impact on the brand’s narrative.
descriptionByLocale.de: Tether und deine Zukunft ### Beschreibung Bist du bereit, Teil von Tether zu werden und den Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen zu gestalten? Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir revolutionieren den globalen Finanzmarkt. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen - von Börsen und Portfolios bis hin zu Zahlungssystemen und Bankautomaten - tokens mit garantierten Reserven auf der Blockchain zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether es dir, tokens digital zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen, sofort, sicher und global, zu einem Kostenrabatt von 10%. Innovation ist unser Leitprinzip, das Transparenz in jeder Transaktion gewährleistet. ### Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite umfasst die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stablecoin, USDT, die von Hunderten Millionen Menschen weltweit verwendet wird, zusammen mit Pionierleistungen in der Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Lösung für nachhaltige Leistungsoptimierung nutzt überschüssige Energie für den Bitcoin-Mining mit umweltfreundlichen Methoden in modernen, geo-verteilten Strukturen. Tether Data: Unsere fortschrittlichen Technologien reduzieren die Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit Lösungen wie KEET, unserem Flaggschiff-App, die die sichere und private Datenverteilung neu definiert. Tether Education : Die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu hochwertigem digitalen Lernen ermöglicht es Menschen, in digitalen und Gig-Ökonomien zu prosperieren, die Wachstum und globale Chancen fördert. Tether Evolution : Am Schnittpunkt von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drücken wir die Grenzen dessen, was möglich ist, und schaffen einen Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in neuen und kraftvollen Wegen zusammenfließen. ### Warum bist du Teil von uns? Unser Team ist eine globale Kraft aus Talenten, die von jedem Winkel der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn du begeistert bist, deinen Einfluss im FinTech-Sektor zu hinterlassen, ist dies dein Moment, um mit einigen der brillantesten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu sprengen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir haben schnell gewachsen, unsere Struktur erhalten und unseren Platz als Führer im Sektor gesichert. Wenn du ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten auf Englisch hast und bereit bist, zum innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der richtige Ort für dich. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu werden? ### Arbeitsinformationen Als AI-Filmmaker wirst du Tools für die generative Bild- und Videoproduktion basierend auf künstlicher Intelligenz verwenden, um Kurzfilme und Videos zu konzipieren, zu erstellen und zu bearbeiten. Diese Videos werden verwendet, um Geschichten zu erzählen, Produkte vorzustellen und die Visionen von Tether und seinen verbundenen Unternehmen in das Leben zu bringen. ### Aufgaben - Kurzfilme und Videos erstellen, indem man Tools für die generative Bild- und Videoproduktion basierend auf künstlicher Intelligenz verwendet. - Inhalte, die von der künstlichen Intelligenz generiert wurden, bearbeiten und vervollständigen, um hochwertige und fesselnde visuelle Inhalte zu produzieren. - Mit den Kollegen des Marketing-Teams zusammenarbeiten, um Konzepte für Videos für Tether und andere Marken zu entwickeln. - Sichergestellt, dass alle Videoinhalte den Markenleitlinien entsprechen und die wichtigsten Botschaften effektiv übermitteln. - Sich auf dem Laufenden halten, was die neuesten Technologien und -Techniken der künstlichen Intelligenz-basierten Filmmaking sind, und Innovationen in den eigenen Workflow integrieren. - Mehrere Projekte mit engen Fristen verwalten, um sicherzustellen, dass die Termine eingehalten werden. - Experimentieren mit Formaten, Stilen und Effekten, um einzigartige und erinnerungswürdige Inhalte zu produzieren. ### Anforderungen - Erfahrung in der Produktion und Bearbeitung von Videos, mit einem soliden Portfolio. - Fähigkeit, Videos mit Tools für künstliche Intelligenz (z.B. Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E oder andere) zu generieren. - Experte in Software für die Videobearbeitung (z.B. Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). - Fähigkeit, kreative Geschichten zu erzählen, mit einem Auge für visuelle Komposition und Details. - Fähigkeit, Ideen schnell zu konzipieren und umzusetzen, indem man Tools für künstliche Intelligenz verwendet. - Kenntnisse im digitalen Marketing und Fähigkeit, Inhalte für soziale Medien anzupassen. - Fähigkeit, Projekte zu verwalten und das Arbeitspensum zu organisieren, mit der Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten und Termine einzuhalten. - Leidenschaft für Technologie, Bitcoin und Innovation (optional). ### Was wir bieten - Gute Bezahlung. - Möglichkeit, mit einem globalen Team an fortschrittlichen Projekten zu arbeiten. - Flexibilität, um von überall aus zu arbeiten. - Zugang zu fortschrittlichen AI-Tools und -Ressourcen. - Ein kollaborativer Umfeld, in dem deine Kreativität direkt auf die Markenbotschaft wirkt.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Tether et ton avenir ### Description Rejoins Tether et contribue à façonner l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne construisons pas seulement des produits, nous révolutionnons le marché financier mondial. Nos solutions innovantes permettent aux entreprises - des bourses et des portefeuilles aux systèmes de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques - d'intégrer des jetons garanties par des réserves sur la blockchain. En utilisant le pouvoir de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, de manière sécurisée et mondiale, avec un coût inférieur de 10%. L'innovation est notre pilier, garantissant la transparence dans chaque transaction. ### Innover avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants comprend la stablecoin la plus fiable au monde, USDT, utilisée par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que des services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais c'est juste le début: Tether Power: Notre solution pour l'optimisation de l'énergie durable optimise l'énergie en excès pour le mining du Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des structures de dernière génération et géodiverses. Tether Data: Nos outils de technologie avancée réduisent les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorent les communications mondiales avec des solutions comme KEET, notre application de pointe qui redéfinit la partage de données sécurisées et privées. Tether Education : La démocratisation de l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau permet aux personnes de prospérer dans les économies numériques et gig, promouvant la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : Au point de rencontre entre technologie et potentiel humain, nous pouvons pousser les limites de ce qui est possible, créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se fondent en nouvelles et puissantes manières. ### Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe? Notre équipe est une force de talent mondiale, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné de laisser votre marque dans le secteur fintech, c'est votre moment pour collaborer avec quelques-uns des cerveaux les plus brillants, pousser les limites et établir de nouveaux standards. Nous avons grandi rapidement, maintenu notre structure fine et assuré notre place de leader dans le secteur. Si vous avez de solides compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer au plus innovant platform du monde, Tether est le bon endroit pour vous. Soyez prêt à être partie de l'avenir? ### Informations sur le travail En tant que Filmmaker AI, vous utiliserez des outils de génération d'image et de vidéo basés sur l'intelligence artificielle pour concevoir, créer et éditer des courts-métrages et des vidéos. Ces vidéos seront utilisées pour raconter des histoires, présenter des produits et faire connaître les visions de Tether et de ses sociétés affiliées. ### Responsabilités - Créer des courts-métrages et des vidéos en utilisant des outils de génération d'image et de vidéo basés sur l'intelligence artificielle. - Éditer et améliorer le contenu généré par l'intelligence artificielle pour produire des visuels de haute qualité et captivants. - Collaborer avec les collègues du département marketing pour développer des concepts de vidéos pour Tether et d'autres marques. - S'assurer que tous les contenus vidéo soient conformes aux lignes directrices de la marque et transmettent les messages clés de manière efficace. - Rester à jour sur les dernières technologies et techniques de filmmaking avec IA, en incorporant des innovations dans son workflow. - Gérer plusieurs projets avec des délais serrés, en s'assurant que les délais soient respectés. - Expérimenter avec des formats, des styles et des effets créatifs pour produire des contenus uniques et mémorables. ### Exigences - Expérience prouvée dans la production et l'édition de vidéos, avec un portefolio solide. - Compétence dans la génération de vidéos avec des outils AI (par exemple, Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E ou autres). - Expert en logiciels d'édition vidéo (par exemple, Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). - Compétence pour raconter des histoires créatives avec un regard attentif pour la composition visuelle et les détails. - Capacité à concevoir et exécuter des idées rapidement en utilisant des outils AI. - Connaissance du marketing numérique et capacité à adapter le contenu pour les plateformes de médias sociaux. - Compétence pour gérer des projets et organiser le travail, avec la capacité de travailler de manière indépendante et de respecter les délais. - Passion pour la technologie, le bitcoin et l'innovation (facultatif). ### Ce que nous offrons - Salaire compétitif. - Opportunité de travailler avec un équipe mondiale sur des projets innovants. - Flexibilité pour travailler à distance. - Accès à des outils et des ressources AI avancés. - Un environnement collaboratif où votre créativité aura un impact direct sur la narration de la marque.

jobs.title: Social Media Manager (100% remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire des médias sociaux

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We’re seeking a Social Media Manager focused on Tether tech products and events. You will plan, coordinate, and implement social media campaigns and community growth strategies — supporting product launches, engagement, education, and user outreach globally. You will also be encouraged to leverage AI tools to generate creative content ideas and concepts, helping the team explore new ways to communicate our products and initiatives (AI-generated ideas are for internal review and ideation, not for direct publishing). 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
• Develop and implement a social media strategy aligned with product launches, marketing goals, and audience needs 

• Create, edit, and publish content across platforms (e.g., X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Telegram) 

• Manage content calendars, posting schedules, and distribution plans in coordination with global marketing and product teams 

• Work closely with product managers to communicate updates, new features, and benefits of Tether products 

• Collaborate with partners, influencers, and community leaders to drive awareness and trust 

• Track key performance indicators (KPIs) — engagement, growth, reach — and report campaign results to senior stakeholders 

• Adapt messaging for clarity, cultural relevance, and brand consistency 

• Use AI tools to brainstorm content ideas, visuals, and messaging frameworks to enhance campaigns (ideas only, not for final publication) 

 
 
 

 Requirements: 
 
• 3–5 years of professional experience in social media management, ideally in fintech or tech sectors 

• Fluent in English (writing and speaking); Spanish is a bonus 

• Proven ability to grow and engage online communities across multiple social platforms 

• Skills in content creation — copywriting, basic graphics or multimedia (images, GIFs, short video) 

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage deadlines, priorities, and cross-team coordination 

• Autonomous, self-starter attitude; able to work remotely and collaborate across time zones 

• Basic understanding of Bitcoin / stablecoins / blockchain products is preferred 

• Familiarity or willingness to use AI tools to generate creative social media concepts 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
