Sei pronto a essere parte del futuro? ## Descrizione del Lavoro Stiamo cercando un Manager dei Social Media focalizzato sui prodotti tecnologici e sugli eventi del Tether. Sarai responsabile di pianificare, coordinare e implementare campagne di social media e strategie di crescita della comunità – supportando i lanci dei prodotti, l'engagement, l'istruzione e l'outreach degli utenti a livello globale. Sarai anche incoraggiato a utilizzare strumenti AI per generare idee creative di contenuti e concetti, aiutando la squadra a esplorare nuove modalità di comunicare i nostri prodotti e iniziative (le idee generate da AI sono per la revisione interna e l'ideazione, non per la pubblicazione diretta). ## Responsabilità: - Sviluppare e implementare una strategia di social media allineata con i lanci dei prodotti, gli obiettivi di marketing e le esigenze dell'utenza - Creare, modificare e pubblicare contenuti su piattaforme diverse (ad esempio, X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Telegram) - Gestire calendari dei contenuti, piani di pubblicazione e piani di distribuzione in coordinamento con le squadre di marketing e prodotto globali - Collaborare con i responsabili dei prodotti per comunicare aggiornamenti, nuove funzionalità e benefici dei prodotti del Tether - Collaborare con partner, influencer e leader della comunità per promuovere la consapevolezza e la fiducia - Tracciare indicatori di prestazione chiave (KPI) – engagement, crescita, raggiungimento – e riferire i risultati delle campagne ai stakeholder senior - Adattare il messaggio per la chiarezza, la rilevanza culturale e la coerenza del marchio - Utilizzare strumenti AI per brainstormare idee di contenuti, visualizzazioni e framework di messaggio per migliorare le campagne (idee solo, non per la pubblicazione finale) ## Requisiti: - 3-5 anni di esperienza professionale nella gestione dei social media, ideale nel settore fintech o tecnologico - Fluenza in inglese (scrittura e parlato); lo spagnolo è un bonus - Prova di crescita e engagement di comunità online su piattaforme multiple - Abilità nella creazione di contenuti – scrittura, grafica di base o multimediali (immagini, GIF, video corti) - Abilità organizzative forti e capacità di gestire scadenze, priorità e coordinamento inter-squadra - Attitudine autonoma e di self-starter; capacità di lavorare a distanza e collaborare across time zones - Comprensione di base di Bitcoin / stablecoins / prodotti blockchain - Familiarità o disponibilità a utilizzare strumenti AI per generare concetti social media creativi ## Contatto Per proteggere la tua sicurezza, ti preghiamo di seguire queste linee guida: - Applica solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme terze o agenzie per la selezione se non è stato esplicitamente indicato. - Verifica l'identità del recruiter. Tutti i nostri recruiter hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se sei incerto, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - Sii cauto con i metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutta la comunicazione viene effettuata attraverso email ufficiali e piattaforme. - Verifica gli indirizzi email. Tutta la comunicazione da parte nostra proviene da email con estensione @tether.to o @tether.io - Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o pagamenti in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è uno schermo. Segnala immediatamente. - Se hai dubbi, non esitare a contattarci attraverso il nostro sito web ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job We’re seeking a Social Media Manager focused on Tether tech products and events. You will plan, coordinate, and implement social media campaigns and community growth strategies — supporting product launches, engagement, education, and user outreach globally. You will also be encouraged to leverage AI tools to generate creative content ideas and concepts, helping the team explore new ways to communicate our products and initiatives (AI-generated ideas are for internal review and ideation, not for direct publishing). Responsibilities: • Develop and implement a social media strategy aligned with product launches, marketing goals, and audience needs • Create, edit, and publish content across platforms (e.g., X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Telegram) • Manage content calendars, posting schedules, and distribution plans in coordination with global marketing and product teams • Work closely with product managers to communicate updates, new features, and benefits of Tether products • Collaborate with partners, influencers, and community leaders to drive awareness and trust • Track key performance indicators (KPIs) — engagement, growth, reach — and report campaign results to senior stakeholders • Adapt messaging for clarity, cultural relevance, and brand consistency • Use AI tools to brainstorm content ideas, visuals, and messaging frameworks to enhance campaigns (ideas only, not for final publication) Requirements: • 3–5 years of professional experience in social media management, ideally in fintech or tech sectors • Fluent in English (writing and speaking); Spanish is a bonus • Proven ability to grow and engage online communities across multiple social platforms • Skills in content creation — copywriting, basic graphics or multimedia (images, GIFs, short video) • Strong organizational skills and ability to manage deadlines, priorities, and cross-team coordination • Autonomous, self-starter attitude; able to work remotely and collaborate across time zones • Basic understanding of Bitcoin / stablecoins / blockchain products is preferred • Familiarity or willingness to use AI tools to generate creative social media concepts Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Join Tether und Wähle, wie du die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen formen möchtest Bei Tether schaffen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir revolutionieren die globale Finanzwelt. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Portfolios bis hin zu Zahlungsverarbeitern und Geldautomaten –, Token mit Reserve auf Blockchain zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether die sichere und globale Speicherung, Übertragung und Empfang von Token in Echtzeit zu einem Kostenrabatt von 10%. ## Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: unser innovatives Produktportfolio umfasst die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stablecoin, USDT, die von Hunderten Millionen Menschen weltweit verwendet wird, sowie die Pionierarbeit bei der Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: - Tether Power: Wir leiten die nachhaltige Wachstumsentwicklung, indem unsere Energie-Lösungen den Überhang an Energie für den Bitcoin-Mining mit umweltfreundlichen Methoden in modernen, geografisch diversen Strukturen optimieren. - Tether Data: Wir fördern die Fortschritte in der KI und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie, indem wir die Infrastrukturkosten reduzieren und die globale Kommunikation verbessern, indem wir fortschrittliche Lösungen wie KEET, unser Flaggschiff-App, verwenden, die die sichere und private Datenverteilung neu definiert. - Tether Education: Wir demokratisieren den Zugang zu hochwertigem digitalen Lernen, indem wir Menschen ermöglichen, sich in digitalen und Gig-Ökonomien zu entwickeln, die globale Wachstumsentwicklung und die Chancen zu fördern. - Tether Evolution: Am Schnittpunkt von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drücken wir die Grenzen dessen, was möglich ist, indem wir einen Zukunft schaffen, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in neuen und kraftvollen Wegen kombiniert werden. ## Warum dich uns anschließen? Unser Team ist eine globale Kraft aus Talenten, die von jedem Winkel der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn du begeistert bist, im Fintech-Sektor einen bleibenden Eindruck zu hinterlassen, ist dies der Moment, um mit einigen der brillantesten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überschreiten und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir haben schnell gewachsen, unsere Flexibilität beibehalten und unseren Platz als Führer in der Industrie gesichert. Wenn du ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch hast und bereit bist, zum innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für dich. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu werden? ## Beschreibung der Arbeit Wir suchen einen Social-Media-Manager, der sich auf die technischen Produkte und die Ereignisse von Tether konzentriert. Du wirst für die Planung, Koordination und Implementierung von Social-Media-Kampagnen und Community-Wachstumsstrategien verantwortlich sein – die Produktstarts, das Engagement, die Bildung und die Outreach-Aktivitäten der Nutzer auf globaler Ebene unterstützen. Du wirst auch ermutigt werden, AI-Tools zu verwenden, um kreative Inhalte und Konzepte zu generieren, um die Mannschaft zu unterstützen, neue Wege zu finden, unsere Produkte und Initiativen zu kommunizieren (die von AI generierten Ideen sind für interne Überprüfung und Ideenentwicklung vorgesehen, nicht für direkte Veröffentlichung). ## Aufgaben: - Ein Social-Media-Strategie entwickeln und umsetzen, die mit Produktstarts, Marketingzielen und Nutzeranforderungen übereinstimmt - Inhalte erstellen, bearbeiten und veröffentlichen auf verschiedenen Plattformen (z.B. X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Telegram) - Inhaltskalender, Veröffentlichungspläne und Verteilungspläne in Abstimmung mit den globalen Marketing- und Produktteams verwalten - Mit Produktverantwortlichen zusammenarbeiten, um Updates, neue Funktionen und Produktvorteile des Tether zu kommunizieren - Mit Partnern, Influencern und Community-Leitern zusammenarbeiten, um die Bewusstseins- und Vertrauensbildung zu fördern - Leistungskennzahlen (KPI) – Engagement, Wachstum, Erreichung – verfolgen und den Ergebnissen der Kampagnen den Senior-Stakeholdern berichten - Den Inhalt anpassen, um Klarheit, kulturelle Relevanz und Markenkonstanz sicherzustellen - AI-Tools verwenden, um Ideen für Inhalte, Visualisierungen und Botschaften zu generieren, um die Kampagnen zu verbessern (Ideen nur, nicht für die endgültige Veröffentlichung) ## Anforderungen: - 3-5 Jahre Berufserfahrung in der Social-Media-Verwaltung, ideal im Fintech- oder Technologie-Sektor - Englischkenntnisse (Schrift und Sprache); Spanisch ist ein Bonus - Beweis von Community-Wachstum und Engagement auf mehreren Plattformen - Fähigkeit zur Inhaltserschaffung – Schrift, Grundlagen der Grafik oder Multimediainhalte (Bilder, GIFs, kurze Videos) - Starke Organisationsfähigkeiten und Fähigkeit, Termine, Prioritäten und interne Koordination zu verwalten - Autonomes und selbstständiges Verhalten; Fähigkeit, fern zu arbeiten und über Zeitzonen hinweg zu kooperieren - Grundlegende Kenntnisse von Bitcoin / Stablecoins / Blockchain-Produkten - Bekanntschaft oder Verfügbarkeit, AI-Tools zur Erzeugung von kreativen Social-Media-Konzepten zu verwenden ## Kontakt Um deine Sicherheit zu schützen, bitten wir dich, diese Richtlinien zu befolgen: - Bewirb dich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine dritten Plattformen oder Agenturen für die Auswahl, wenn nicht ausdrücklich angegeben. - Überprüfe die Identität des Recruiters. Alle unsere Recruiter haben verifizierte LinkedIn-Profil. Wenn du unsicher bist, kannst du ihre Identität überprüfen, indem du ihren Profil überprüfst oder uns über unser Webportal kontaktierst. - Sei vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle E-Mails und Plattformen. - Überprüfe die E-Mail-Adressen. Alle unsere Kommunikation kommt von E-Mails mit der Endung @tether.to oder @tether.io - Wir werden nie Zahlungen oder finanzielle Informationen anfordern. Wenn jemand in jedem Moment während des Auswahlprozesses finanzielle Informationen anfordert oder Zahlungen fordert, ist es ein Schleier. Melden Sie es sofort. - Wenn du unsicher bist, zögere nicht, uns über unser offizielles Webportal zu kontaktieren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rejoignez Tether et choisissez de former l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne créons pas seulement des produits, nous révolutionnons le monde de la finance globale. Nos solutions innovantes permettent aux entreprises – des bourses et des portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux machines à argent – d'intégrer des jetons garantis par des réserves sur la blockchain de manière fluide. En utilisant le pouvoir de la technologie blockchain, Tether permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, de manière sécurisée et mondiale, avec un coût inférieur de 10%. ## Innover avec Tether Tether Finance : notre ensemble de produits innovants comprend la stablecoin la plus fiable au monde, USDT, utilisée par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que les services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais c'est juste le début : - Tether Power : nous guidons la croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès d'énergie pour le mining du Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des structures de dernière génération, géodiverses. - Tether Data : nous alimentons les progrès en IA et en technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions innovantes comme KEET, notre application d'icône qui redéfinit la partage de données sécurisées et privées. - Tether Education : nous démocratisons l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous permettant aux personnes de prospérer dans les économies numériques et de gig, guidant la croissance mondiale et les opportunités. - Tether Evolution : au point d'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous poussons les limites de ce qui est possible, créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se fondent en modes puissants et inédits. ## Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe? Notre équipe est une force de talent mondiale, qui travaille à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné de laisser une empreinte dans le secteur fintech, c'est le moment de collaborer avec quelques-uns des cerveaux les plus brillants, de pousser les limites et de fixer de nouveaux standards. Nous avons grandi rapidement, maintenu notre flexibilité et assuré notre place comme leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez des compétences de communication exceptionnelles en anglais et que vous êtes prêt à contribuer au plus innovant plateforme du monde, Tether est le lieu pour vous. Soyez prêt à être partie de l'avenir? ## Description du travail Nous recherchons un gestionnaire des médias sociaux axé sur les produits technologiques et les événements de Tether. Vous serez responsable de planifier, coordonner et mettre en œuvre des campagnes de médias sociaux et des stratégies de croissance de la communauté – en soutenant les lancements de produits, l'engagement, l'éducation et l'outreach des utilisateurs à l'échelle mondiale. Vous serez également encouragé à utiliser des outils AI pour générer des idées créatives de contenu et de concepts, pour aider l'équipe à explorer de nouvelles manières de communiquer nos produits et initiatives (les idées générées par AI sont réservées à la révision interne et à l'idéation, pas à la publication directe). ## Responsabilités : - Développer et mettre en œuvre une stratégie de médias sociaux alignée sur les lancements de produits, les objectifs de marketing et les besoins de l'utilisateur - Créer, modifier et publier du contenu sur différentes plateformes (par exemple, X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Telegram) - Gérer les calendriers de contenu, les plans de publication et les plans de distribution en coordination avec les équipes de marketing et de produit mondiales - Collaborer avec les responsables de produits pour communiquer les mises à jour, les nouvelles fonctionnalités et les avantages des produits de Tether - Collaborer avec les partenaires, les influenceurs et les leaders de la communauté pour promouvoir la conscience et la confiance - Suivre les indicateurs de performance clés (KPI) – engagement, croissance, atteinte – et rapporter les résultats des campagnes aux principaux responsables - Adapter le message pour la clarté, la pertinence culturelle et la cohérence de la marque - Utiliser des outils AI pour générer des idées de contenu, des visualisations et des cadres de message pour améliorer les campagnes (idées réservées à la révision interne et à l'idéation, pas à la publication directe) ## Exigences : - 3-5 ans d'expérience professionnelle dans la gestion des médias sociaux, idéalement dans le secteur fintech ou technologique - Compétences en anglais (écrit et parlé); l'espagnol est un bonus - Preuve de croissance et d'engagement de la communauté en ligne sur plusieurs plateformes - Capacité à créer du contenu – écriture, graphisme de base ou multimédia (images, GIF, vidéos courtes) - Capacité organisationnelle forte et capacité à gérer des délais, des priorités et un coordination interne - Attitude autonome et de self-starter; capacité à travailler à distance et à collaborer en fonction des fuseaux horaires - Compréhension de base de Bitcoin / stablecoins / produits blockchain - Familiarité ou disponibilité à utiliser des outils AI pour générer des concepts de médias sociaux créatifs ## Contact Pour protéger votre sécurité, nous vous demandons de suivre ces lignes directrices : - Postulez uniquement via nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plateformes tierces ou d'agences pour la sélection, à moins qu'il ne soit explicitement indiqué. - Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. Si vous êtes incertain, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site web. - Soyez prudent avec les méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute la communication se fait via des e-mails officiels et des plateformes. - Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute la communication de notre part provient d'e-mails avec l'extension @tether.to ou @tether.io - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiements ou d'informations financières. Si quelqu'un demande des informations financières personnelles ou des paiements à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est un écran. Signalez-le immédiatement. - Si vous avez des doutes, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter via notre site web officiel.

jobs.title: Marketing Project Manager (100% remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Chef de projet marketing (100 % à distance)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Marketing Project Manager to drive execution across the marketing design function. In this role, you will manage workflows for designers, ensure clear scope definition, and align priorities with Product, and Development teams. 

 You will act as the central point of coordination, translating product requirements into clear, actionable briefs, managing timelines and dependencies, and ensuring high-quality, on-time delivery. 
 
 The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, highly structured, and experienced in working with cross-functional, globally distributed teams on AI-driven software products or digital wallet solutions. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Project & Workflow Management 
 • Own and manage the end-to-end workflow for marketing design projects, from intake and scoping through delivery and launch 
 • Define and document clear project scope, requirements, timelines, and deliverables for designers 
 • Prioritize incoming requests in partnership with Product and Development teams, balancing urgency, impact, and capacity 
 • Track progress, manage dependencies, and proactively identify risks or blockers 
 • Ensure projects are delivered on time, on scope, and aligned with business objectives 
 
 Cross-Functional Alignment 
 • Serve as the primary liaison between Marketing, Product, and Development to ensure alignment on priorities and execution 
 • Translate product and technical requirements into clear design and marketing briefs 
 • Facilitate regular check-ins, reviews, and feedback loops to keep stakeholders aligned 

 Digital & Website Execution 
 • Oversee website launches and updates, including coordinating design, content, and development changes 
 • Ensure accuracy, consistency, and brand alignment across digital touchpoints 
 • Manage content updates across CMS, landing pages, and marketing platforms in collaboration with designers and developers 

 Operational Support & Process Improvement 
 • Establish and refine processes, templates, and tools to improve efficiency and clarity within the marketing design workflow 
 • Maintain documentation for project tracking, status reporting, and post-launch reviews 
 • Support campaign execution, events, and other marketing initiatives as needed 
 

 
 	•	3+ years of experience in marketing project management, design operations, or a similar role 
 	•	Proven experience managing design workflows and coordinating cross-functional teams 
 	•	Demonstrated success leading website and digital products launch, including close collaboration with design and development teams 
 	•	Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously 
 	•	Familiarity with CMS platforms and digital marketing workflows 
 	•	Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English 
 	•	Experience working in a fully remote environment with global teams 
 	•	Background in tech, finance, or infrastructure-related industries is a plus 
 	•	Italian or Spanish fluency is a bonus 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Tether e la Formazione del Futuro della Finanza Digitale Al Tether, non stiamo solo considerando prodotti, stiamo rivoluzionando la finanza globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende - dalle borse e dalle portafogli ai processori di pagamento e alle macchine per il denaro - di integrare in modo fluido i token garantiti da riserve su blockchain. ### Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra suite di prodotti innovativi comprende la più attendibile stablecoin del mondo, USDT, utilizzata da centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme ai servizi di tokenizzazione di asset digitali pionieristici. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: La nostra soluzione per il potere ottimizza l'eccesso di potenza per il mining del Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture di ultima generazione e geo-diverse. Tether Data: La nostra soluzione per i dati riduce i costi di infrastruttura e migliora le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, il nostro app di bandiera che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicuri e privati. Tether Education: La nostra soluzione per l'istruzione democratizza l'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, volendo alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando il crescita e l'opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: Al confini tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i limiti di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui l'innovazione e le capacità umane si fondono in modi potenzi e inediti. Perché Unirti a Noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, che lavora a distanza da ogni angolo del mondo. Se sei appassionato di lasciare un segno nel settore fintech, questo è il tuo per collaborare con alcuni dei cervelli più brillanti, spingendo i limiti endo stabili nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, rimanendo snelli e abbiamo ottenuto il nostro posto come leader nell'industria. Se hai eccellenti abilità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire al più innovativo piattaforma del pianeta, Tether è il posto per te. Sei pronto a essere parte del futuro? #### Descrizione del Lavoro cerca un Marketing Project Manager altamente organizzato e proattivo per guidare l'esecuzione della funzione di design marketing. In questo ruolo, gestirai i flussi di lavoro per i designer, attenderai una definizione chiara dello scopo e allignerai le priorità con i team di prodotto e sviluppo. Gestirai come punto di riferimento centrale, dicendondo le richieste di prodotto in brevi chiari chiari e azioni, gestirai i tempi e le dipendenze e attendi una consegna di alta qualità e tempestiva. ### Requisitis - 3+ anni di esperienza in marketing project management, design operations o un ruolo simile - Esperienza nostra provata nel gestire flussi di lavoro di progettazione e coordinate team cross-funzionali - Successo mostrato nel guidare il lancio di siti web e prodotti digitali, compresa la stretta collaborazione con i team di design e sviluppo - Abilità organizzative forti con la capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente - Familiarità con piattaforme CMS e flussi di lavoro digitale Per proteggersi dai reclutamento truffa, si prega di tenere presente le seguenti informazioni: - Si prega di applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non usate terze o agenzie per la reclutamento a meno che non sia chiaramente indicato. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati sulla nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Verifica l'identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se sei incerto, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - Sii cauto con i metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non favoramo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutta la comunicazione viene fatta attraverso email ufficiali e piattaforme. - Controlla gli indirizzi. Tutta la comunicazione da parte nostra verrà da email che terminano con @ tether. a o @ tether. io - Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o pagamenti in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è uno schermo. Si prega di segnalarlo immediatamente.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Marketing Project Manager to drive execution across the marketing design function. In this role, you will manage workflows for designers, ensure clear scope definition, and align priorities with Product, and Development teams. You will act as the central point of coordination, translating product requirements into clear, actionable briefs, managing timelines and dependencies, and ensuring high-quality, on-time delivery. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, highly structured, and experienced in working with cross-functional, globally distributed teams on AI-driven software products or digital wallet solutions. Responsibilities Project & Workflow Management • Own and manage the end-to-end workflow for marketing design projects, from intake and scoping through delivery and launch • Define and document clear project scope, requirements, timelines, and deliverables for designers • Prioritize incoming requests in partnership with Product and Development teams, balancing urgency, impact, and capacity • Track progress, manage dependencies, and proactively identify risks or blockers • Ensure projects are delivered on time, on scope, and aligned with business objectives Cross-Functional Alignment • Serve as the primary liaison between Marketing, Product, and Development to ensure alignment on priorities and execution • Translate product and technical requirements into clear design and marketing briefs • Facilitate regular check-ins, reviews, and feedback loops to keep stakeholders aligned Digital & Website Execution • Oversee website launches and updates, including coordinating design, content, and development changes • Ensure accuracy, consistency, and brand alignment across digital touchpoints • Manage content updates across CMS, landing pages, and marketing platforms in collaboration with designers and developers Operational Support & Process Improvement • Establish and refine processes, templates, and tools to improve efficiency and clarity within the marketing design workflow • Maintain documentation for project tracking, status reporting, and post-launch reviews • Support campaign execution, events, and other marketing initiatives as needed • 3+ years of experience in marketing project management, design operations, or a similar role • Proven experience managing design workflows and coordinating cross-functional teams • Demonstrated success leading website and digital products launch, including close collaboration with design and development teams • Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously • Familiarity with CMS platforms and digital marketing workflows • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English • Experience working in a fully remote environment with global teams • Background in tech, finance, or infrastructure-related industries is a plus • Italian or Spanish fluency is a bonus Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Tether und die Bildung der Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir revolutionieren die globale Finanzwelt. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen - von Börsen und Portfolios bis hin zu Zahlungsverarbeitern und Geldautomaten - , Token mit Reserve auf Blockchain zu integrieren. ### Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: Unser Produktportfolio umfasst die zuverlässigste Stablecoin der Welt, USDT, die von Hunderten Millionen Menschen weltweit verwendet wird, zusammen mit den Pionierdiensten der Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Lösung für nachhaltige Energie optimiert die Überschussenergie für den Bitcoin-Mining mit umweltfreundlichen Methoden in modernen und geo-verteilten Strukturen. Tether Data: Unsere Lösung für Daten reduziert die Infrastrukturkosten und verbessert die globale Kommunikation mit fortschrittlichen Lösungen wie KEET, unserem Flaggschiff-App, die die sichere und private Datenverteilung neu definiert. Tether Education: Unsere Lösung für Bildung demokratisiert den Zugang zu hochwertigem digitalen Lernen, ermöglicht es Menschen, in digitalen und Gig-Ökonomien zu prosperieren und die globale Wachstum und die Möglichkeiten zu leiten. Tether Evolution: Am Grenzbereich zwischen Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drücken wir die Grenzen dessen, was möglich ist, indem wir einen Zukunft schaffen, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in neuen und mächtigen Wegen zusammenfließen. ### Warum dich uns anschließen? Unser Team ist eine globale Kraft aus Talenten, die von jedem Winkel der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn du begeistert bist, einen Spuren im FinTech-Sektor zu hinterlassen, ist dies dein Moment, um mit einigen der brillantesten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu sprengen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir haben schnell gewachsen, bleiben schlank und haben unseren Platz als Führer in der Industrie gesichert. Wenn du hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch hast und bereit bist, zum innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für dich. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu werden? ### Beschreibung der Arbeit Wir suchen einen hochorganisierten und proaktiven Marketing Project Manager, der die Ausführung der Marketing-Design-Funktion leitet. In dieser Rolle wirst du die Arbeitsabläufe für Designer leiten, eine klare Definition des Ziels sicherstellen und die Prioritäten mit den Produkt- und Entwicklungs-Teams abstimmen. Du wirst als zentraler Referenzpunkt agieren, die Produktanforderungen in klare und handhabbare Aktionen übersetzen, die Zeiträume und Abhängigkeiten verwalten und eine hochwertige und termingerechte Lieferung sicherstellen. ### Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in Marketing-Projektmanagement, Design-Operations oder einer ähnlichen Rolle - Erfahrung bei der Verwaltung von Design-Workflows und der Koordination von cross-funktionalen Teams - Erfolgreiche Erfahrung bei der Leitung der Einführung von Webseiten und digitalen Produkten, einschließlich der engen Zusammenarbeit mit den Design- und Entwicklungs-Teams - Starke Organisationsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu verwalten - Vertrautheit mit CMS-Plattformen und Marketing-Digital-Workflows - Hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch - Erfahrung bei der Arbeit in einem vollständig remote-Umfeld mit globalen Teams - Hintergrund im Technologie-, Finanz- oder Infrastruktur-Sektor ist ein Plus - Deutsch oder Spanisch fließend ist ein Bonus ### Was wir bieten - Die Möglichkeit, mit einem Team aus globalen Talenten zu arbeiten - Remote-Arbeitsumfeld - Erfahrung in der persönlichen und beruflichen Entwicklung - Die Möglichkeit, zu einem innovativen und verändernden Projekt beizutragen ### Kontakt Für weitere Informationen besuche unsere offizielle Website: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Um sich vor Betrugsversuchen zu schützen, beachte bitte die folgenden Informationen: - Bitte wende dich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine dritten Plattformen oder Agenturen, es sei denn, es ist klar angegeben. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Überprüfe die Identität des Rekrutierers. Alle unsere Rekrutierer haben verifizierte LinkedIn-Profil. Wenn du unsicher bist, kannst du ihre Identität überprüfen, indem du ihren Profil überprüfst oder uns über unsere Website kontaktierst. - Sei vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle E-Mails und Plattformen. - Überprüfe die E-Mail-Adressen. Alle Kommunikation von unserer Seite wird von E-Mails mit @tether.to oder @tether.io enden. - Wir werden nie Zahlungen oder finanzielle Informationen anfordern. Wenn jemand in irgendeiner Phase des Bewerbungsprozesses finanzielle Informationen anfordert oder Zahlungen verlangt, ist es ein Betrug. Bitte melde es sofort.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Tether et la Formation du Futur de la Finance Digitale Chez Tether, nous ne construisons pas seulement des produits, nous révolutionnons le monde financier. Nos solutions innovantes permettent aux entreprises - des bourses et des portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux machines à argent - d'intégrer des jetons garanties par des réserves sur blockchain de manière fluide. ### Innover avec Tether Tether Finance : Notre portefeuille de produits innovants comprend la stablecoin la plus fiable du monde, USDT, utilisée par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que les services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais c'est juste le début : Tether Power : Notre solution pour l'énergie durable optimise l'excès d'énergie pour le mining du Bitcoin en utilisant des méthodes écologiques dans des structures modernes et géo-diverses. Tether Data : Notre solution pour les données réduit les coûts d'infrastructure et améliore les communications mondiales avec des solutions innovantes comme KEET, notre application drapeau qui redéfinit la partage de données sécurisées et privées. Tether Education : Notre solution pour l'éducation démocratise l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, permettant aux personnes de prospérer dans les économies numériques et de gig, guidant la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : Au bord entre la technologie et le potentiel humain, nous poussons les limites de ce qui est possible, créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se fondent en nouvelles et puissantes manières. ### Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe? Notre équipe est une force de talent globale qui travaille à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné de laisser une empreinte dans le secteur fintech, c'est votre moment pour collaborer avec quelques-uns des cerveaux les plus brillants, pousser les limites et établir de nouveaux standards. Nous avons grandi rapidement, restons agiles et avons sécurisé notre place en leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez des compétences de communication exceptionnelles en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer au plus innovant platform du monde, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Soyez prêt à être partie du futur ? ### Description du travail Nous recherchons un Marketing Project Manager hautement organisé et proactif pour diriger l'exécution de la fonction de design marketing. Dans ce rôle, vous dirigerez les flux de travail pour les designers, assurerez une définition claire de l'objectif et allignerez les priorités avec les équipes de produit et de développement. Vous dirigerez comme point de référence central, traduisant les demandes de produit en actions claires et gérerez les temps et les dépendances et assurerez une livraison de haute qualité et ponctuelle. ### Exigences - 3+ ans d'expérience en marketing project management, design operations ou un rôle similaire - Expérience prouvée dans la gestion des flux de travail de design et la coordination des équipes cross-fonctionnelles - Succès démontré dans la conduite de la lancement de sites web et de produits numériques, y compris la collaboration étroite avec les équipes de design et de développement - Capacités organisationnelles fortes avec la capacité de gérer plusieurs projets simultanément - Familiarité avec les plateformes CMS et les flux de travail de marketing numérique - Compétences de communication exceptionnelles en anglais - Expérience dans la travail dans un environnement complètement remote avec des équipes mondiales - Arrière-plan dans le secteur technologique, financier ou infrastructurale est un plus - Français ou espagnol fluente est un bonus ### Ce que nous offrons - L'opportunité de travailler avec un équipe de talent global - Environnement de travail remote - Expérience de croissance et de développement professionnel - L'opportunité de contribuer à un projet innovant et de changement ### Contact Pour plus d'informations, visitez notre site web officiel : https://tether.recruitee.com/ Pour se protéger contre les escroqueries de recrutement, veuillez noter les informations suivantes : - Veuillez vous adresser uniquement par nos canaux officiels. Nous ne utilisons pas de plateformes tierces ou d'agences de recrutement, à moins qu'il ne soit clairement indiqué. Tous les postes ouverts sont listés sur notre page de carrière officielle : https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. Si vous êtes incertain, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site web. - Soyez prudent avec les méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens par WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute la communication se fait par des e-mails officiels et des plateformes. - Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute la communication de notre part sera envoyée par des e-mails qui se terminent par @tether.to ou @tether.io - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiements ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des informations financières personnelles ou des paiements à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est un piège. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job: 
 As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field.
 
 You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance.
 
 Responsibilities :
 
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.

• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.

• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.

• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.

• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.

 
 
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).

• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.

• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.

• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.

• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.

descriptionByLocale.it: Tether e la Rivoluzione del Finanza Digitale A Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. ## Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin del mondo, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme ai servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset pionieristici. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. # Perché Unirti a Noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, lavorando da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? ## Descrizione del lavoro Come membro del team di modelli AI, guiderai l'innovazione nello sviluppo dell'architettura per modelli all'avanguardia di varie scale, tra cui piccoli, grandi e sistemi multi-modali. Il vostro lavoro aumenterà l'intelligenza, migliorerà l'efficienza e introdurrà nuove capacità per far progredire il campo. ## Responsabilità - Condurre pre-training di modelli AI su grandi server equipaggiati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs. - Progettare, prototipare e scalare architetture innovative per migliorare l'intelligenza dei modelli. - Esegue esperimenti indipendentemente e in collaborazione, analizza i risultati e perfezionare le metodologie per un ottimo rendimento. - Investigare, debug e migliorare sia l'efficienza dei modelli che la prestazione computazionale. - Contribuire allo sviluppo di sistemi di formazione per garantire una scalabilità e un'efficienza senza problemi sulle piattaforme di destinazione. ## Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica o campo correlato. Ideale PhD in NLP, Machine Learning o campo correlato, accompagnato da un solido track record in AI R&D (con buone notizie in conferenze A*). - Esperienza pratica nel contributo a grandi scale LLM training run su grandi server suddivisati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs, scalabilità e avanzamenti significativi nel rendimento dei modelli. - Familiarità e esperienza con grandi scale, framework di training distribuito, librerie e strumenti. - Profonda conoscenza delle modifiche trasformatore all'avanguardia e non-transformer mirate a migliorare l'intelligenza, l'efficienza e la scalabilità. - Esperto forte in PyTorch e Hugging Face librerie con esperienza pratica nel sviluppo dei modelli, pretraining continuo e deploy.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job: As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field. You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance. Responsibilities : • Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs. • Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence. • Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance. • Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance. • Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms. • A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences). • Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance. • Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools. • Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability. • Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.
descriptionByLocale.de: Tether und die Revolution der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir revolutionieren die globale Finanzwelt. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen - von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsverarbeitern und Automaten - , reservierte Token auf verschiedenen Blockchain-Netzwerken zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether es Ihnen, digitale Token sofort, sicher und weltweit zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen, alles zu einem Bruchteil des Kosten. Transparenz ist das Fundament alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jeden einzelnen Handel zu gewährleisten. ## Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktlinie umfasst die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste stabilen Währung, USDT , die von Hunderten Millionen Menschen weltweit abgerufen wird, neben den Pionierleistungen in der Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Wir treiben nachhaltigen Wachstum an, indem wir unsere Energie-Lösungen optimieren, um überschüssige Energie für Bitcoin-Mining mit ökologischen Praktiken in hochmodernen, geo-diversen Anlagen zu nutzen. Tether Data: Wir fördern Durchbrüche in der KI und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie, indem wir die Infrastrukturkosten reduzieren und die globale Kommunikation mit fortschrittlichen Lösungen wie KEET , unserem Flaggschiff-App, die sichere und private Datenübertragung neu definiert. Tether Education : Wir demokratisieren den Zugang zu Spitzenleistungen in der digitalen Bildung, indem wir Einzelpersonen in der digitalen und Gig-Wirtschaft ermöglichen, zu gedeihen, globales Wachstum und Möglichkeiten zu treiben. Tether Evolution : Am Schnittpunkt von Technologie und menschlicher Potenzialität drücken wir die Grenzen dessen, was möglich ist, aus, indem wir eine Zukunft schaffen, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in mächtigen, unvorhergesehenen Weisen zusammenkommen. ## Warum dich uns anschließen? Unsere Mannschaft ist ein globales Talent-Übermacht, das von jedem Winkel der Welt aus remote arbeitet. Wenn du dich leidenschaftlich für die Fintech-Szene einsetzt, ist dies deine Chance, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überwinden und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir haben schnell gewachsen, geblieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Führer in der Branche. Wenn du ausgezeichnete Englisch-Kommunikationsfähigkeiten hast und bereit bist, zum innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für dich. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? ## Beschreibung der Arbeit Als Mitglied des AI-Modellteams wirst du Innovationen in der Architekturentwicklung für fortschrittliche Modelle verschiedener Skalen, einschließlich kleiner, großer und multimodaler Systeme, treiben. Deine Arbeit wird Intelligenz verbessern, Effizienz verbessern und neue Fähigkeiten einführen, um das Feld voranzutreiben. ## Aufgaben - Durchführen von Vortrainings von AI-Modellen auf großen verteilten Servern mit Tausenden von NVIDIA-GPUs. - Entwerfen, Prototypen und skalieren von innovativen Architekturen, um die Intelligenz der Modelle zu verbessern. - Durchführen von Experimenten, unabhängig und in Zusammenarbeit, Analysieren der Ergebnisse und verbessern die Methoden für eine optimale Leistung. - Untersuchen, debuggen und verbessern sowohl die Effizienz der Modelle als auch die Rechenleistung. - Beiträge zum Entwickeln von Trainingsystemen, um eine Skalierbarkeit und Effizienz ohne Probleme auf den Zielplattformen zu gewährleisten. ## Anforderungen - Abschluss in Informatik oder einem verwandten Fach. Idealerweise PhD in NLP, Machine Learning oder einem verwandten Fach, begleitet von einem soliden Track-Record in AI-Forschung (mit guten Veröffentlichungen in A*-Konferenzen). - Praktische Erfahrung bei der Beiträgen zu großen Skalen LLM-Trainingsläufen auf großen verteilten Servern mit Tausenden von NVIDIA-GPUs, um Skalierbarkeit und bedeutende Fortschritte im Modellrenden zu gewährleisten. - Vertrautheit und praktische Erfahrung mit großen Skalen, verteilten Trainingsframeworks, Bibliotheken und Werkzeugen. - Tiefes Verständnis der state-of-the-art-Änderungen von Transformer und nicht-Transformer, die darauf abzielen, Intelligenz, Effizienz und Skalierbarkeit zu verbessern. - Starkes Experte in PyTorch und Hugging Face Bibliotheken mit praktischer Erfahrung im Modellentwicklung, kontinuierlichem Vortrainieren und Deployment.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Tether et la révolution de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne construisons pas seulement des produits, nous révolutionnons le monde financier global. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises - des bourses et des portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques - d'intégrer des jetons réservés sur plusieurs réseaux de blockchain. En utilisant la technologie de la blockchain, Tether permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, de manière sécurisée et mondiale, à un coût fractionnaire. La transparence est la pierre angulaire de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. ## Innover avec Tether Tether Finance : Notre gamme de produits innovants comprend la monnaie stable la plus fiable au monde, USDT , utilisée par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services de tokenisation de valeurs numériques pionnières. Mais c'est juste le début : Tether Power : Nous poussons le développement durable en optimisant nos solutions d'énergie pour le minage de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations de pointe et diversifiées géographiquement. Tether Data : Nous favorisons les avancées en intelligence artificielle et en technologie de peer-to-peer en réduisant les coûts d'infrastructure et en améliorant les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application d'icône qui redéfinit la partage de données sécurisée et privée. Tether Education : Nous démocratisons l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau en permettant aux individus de prospérer dans les économies numériques et de la gig, en promouvant le développement global et les opportunités. Tether Evolution : Au carrefour de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous poussons les limites de ce qui est possible, en créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se mélangent de manière puissante et inattendue. ## Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe ? Notre équipe est une puissance de talent mondiale, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par l'espace fintech, c'est votre chance de collaborer avec quelques-uns des esprits les plus brillants, de dépasser les limites et de fixer de nouveaux standards. Nous avons grandi rapidement, resté léger et sécurisé notre place en tant que leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez des compétences de communication en anglais exceptionnelles et que vous êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante du monde, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à être partie de l'avenir ? ## Description du travail En tant que membre de l'équipe de modèles d'intelligence artificielle, vous conduirez l'innovation dans le développement d'architecture pour des modèles de pointe de différentes échelles, y compris des petits, grands et des systèmes multimodaux. Votre travail améliorera l'intelligence, l'efficacité et introduira de nouvelles capacités pour avancer le domaine. ## Tâches - Effectuer des pré-entraînements de modèles d'intelligence artificielle sur des serveurs distribués importants équipés de milliers de GPU NVIDIA. - Concevoir, prototyper et échelonner des architectures innovantes pour améliorer l'intelligence des modèles. - Effectuer des expériences indépendantes et en collaboration, analyser les résultats et améliorer les méthodes pour une performance optimale. - Investiguer, déboguer et améliorer à la fois l'efficacité des modèles et la performance informatique. - Contribuer au développement de systèmes de formation pour garantir une scalabilité et une efficacité sans problème sur les plateformes cibles. ## Exigences - Diplôme en informatique ou un domaine connexe. Idéal : PhD en NLP, Machine Learning ou un domaine connexe, accompagné d'un solide historique de recherche en intelligence artificielle (avec de bonnes publications dans des conférences A*). - Expérience pratique dans la contribution à des entraînements de grandes échelles LLM sur des serveurs distribués importants équipés de milliers de GPU NVIDIA, garantissant une scalabilité et des progrès significatifs dans la performance des modèles. - Familiarité et expérience pratique avec des grandes échelles, des frameworks de formation distribués, des bibliothèques et des outils. - Connaissance approfondie des modifications state-of-the-art transformer et non-transformer visant à améliorer l'intelligence, l'efficacité et la scalabilité. - Expert en PyTorch et Hugging Face bibliothèques avec expérience pratique dans le développement de modèles, le pré-entraînement continu et le déploiement.

jobs.title: Account and Project Manager (100% Remote)

titleByLocale.it: Account e Project Manager (100% da remoto)
titleByLocale.fr: Account and Project Manager (100% Remote)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, we are seeking a highly organized and strategically minded Account Manager to oversee complex, cross-functional initiatives involving digital wallets and payments, asset tokenization, P2P technologies, and decentralized AI. The role combines client engagement, project governance, and multi-stakeholder coordination across external companies, government entities, and internal teams. 
 This position is pivotal in ensuring timely delivery of strategic programs, maintaining alignment between stakeholders, and supporting the deployment of transformational technologies in a fast-paced, regulated environment. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Client & Partner Engagement 
 
• Act as the primary point of contact for clients and institutional partners, ensuring consistent communication, expectation management, and long-term relationship building. 

• Coordinate with external companies providing payment and exchange services, government institutions, and technology vendors. 

• Liaise with Expansion team to support the definition of collaboration opportunities across sectors. 

• Identify cross-initiative opportunities to introduce and leverage multiple Tether technologies 

 Project Governance & Delivery Oversight 
 
• Oversee implementation progress led by Product Managers and ensure alignment with contractual terms, expectations, and delivery timelines. 

• Maintain governance frameworks including meeting notes, action logs, risk registers, and decision records. 

• Drive accountability by ensuring tasks, responsibilities, and milestones are clearly tracked and documented. 

• Support escalation management to Head of Technology Distribution and ensure timely resolution of operational or strategic issues. 

 Cross-Team and Stakeholders Coordination 
 
• Facilitate information flow between internal product, engineering, legal/compliance, marketing and operations teams. 

• Maintain dashboards and executive reports summarizing status, risks, and next steps. 

• Engage and maintain relationships with external companies involved in the initiative at all levels 

 

 
• 5+ years of experience in account management, program coordination, or project governance within technology, fintech, or consulting environments. 

• Experience in overseeing implementation of advanced tech solutions 

• Skilled at leading complex, preferably international, projects 

• Proven ability to engage with corporate and government stakeholders at multiple levels. 

• Understanding of digital assets, blockchain, or financial technology ecosystems will be an asset 

• Excellent communication, documentation, and analytical skills. 

• Strong sense of ownership, initiative, and ability to operate in a fast-paced, evolving environment. 

• English is a must, any other language a plus 

• Crypto/blockchain/AI sourcing and vendor management expertise is an advantage 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
