jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The role involves working in a dynamic environment with a diverse team of senior backend developers, product managers and leadership to build crypto wallet solutions . The applications are meant to be high performance, light-weight and highly intuitive to cater to a variety of audiences. 
 You will be working on developing cutting edge mobile applications integrating crypto wallets and defi features. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Development: Design and build advanced and secure cross platform applications for the [iOS/Android] platform using React Native. Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure applications are visually appealing and intuitive. 

• Integration: Work closely with backend developers and integrate Javascript SDKs, libraries, and backend services into mobile applications. 

• Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver innovative solutions. 

 
 Mandatory 
 
• 3+ years of experience with React , React-Native (mainly around Expo) , Redux and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+ . 

• Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile development . 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools . 

• Experienced with Native modules (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs . 

• Experience in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) or Kotlin/Java (Android) for low level implementation. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. ## Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme ai servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. ## Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, lavorando da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? ## About the job Il ruolo consiste nel lavorare in un ambiente dinamico con un team diversificato di sviluppatori senior backend, product manager e leadership per costruire soluzioni di portafoglio cripto . Le applicazioni sono destinate ad essere ad alte prestazioni, leggero e altamente intuitivo per soddisfare una varietà di pubblico. Si lavorerà sullo sviluppo di applicazioni mobili all'avanguardia che integrano portafogli cripto e funzioni defi. ## Responsabilità - Sviluppo: Progettazione e costruzione di applicazioni avanzate e sicure della piattaforma trasversale per la piattaforma [iOS/Android] utilizzando React Native. Collabora con i designer UI/UX per garantire che le applicazioni siano visivamente attraenti e intuitive. - Integrazione: Lavorare a stretto contatto con gli sviluppatori backend e integrare Javascript SDK, librerie e servizi backend in applicazioni mobili. - Collaborazione: Collabora con product manager, designer e altri sviluppatori per fornire soluzioni innovative. ## Mandatory - 3+ anni di esperienza con React , React-Native (principalmente intorno a Expo) , Redux e i principi fondamentali che circondano questi. - Esperienza con i moduli nativi (C++) , WebSockets, API basate su RESTful . - Esperienza in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) o Kotlin/Java (Android) per l'implementazione a basso livello. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Truppe di reclutamento sono diventati sempre piÃ1 comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: - Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - No. Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. - Doppio indirizzo email. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether. io - Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalarlo immediatamente. - No. Quando in dubbio, non esitate a raggiungere il nostro sito ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job The role involves working in a dynamic environment with a diverse team of senior backend developers, product managers and leadership to build crypto wallet solutions . The applications are meant to be high performance, light-weight and highly intuitive to cater to a variety of audiences. You will be working on developing cutting edge mobile applications integrating crypto wallets and defi features. Responsibilities • Development: Design and build advanced and secure cross platform applications for the [iOS/Android] platform using React Native. Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure applications are visually appealing and intuitive. • Integration: Work closely with backend developers and integrate Javascript SDKs, libraries, and backend services into mobile applications. • Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver innovative solutions. Mandatory • 3+ years of experience with React , React-Native (mainly around Expo) , Redux and the core principles surrounding these. • Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+ . • Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile development . • Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools . • Experienced with Native modules (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs . • Experience in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) or Kotlin/Java (Android) for low level implementation. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Treten Sie Tether bei und gestalten Sie die Zukunft des digitalen Finanzwesens. Bei Tether entwickeln wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Vorreiter einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten –, rücklagegesicherte Token nahtlos über Blockchains hinweg zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistungsfähigkeit der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Ihnen Tether das sofortige, sichere und globale Speichern, Senden und Empfangen digitaler Token – und das alles zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten. Transparenz ist die Grundlage unseres Handelns und gewährleistet Vertrauen bei jeder Transaktion. ## Innovation mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktsuite umfasst den vertrauenswürdigsten Stablecoin der Welt, USDT, auf den sich Hunderte Millionen Menschen auf der ganzen Welt verlassen, sowie bahnbrechende Dienste zur Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Energielösungen fördern nachhaltiges Wachstum und optimieren überschüssigen Strom für das Bitcoin-Mining durch umweltfreundliche Praktiken in hochmodernen, geografisch vielfältigen Anlagen. Tether Data: Wir treiben Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie voran, senken Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education: Durch die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalen Lernen ermöglichen wir Einzelpersonen, in der Digital- und Gig-Wirtschaft erfolgreich zu sein und so globales Wachstum und Chancen voranzutreiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial verschieben wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. ## Warum bei uns mitmachen? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von überall auf der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn es Ihnen am Herzen liegt, sich im Fintech-Bereich einen Namen zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überschreiten und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, schlank geblieben und haben uns unseren Platz als Branchenführer gesichert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse verfügen und bereit sind, einen Beitrag zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt zu leisten, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? ## Über den Job Die Rolle beinhaltet die Arbeit in einem dynamischen Umfeld mit einem vielfältigen Team aus erfahrenen Backend-Entwicklern, Produktmanagern und Führungskräften, um Krypto-Wallet-Lösungen zu entwickeln. Die Anwendungen sollen leistungsstark, leichtgewichtig und äußerst intuitiv sein, um eine Vielzahl von Zielgruppen anzusprechen. Sie werden an der Entwicklung modernster mobiler Anwendungen arbeiten, die Krypto-Wallets und Defi-Funktionen integrieren. ## Verantwortlichkeiten – Entwicklung: Entwerfen und erstellen Sie fortschrittliche und sichere plattformübergreifende Anwendungen für die [iOS/Android]-Plattform mit React Native. Arbeiten Sie mit UI/UX-Designern zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass Anwendungen optisch ansprechend und intuitiv sind. - Integration: Arbeiten Sie eng mit Backend-Entwicklern zusammen und integrieren Sie Javascript-SDKs, Bibliotheken und Backend-Dienste in mobile Anwendungen. - Zusammenarbeit: Arbeiten Sie mit Produktmanagern, Designern und anderen Entwicklern zusammen, um innovative Lösungen zu liefern. ## Obligatorisch – 3+ Jahre Erfahrung mit React, React-Native (hauptsächlich rund um die Expo), Redux und den damit verbundenen Grundprinzipien. - Sehr gute Kenntnisse in JavaScript und ES6+. - Erfahrung mit CI/CD-Pipelines für die mobile Entwicklung. - Vertraut mit modernen Front-End-Pipelines und -Tools. - Erfahrung mit nativen Modulen (C++), WebSockets und RESTful-basierten APIs. - Erfahrung in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) oder Kotlin/Java (Android) für Low-Level-Implementierung. ## Wichtige Informationen für Kandidaten: Betrug bei der Personalbeschaffung kommt immer häufiger vor. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes, wenn Sie sich auf Stellen bewerben: - Bewerben Sie sich ausschließlich über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen für die Rekrutierung keine Plattformen oder Agenturen Dritter, sofern dies nicht ausdrücklich angegeben ist. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ – Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Personalvermittlers. Alle unsere Personalvermittler verfügen über verifizierte LinkedIn-Profile. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. - Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Die gesamte Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle E-Mails und Plattformen des Unternehmens. - Überprüfen Sie die E-Mail-Adressen noch einmal. Die gesamte Kommunikation von uns erfolgt über E-Mails, die auf @tether.to oder @tether.io enden. Wir werden niemals nach Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten fragen. Wenn jemand zu irgendeinem Zeitpunkt während des Einstellungsprozesses nach persönlichen Finanzinformationen oder Zahlungen fragt, handelt es sich um Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es umgehend. - Im Zweifelsfall können Sie sich gerne über unsere offizielle Website an uns wenden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance Chez Tether, nous ne sommes pas seulement des produits de construction, nous sommes pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises, depuis les échanges et les portefeuilles jusqu'aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets, d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans toutes les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, assurant la confiance dans chaque transaction. ## Innover avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants dispose de la plus fiable écurie du monde, USDT, sur laquelle s'appuient des centaines de millions de monde entier, ainsi que des services de tokenisation numériques pionniers. Mais ce n'est que le début : Tether Power : Pour une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations géo-diverses à la fine pointe de la technologie. Tether Data: En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie pair à pair, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : Démocratiser l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous autonomisons les individus à prospérer dans les économies numériques et de concerts, moteur de la croissance mondiale et des opportunités. L'évolution de l'approche : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par la marque dans l'espace fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les frontières et de fixer de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés maigres et nous avons obtenu notre place de leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? ## À propos du travail Le rôle consiste à travailler dans un environnement dynamique avec une équipe diversifiée de développeurs seniors, de gestionnaires de produits et de leadership pour construire des solutions de portefeuille crypto . Les applications sont conçues pour être haute performance, légère et très intuitive pour répondre à une variété de publics. Vous travaillerez sur le développement d'applications mobiles de pointe intégrant portefeuilles crypto et fonctionnalités de défi. ## Responsabilités - Développement: Concevoir et construire des applications cross plate-forme avancées et sécurisées pour la plate-forme [iOS/Android] en utilisant React Native. Collaborer avec les concepteurs de l'interface utilisateur/UX pour s'assurer que les applications sont visuellement attrayantes et intuitives. - Intégration : Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les développeurs de backend et intégrer les SDK Javascript, les bibliothèques et les services backend dans les applications mobiles. - Collaboration : Collaborez avec les responsables de produits, les concepteurs et d'autres développeurs pour proposer des solutions innovantes. ## Obligatoire - 3+ ans d'expérience avec React , React-Native (principalement autour d'Expo), Redux et les principes de base qui les entourent. - Très compétent en JavaScript et ES6+ . - Expérience avec les pipelines CI/CD pour le développement mobile . - Familiariser avec les pipelines et les outils front-end modernes . - Expérience avec les modules natifs (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs . - Expérience en Swift/Objective-C (iOS) ou Kotlin/Java (Android) pour l'implémentation de bas niveau. ## Information importante pour les candidats Les escroqueries de recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit ce qui suit lorsque vous postulez pour des rôles : - Appliquer uniquement par le biais de nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plates-formes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement à moins d'indication claire. Tous les rôles ouverts sont listés sur notre page de carrière officielle : https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Vérifier l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont vérifié les profils LinkedIn. Si vous n'êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. - Oui. Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entrevues sur WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute communication se fait au moyen de courriels et de plateformes officiels de l'entreprise. - Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute communication de nous viendra de courriels se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ sether. io - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des renseignements financiers personnels ou un paiement à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est une escroquerie. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. - Oui. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à contacter notre site officiel.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job: 
 As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field.
 
 You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance.
 
 Responsibilities :
 
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.

• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.

• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.

• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.

• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.

 
 
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).

• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.

• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.

• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.

• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.

descriptionByLocale.it: Tether e la Rivoluzione della Finanza Digitale Noi di Tether non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare perfettamente token garantiti da riserve attraverso blockchain. Sfruttando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti consente di archiviare, inviare e ricevere token digitali in modo istantaneo, sicuro e globale, il tutto a una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è il fondamento di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. ## Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: la nostra innovativa suite di prodotti comprende la stablecoin più affidabile al mondo, USDT, su cui fanno affidamento centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi pionieristici di tokenizzazione delle risorse digitali. Ma questo è solo l’inizio: Tether Power: guidando la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l’energia in eccesso per l’estrazione di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture all’avanguardia e geodiversificate. Tether Data: alimentando innovazioni nell'intelligenza artificiale e nella tecnologia peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi dell'infrastruttura e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione sicura e privata dei dati. Tether Education: democratizzando l’accesso all’apprendimento digitale di alto livello, consentiamo alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig economy, guidando la crescita e le opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: all'intersezione tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. ##Perché Unirti a Noi? Il nostro team è una potenza globale di talenti, che lavora in remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se la tua passione è lasciare il segno nel settore fintech, questa è la tua occasione per collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo oltre i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, siamo rimasti snelli e ci siamo assicurati il ​​posto di leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti capacità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto che fa per te. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? ## Descrizione del Lavoro In qualità di membro del team del modello AI, guiderai l'innovazione nello sviluppo dell'architettura per modelli all'avanguardia di varie scale, inclusi sistemi piccoli, grandi e multimodali. Il tuo lavoro migliorerà l'intelligenza, migliorerà l'efficienza e introdurrà nuove capacità per far avanzare il campo. ## Responsabilità - Condurre pre-training di modelli AI su grandi server distribuiti equipaggiati con migliaia di GPU NVIDIA. - Progettare, prototipare e scalare architetture innovative per migliorare l'intelligenza dei modelli. - Eseguire esperimenti indipendentemente e in collaborazione, analizzare i risultati e perfezionare le metodologie per un ottimo rendimento. - Investigare, debuggare e migliorare sia l'efficienza dei modelli che la prestazione computazionale. - Contribuire allo sviluppo di sistemi di formazione per garantire una scalabilità e un'efficienza senza problemi sulle piattaforme di destinazione. ## Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica o campo correlato. Ideale PhD in NLP, Machine Learning o campo correlato, accompagnato da un solido track record in AI R&D (con buone pubblicazioni in conferenze A*). - Esperienza pratica nel contribuire a una formazione LLM su larga scala su grandi server distribuiti equipaggiati con migliaia di GPU NVIDIA, garantendo scalabilità e avanzamenti significativi nel rendimento dei modelli. - Familiarità e esperienza pratica con grandi scale, framework di formazione distribuito, librerie e strumenti. - Profonda conoscenza delle modifiche state-of-the-art Transformer e Non-Transformer mirate a migliorare l'intelligenza, l'efficienza e la scalabilità. - Esperto forte nelle librerie PyTorch e Hugging Face con esperienza pratica nello sviluppo dei modelli, pretraining continuo e deploy.

Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences). • Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance. • Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools. • Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability. • Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.
descriptionByLocale.de: Tether e la Rivoluzione del Finanza Digitale Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Pionier einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen befähigen Unternehmen – von Börsen und Geldbörsen bis zu Zahlungsprozessoren und Geldautomaten –, über Blockchains lückenlos recycelte Token zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist der Grundstein für alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jede Transaktion zu gewährleisten. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite verfügt über die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stallmünze, USDT, die von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit begehrt wird, zusammen mit wegweisenden digitalen Asset-Tokenization Services. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Fahren Sie nachhaltiges Wachstum, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Leistung für Bitcoin Bergbau mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiverse Anlagen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie reduzieren wir die Infrastrukturkosten und erhöhen die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und gig-Wirtschaften zu leben, das globale Wachstum und die Chance zu treiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drängen wir die Grenzen von dem, was möglich ist, und schaffen eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in mächtigen, beispiellosen Weisen verschmelzen. Perché Unirti a Noi? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von jeder Ecke der Welt entfernt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran sind, eine Marke im Fintech-Raum zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zu kooperieren, Grenzen zu drängen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, blieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Marktführer in der Branche. Wenn Sie hervorragende englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten haben und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform auf dem Planeten beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Beschreibung von Lavoro Als Mitglied des AI-Modellteams treiben Sie Innovationen in der Architekturentwicklung für innovative Modelle verschiedener Skalen, darunter kleine, große und multimodale Systeme. Ihre Arbeit wird die Intelligenz verbessern, die Effizienz verbessern und neue Fähigkeiten einführen, um das Feld voranzutreiben. Responsabilità - Condurre pre-training di modelli AI su grandi server distribuiti armaggiati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs. - Progettare, prototipare e scalare architetture innovativ per migliorare l'intelligenza dei modelli. - Eseguire esperimenti indipendentemente e in collaborazione, analizzare i risultati e perfezionare le metodologie per un ottimo rendimento. - Investigare, debug e migliorare sia l'efficienza dei modelli che la prestazione computazionale. - Allo sviluppo di sistemi di training per garantire una scalabilità e un'efficienza senza problemi sulle piattaforme di destinazione. Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica o campo correlato. Ideale PhD in NLP, Machine Learning o campo correlato, accompagnato da un solido track record in AI R&D (con buone pubblicazioni in conferenze A*). - Esperienza pratica nel trägt ein grandi scale LLM-Training läuft su grandi server distribuiti stattaggiati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs, garantendo scalabilità e avanzamenti significativi nel rendimento dei modelli. - Familiarità e esperienza pratica con grandi scale, framework di training distribuito, librerie e strumenti. - Profonda conoscenza delle modifiche moderner Transformator e non-transformer mirate a migliorare l'intelligenza, l'efficienza e la scalabilità. - Esperto forte in PyTorch e Hugging Face librarys con esperienza pratica nel sviluppo dei modelli, pretraining continuo eploy.

Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises, depuis les échanges et les portefeuilles jusqu'aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets, d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans toutes les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, le tout à une fraction du coût. Mais ce n'est que le début : Tether Power : Pour une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations géo-diverses à la fine pointe de la technologie. L'évolution de l'approche : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Unirti a Noi ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? Descrizione del Lavoro En tant que membre de l'équipe modèle d'IA, vous piloterez l'innovation dans le développement de l'architecture pour des modèles de pointe de différentes échelles, y compris les petits, grands et multimodaux. Votre travail permettra d'améliorer l'intelligence, d'améliorer l'efficacité et d'introduire de nouvelles capacités pour faire progresser le terrain. ## Responsabilità - Condurre pré-formation di modelli AI su grandi server distribuiti equipaggioati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs. - Progettare, prototipare e scalare architecture innovative per migliorare l'intelligenza dei modelli. - Eseguire esperimenti indipendentemente e in collaborazione, analizzare i risultati e perfezionare le metodologie per un ottimo rendimento. - Investigare, debug e migliorare sia l'efficacité dei modelli che la prestazione computazione. - Contribuer allo sviluppo di sistemi di training per garantie una scalabilità e un'efficienza senza problemi sulle piattaforme di destinazione. ## Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica o campo correlato. titleByLocale.de: Technical Product Manager - Hadron (100% Remote - Worldwide)
titleByLocale.fr: Technical Product Manager - Hadron (100% Remote - Worldwide)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job
 
 The Senior Technical Product Manager will be responsible for the overall product leadership of Hadron, including product vision, roadmap definition, and delivery execution. 
 The role serves as the single point of accountability for the platform to serve institutional client needs, engineering delivery, and regulatory/compliance requirements. 
 Unlike a traditional Product Manager role, this position requires clear decision-making authority to: 
 
• Set and enforce roadmap priorities, including pushing back on non-essential requests. 

• Coordinate with external engineering partners and maintain scope discipline. 

• Resolve conflicts between client requests, technical feasibility, and compliance constraints. 

• Make go/no-go decisions on integrations, product features, and releases. 

• Ensure product development aligns with the long-term architecture and scalability of the Hadron platform.
 

 Critical Context 
 Hadron serves institutional clients globally with diverse and often conflicting tokenization requirements, including different asset classes, blockchain networks, compliance frameworks, and distribution models. 
 The Product Manager must manage this complexity by maintaining a clear product strategy, prioritizing ruthlessly, and preventing scope creep. The role requires strong ownership and the ability to make difficult prioritization decisions in a fast-moving institutional environment.
 
 Reporting & Collaboration 
 Reports to: VP Product 
 The Product Manager works in close partnership with the Head of Expansion & Product Advisor for Hadron to ensure strong alignment between institutional client demand, market opportunities, and the Hadron product roadmap. 
 Head of Expansion & Product Advisor provides continuous market feedback based on institutional client engagements and strategic partnerships, ensuring that product development reflects real market demand. 
 The Product Manager is responsible for translating these inputs into product priorities, roadmap decisions, and engineering execution. 
 Major roadmap initiatives, client-driven feature requests, and new integrations are expected to be aligned between the Product Manager and the Head of Expansion & Product Advisor before implementation. 
 
 The Ideal Candidate 
 We are specifically looking for candidates who have operated at a senior level and can demonstrate deep, hands-on exposure to tokenization and traditional financial infrastructure. You should be able to recognise yourself in most of the following: 
 
 Tokenization, end-to-end 
 
• You have personally built, shipped, or owned a tokenization product — from asset onboarding and smart contract specification through to custody integration, investor cap table management, and secondary transfer mechanics. 

• You can walk through the full token lifecycle (issuance, transfer, redemption, corporate actions, burn) without needing to look anything up, and you understand the tradeoffs between different implementation approaches. 

• You understand custody models: the difference between self-custody, qualified custodian models, omnibus vs. segregated wallet structures, and what each means for compliance and operational risk. 

• You have practical knowledge of on-chain settlement mechanics and how they interact with traditional T+1/T+2 settlement rails (DTCC, Euroclear, SWIFT). 

• You are fluent in token standards across multiple chains and understand when to reach for ERC-20, ERC-1400, or proprietary structures, and why. 

 TradFi depth 
 
• You have a strong grasp of how institutional financial infrastructure works: how funds are structured and administered, how broker-dealers clear and settle, how banks manage trust and custody relationships, and how prime brokerage operates. 

• You understand the instruments being tokenized: money market funds, bonds, structured credit, equities, real estate, commodities including how each is priced, transferred, and serviced in the traditional world. 

• You are comfortable with regulatory frameworks relevant to tokenized assets such as MiCA, Reg D/S, MAS MAS notice, VARA and can identify the compliance constraints that must be encoded into product design. 

• You can read and rapidly interpret institutional documents: RFPs, term sheets, custody agreements, and due diligence questionnaires, and translate them into product requirements without extensive hand-holding. 

 Institutional demand, rapid translation 
 
• You have worked directly with institutional clients such as asset managers, banks, sovereign funds, family offices as the primary product owner, and you know how to manage their expectations and extract signals from noise. 

• You can hear a new institutional use case or a complex integration requirement and rapidly assess feasibility, scope, and priority, without needing days to research the basics. 

• You have experience distinguishing between requests that reveal genuine product gaps and those that are bespoke client customisations and you know how to handle both without derailing the roadmap. 

 
 Key Responsibilities
 
 Product Strategy & Roadmap 
 
• Define and maintain the Hadron product roadmap. 

• Prioritize product initiatives based on market demand, technical feasibility, and business impact. 

• Maintain a clear product vision for Hadron across multiple asset classes and blockchain networks. 

• Ensure long-term platform scalability and product coherence. 

 Product Development & Delivery 
 
• Translate business and market needs into clear product requirements. 

• Maintain the product backlog and development priorities. 

• Coordinate development cycles and feature releases. 

• Ensure timely delivery of roadmap milestones. 

 Engineering Coordination 
 
• Act as the primary interface between product and engineering. 

• Coordinate development work with internal engineers and external technology partners. 

• Maintain clear documentation of product features, APIs, and platform capabilities. 

• Track platform performance, bugs, and technical improvements. 

 Client & Integration Feedback 
 
• Collect and structure feedback from institutional clients and internal teams. 

• Identify recurring integration challenges and translate them into product improvements. 

• Improve onboarding workflows and developer experience. 

 

 
• 5+ years of experience in product management or product ownership, with at least 3 years in digital assets, tokenization, or financial infrastructure. 

 
• Demonstrated hands-on experience shipping a tokenization or RWA product, with accountability for the full token lifecycle. 

• Deep, working knowledge of TradFi capital markets infrastructure including settlement, custody, clearing, fund structures. 

• Proven ability to rapidly parse institutional requirements and translate them into actionable product decisions. 

• Experience managing external engineering partners and enforcing scope discipline across complex, multi-stakeholder programmes. 

• Regulatory literacy across at least two major tokenization frameworks (MiCA, MAS, SEC, VARA, or equivalent). 

• Excellent written and spoken English. Able to author crisp product specs, client-facing documentation, and executive summaries. 

 
 Nice to have: 
 
• Prior experience at a bank, asset manager, custodian, or regulated fintech in a product, technology, or markets role. 

• Hands-on experience with multiple token standards and blockchain networks in a production context. 

• Experience designing or integrating with custody APIs, transfer agent systems, or fund administration platforms. 

• Understanding of on-chain compliance mechanisms: whitelisting, transfer restrictions, KYC/AML hooks at the smart contract level. 

• Exposure to multi-chain deployment strategies and the tradeoffs between L1, L2, and permissioned chain environments. 

• Experience with institutional client onboarding workflows in a regulated context. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Unlike a traditional Product Manager role, this position requires clear decision-making authority to: • Set and enforce roadmap priorities, including pushing back on non-essential requests. • Coordinate with external engineering partners and maintain scope discipline. • Resolve conflicts between client requests, technical feasibility, and compliance constraints. • Make go/no-go decisions on integrations, product features, and releases. • Ensure product development aligns with the long-term architecture and scalability of the Hadron platform. Critical Context Hadron serves institutional clients globally with diverse and often conflicting tokenization requirements, including different asset classes, blockchain networks, compliance frameworks, and distribution models. The Product Manager must manage this complexity by maintaining a clear product strategy, prioritizing ruthlessly, and preventing scope creep. The role requires strong ownership and the ability to make difficult prioritization decisions in a fast-moving institutional environment. Reporting & Collaboration Reports to: VP Product The Product Manager works in close partnership with the Head of Expansion & Product Advisor for Hadron to ensure strong alignment between institutional client demand, market opportunities, and the Hadron product roadmap. Head of Expansion & Product Advisor provides continuous market feedback based on institutional client engagements and strategic partnerships, ensuring that product development reflects real market demand. The Product Manager is responsible for translating these inputs into product priorities, roadmap decisions, and engineering execution. Major roadmap initiatives, client-driven feature requests, and new integrations are expected to be aligned between the Product Manager and the Head of Expansion & Product Advisor before implementation. The Ideal Candidate We are specifically looking for candidates who have operated at a senior level and can demonstrate deep, hands-on exposure to tokenization and traditional financial infrastructure. You should be able to recognise yourself in most of the following: Tokenization, end-to-end • You have personally built, shipped, or owned a tokenization product — from asset onboarding and smart contract specification through to custody integration, investor cap table management, and secondary transfer mechanics. • You can walk through the full token lifecycle (issuance, transfer, redemption, corporate actions, burn) without needing to look anything up, and you understand the tradeoffs between different implementation approaches. • You understand custody models: the difference between self-custody, qualified custodian models, omnibus vs. segregated wallet structures, and what each means for compliance and operational risk. • You have practical knowledge of on-chain settlement mechanics and how they interact with traditional T+1/T+2 settlement rails (DTCC, Euroclear, SWIFT). • You are fluent in token standards across multiple chains and understand when to reach for ERC-20, ERC-1400, or proprietary structures, and why. TradFi depth • You have a strong grasp of how institutional financial infrastructure works: how funds are structured and administered, how broker-dealers clear and settle, how banks manage trust and custody relationships, and how prime brokerage operates. • You understand the instruments being tokenized: money market funds, bonds, structured credit, equities, real estate, commodities including how each is priced, transferred, and serviced in the traditional world. • You are comfortable with regulatory frameworks relevant to tokenized assets such as MiCA, Reg D/S, MAS MAS notice, VARA and can identify the compliance constraints that must be encoded into product design. • You can read and rapidly interpret institutional documents: RFPs, term sheets, custody agreements, and due diligence questionnaires, and translate them into product requirements without extensive hand-holding. Institutional demand, rapid translation • You have worked directly with institutional clients such as asset managers, banks, sovereign funds, family offices as the primary product owner, and you know how to manage their expectations and extract signals from noise. • You can hear a new institutional use case or a complex integration requirement and rapidly assess feasibility, scope, and priority, without needing days to research the basics. • You have experience distinguishing between requests that reveal genuine product gaps and those that are bespoke client customisations and you know how to handle both without derailing the roadmap. Key Responsibilities Product Strategy & Roadmap • Define and maintain the Hadron product roadmap. • Prioritize product initiatives based on market demand, technical feasibility, and business impact. • Maintain a clear product vision for Hadron across multiple asset classes and blockchain networks. • Ensure long-term platform scalability and product coherence. Product Development & Delivery • Translate business and market needs into clear product requirements. • Maintain the product backlog and development priorities. • Coordinate development cycles and feature releases. • Ensure timely delivery of roadmap milestones. Engineering Coordination • Act as the primary interface between product and engineering. • Coordinate development work with internal engineers and external technology partners. • Maintain clear documentation of product features, APIs, and platform capabilities. • Track platform performance, bugs, and technical improvements. Client & Integration Feedback • Collect and structure feedback from institutional clients and internal teams. • Identify recurring integration challenges and translate them into product improvements. • Improve onboarding workflows and developer experience. • 5+ years of experience in product management or product ownership, with at least 3 years in digital assets, tokenization, or financial infrastructure. • Demonstrated hands-on experience shipping a tokenization or RWA product, with accountability for the full token lifecycle. • Deep, working knowledge of TradFi capital markets infrastructure including settlement, custody, clearing, fund structures. • Proven ability to rapidly parse institutional requirements and translate them into actionable product decisions. • Experience managing external engineering partners and enforcing scope discipline across complex, multi-stakeholder programmes. • Regulatory literacy across at least two major tokenization frameworks (MiCA, MAS, SEC, VARA, or equivalent). • Excellent written and spoken English. Able to author crisp product specs, client-facing documentation, and executive summaries. Nice to have: • Prior experience at a bank, asset manager, custodian, or regulated fintech in a product, technology, or markets role. • Hands-on experience with multiple token standards and blockchain networks in a production context. • Experience designing or integrating with custody APIs, transfer agent systems, or fund administration platforms. • Understanding of on-chain compliance mechanisms: whitelisting, transfer restrictions, KYC/AML hooks at the smart contract level. • Exposure to multi-chain deployment strategies and the tradeoffs between L1, L2, and permissioned chain environments. • Experience with institutional client onboarding workflows in a regulated context. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
