jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 
 The primary goal of a Developer Relations is to engage, educate, and inspire the developer community - building trust, driving adoption of our technology, and ensuring developers have an exceptional experience with our products. This involves creating technical content, presenting at events, gathering feedback, and serving as the voice of the developer both externally and internally.
 
 The role is focused on bridging the gap between developers and our product teams, ensuring our solutions are accessible, well-understood, and developer-friendly, while fostering community growth, promoting best practices, and driving continuous improvement in how developers discover, learn, and build with our technology.
 
 QVAC is a cutting-edge development platform designed for building privacy-focused AI applications. Unlike traditional AI tools that rely heavily on cloud-based infrastructure, QVAC is designed to run entirely on local devices, giving users full control over their data.
 
 Responsibilities 
 Developer Advocacy & Community Building 
 
• Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities.

• Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities.

• Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams.

• Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities.

 Technical Content & Enablement 
 
• Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers.

• Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases.

• Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions.

• Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions.

 Product Evangelism 
 
• Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities.

• Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions.

• Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging.

• Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact.

 Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy.

• Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability.

• Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs.

• Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority.

• Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners

 Thought Leadership 
 
• Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement.

• Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community.

• Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices.

 
 
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience.

• 3+ years of professional software development experience.

• Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager.

• Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers.

• Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs.

• Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers.

• Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks.

• Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages.

• Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media.

• Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices.

• Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams.

• Strong experience with Llama.cpp and ggml inference engines, which facilitates the deployment of models to specific GPU architectures

• Experience with AI or ML technologies, such as building or integrating LLMs, chatbots, or AI-driven SDKs and APIs.

• English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement.
 

 Preferred 
 
• Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools.

• Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop).

• 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations.

• Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency

• Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories.

• Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption.

• Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking.

• Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Unisciti a Tether e Forma il Futuro della Finanza Digitale A Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, oltre a servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, lavorando da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? L'obiettivo primario di una relazione di sviluppo è quello di coinvolgere, educare, e ispirare la comunità di sviluppatori - costruire la fiducia, guidare l'adozione della nostra tecnologia, e garantire agli sviluppatori un'esperienza eccezionale con i nostri prodotti. Ciò comporta la creazione di contenuti tecnici, presentando eventi, raccogliendo feedback e servendo come voce dello sviluppatore sia esternamente che internamente. Il ruolo è focalizzato sul colmare il divario tra gli sviluppatori e i nostri team di prodotti, assicurando che le nostre soluzioni siano accessibili, ben comprese e amichevoli per gli sviluppatori, promuovendo la crescita della comunità, promuovendo le migliori pratiche e promuovendo un miglioramento continuo nel modo in cui gli sviluppatori scoprono, imparano e costruiscono con la nostra tecnologia. QVAC è una piattaforma di sviluppo all'avanguardia progettata per la costruzione di applicazioni AI focalizzate sulla privacy. A differenza dei tradizionali strumenti AI che si basano fortemente sull'infrastruttura basata su cloud, QVAC è progettato per funzionare interamente su dispositivi locali, dando agli utenti il pieno controllo sui loro dati. Responsabilità Sviluppatore Advocacy & Community Building Build e allevare le relazioni con sviluppatori, partner e comunità open source. Coinvolgere e interagire con l'ecosistema sviluppatore — ospitando AMA, ore di ufficio, webinar, e partecipare a comunità online. Raccogliere e sintetizzare il feedback degli sviluppatori per informare i team di prodotto e di ingegneria. Identificare sviluppatori, progetti e comunità influenti per stabilire opportunità di collaborazione. Creare e mantenere contenuti tecnici di alta qualità (blog post, tutorial, app campione, video, documentazione, guide SDK, ecc.) direttamente mirati agli sviluppatori. Sviluppa demo, prototipi e implementazioni di riferimento che mostrano casi di utilizzo nel mondo reale. Contribuisci a migliorare l'esperienza degli sviluppatori attraverso il feedback della documentazione, i flussi di bordo e i suggerimenti di progettazione API. Supporto sviluppatore a bordo attraverso workshop, hackathons e sessioni di formazione. Prodotto Evangelismo Avvocato per lo stack di tecnologia dell'azienda in eventi di settore, incontri di sviluppatori e comunità online. Traduci concetti tecnici complessi in proposte di valore chiare e relatable. Collabora con il marketing per allineare la narrazione tecnica con la messaggistica di marca più ampia. Traccia e segnala le metriche del sentimento e dell'adozione della comunità per misurare l'impatto evangelistico. Collaborazione Cross-Functional Partner strettamente con l'ingegneria, la gestione dei prodotti e il marketing per allineare le esigenze degli sviluppatori con la strategia di prodotto. Fornire loop di feedback strutturati tra sviluppatori esterni e team interni per migliorare l'usabilità del prodotto. Supporta le strategie di lancio per nuove funzionalità, API e SDK. Contribuire alle discussioni sulla roadmap per garantire che l'esperienza degli sviluppatori rimanga una priorità strategica. Sostenere le prime discussioni tecniche con potenziali clienti e partner Thought Leadership Rappresentare l'azienda come una voce tecnica credibile nell'ecosistema attraverso i contributi pubblici, open source e l'impegno comunitario. Rimanete al passo con le tendenze, gli strumenti e le strutture del settore rilevanti per la comunità degli sviluppatori. Squadre interne Mentor su efficaci pratiche di comunicazione dello sviluppatore e di impegno della comunità. Laurea in Informatica, ingegneria del software, o campo relativo - o equivalente esperienza professionale. 3+ anni di esperienza di sviluppo software professionale. Esperienza precedente come Sviluppatore Avvocato, Rapporti Sviluppatori, o Technical Community Manager. Forte esperienza pratica con JavaScript, TypeScript e Node.js - in grado di scrivere codice di livello di produzione e spiegarlo chiaramente ad altri sviluppatori. Dimostrata esperienza costruzione, test e manutenzione di applicazioni o API. Prova capacità di creare contenuti tecnici (tutoriali, progetti di campionamento, post sul blog, video o documentazione) che educa e ispira sviluppatori. Esperienza che presenta a eventi pubblici, come conferenze di sviluppatori, incontri, webinar, o colloqui aziendali interni. Ottima capacità di comunicazione e presentazione, sia scritta che verbale, con la capacità di tradurre concetti tecnici complessi in messaggi semplici e coinvolgenti. Esperienza coinvolgente con le comunità di sviluppatori attraverso eventi, GitHub, forum o social media. Forte comprensione dei principi di esperienza dello sviluppatore e delle migliori pratiche. Capacità di collaborare efficacemente con i team di prodotto, ingegneria e marketing. Forte esperienza con i motori di inferenza Llama.cpp e ggml, che facilita l'implementazione di modelli a specifiche architetture GPU Esperienza con tecnologie AI o ML, come la costruzione o l'integrazione di LLM, chatbots, o SDK e API AI-driven. Fluency inglese — eccezionali capacità di comunicazione scritte e verbali sono richieste per il contenuto e l'impegno degli sviluppatori pubblici. Preferito Esperienza di progettazione, documentazione, o promuovere SDK o strumenti di sviluppo. Esperienza di sviluppo o integrazione di applicazioni (web, mobile o desktop). 4-6 anni di esperienza nello sviluppo del software o nelle relazioni con gli sviluppatori. Esperienza sfruttando gli strumenti AI (come Cursor, Codex, o simili flussi di lavoro di sviluppo assistiti da AI) per migliorare la produttività e l'efficienza di problem solving Contributi a progetti open source o mantenere i repository pubblici GitHub. Comprensione delle metriche di successo DevRel - la portata dei contenuti, l'impegno della comunità e l'adozione dei prodotti. Esperienza nella scrittura tecnica, l'istruzione degli sviluppatori, o la lingua pubblica. Passione per la costruzione di comunità, il mentoring e il potenziamento degli sviluppatori attraverso il contenuto e la collaborazione. Informazioni importanti per i candidati truffa di reclutamento sono diventati sempre piÃ1 comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. Doppio indirizzo email. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether.io Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalarlo immediatamente. Quando in dubbio, non esitate a raggiungere il nostro sito ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job The primary goal of a Developer Relations is to engage, educate, and inspire the developer community - building trust, driving adoption of our technology, and ensuring developers have an exceptional experience with our products. This involves creating technical content, presenting at events, gathering feedback, and serving as the voice of the developer both externally and internally. The role is focused on bridging the gap between developers and our product teams, ensuring our solutions are accessible, well-understood, and developer-friendly, while fostering community growth, promoting best practices, and driving continuous improvement in how developers discover, learn, and build with our technology. QVAC is a cutting-edge development platform designed for building privacy-focused AI applications. Unlike traditional AI tools that rely heavily on cloud-based infrastructure, QVAC is designed to run entirely on local devices, giving users full control over their data. Responsibilities Developer Advocacy & Community Building • Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities. • Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities. • Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams. • Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities. Technical Content & Enablement • Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers. • Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases. • Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions. • Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions. Product Evangelism • Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities. • Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions. • Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging. • Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact. Cross-Functional Collaboration • Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy. • Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability. • Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs. • Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority. • Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners Thought Leadership • Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement. • Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community. • Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices. • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience. • 3+ years of professional software development experience. • Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager. • Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers. • Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs. • Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers. • Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks. • Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages. • Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media. • Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices. • Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams. • Strong experience with Llama.cpp and ggml inference engines, which facilitates the deployment of models to specific GPU architectures • Experience with AI or ML technologies, such as building or integrating LLMs, chatbots, or AI-driven SDKs and APIs. • English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement. Preferred • Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools. • Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop). • 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations. • Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency • Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories. • Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption. • Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking. • Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Treten Sie Tether bei und gestalten Sie die Zukunft des digitalen Finanzwesens. Bei Tether entwickeln wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Vorreiter einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten –, rücklagegesicherte Token nahtlos über Blockchains hinweg zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistungsfähigkeit der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Ihnen Tether das sofortige, sichere und globale Speichern, Senden und Empfangen digitaler Token – und das alles zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten. Transparenz ist die Grundlage unseres Handelns und gewährleistet Vertrauen bei jeder Transaktion. Innovation mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktsuite umfasst den vertrauenswürdigsten Stablecoin der Welt, USDT, auf den sich Hunderte Millionen Menschen auf der ganzen Welt verlassen, sowie bahnbrechende Dienste zur Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Energielösungen fördern nachhaltiges Wachstum und optimieren überschüssigen Strom für das Bitcoin-Mining durch umweltfreundliche Praktiken in hochmodernen, geografisch vielfältigen Anlagen. Tether Data: Wir treiben Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie voran, senken Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education: Durch die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalen Lernen ermöglichen wir Einzelpersonen, in der Digital- und Gig-Wirtschaft erfolgreich zu sein und so globales Wachstum und Chancen voranzutreiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial verschieben wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. Warum sollten Sie bei uns mitmachen? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von überall auf der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn es Ihnen am Herzen liegt, sich im Fintech-Bereich einen Namen zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überschreiten und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, schlank geblieben und haben uns unseren Platz als Branchenführer gesichert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse verfügen und bereit sind, einen Beitrag zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt zu leisten, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Über den Job Das Hauptziel eines Developer Relations-Teams besteht darin, die Entwicklergemeinschaft einzubeziehen, zu schulen und zu inspirieren – Vertrauen aufzubauen, die Akzeptanz unserer Technologie voranzutreiben und sicherzustellen, dass Entwickler ein außergewöhnliches Erlebnis mit unseren Produkten haben. Dazu gehört es, technische Inhalte zu erstellen, auf Veranstaltungen zu präsentieren, Feedback einzuholen und als Sprachrohr des Entwicklers sowohl nach außen als auch nach innen zu fungieren. Die Rolle konzentriert sich darauf, die Lücke zwischen Entwicklern und unseren Produktteams zu schließen, sicherzustellen, dass unsere Lösungen zugänglich, gut verständlich und entwicklerfreundlich sind, und gleichzeitig das Community-Wachstum zu fördern, Best Practices zu fördern und eine kontinuierliche Verbesserung der Art und Weise voranzutreiben, wie Entwickler unsere Technologie entdecken, lernen und mit ihr bauen. QVAC ist eine hochmoderne Entwicklungsplattform für die Entwicklung datenschutzorientierter KI-Anwendungen. Im Gegensatz zu herkömmlichen KI-Tools, die stark auf einer Cloud-basierten Infrastruktur basieren, ist QVAC so konzipiert, dass es vollständig auf lokalen Geräten läuft und Benutzern die volle Kontrolle über ihre Daten gibt. Verantwortlichkeiten: Interessenvertretung der Entwickler und Community-Aufbau: Aufbau und Pflege von Beziehungen zu Entwicklern, Partnern und Open-Source-Communities. Beteiligen Sie sich am Entwickler-Ökosystem und interagieren Sie mit ihm – veranstalten Sie AMAs, Sprechstunden, Webinare und nehmen Sie an Online-Communitys teil. Sammeln und synthetisieren Sie Entwickler-Feedback, um Produkt- und Entwicklungsteams zu informieren. Identifizieren Sie einflussreiche Entwickler, Projekte und Communities, um Möglichkeiten zur Zusammenarbeit zu schaffen. Technische Inhalte und Unterstützung Erstellen und pflegen Sie hochwertige technische Inhalte (Blogbeiträge, Tutorials, Beispiel-Apps, Videos, Dokumentationen, SDK-Anleitungen usw.), die sich direkt an Entwickler richten. Entwickeln Sie Demos, Prototypen und Referenzimplementierungen, die reale Anwendungsfälle veranschaulichen. Tragen Sie durch Dokumentationsfeedback, Onboarding-Abläufe und API-Designvorschläge zur Verbesserung der Entwicklererfahrung bei. Unterstützen Sie das Entwickler-Onboarding durch Workshops, Hackathons und Schulungen. Product Evangelism Advocate für den Technologie-Stack des Unternehmens bei Branchenveranstaltungen, Entwicklertreffen und Online-Communities. Übersetzen Sie komplexe technische Konzepte in klare, nachvollziehbare Wertversprechen. Arbeiten Sie mit dem Marketing zusammen, um das technische Storytelling mit der umfassenderen Markenbotschaft in Einklang zu bringen. Verfolgen und melden Sie die Community-Stimmung und Akzeptanzkennzahlen, um die Wirkung der Evangelisation zu messen. Funktionsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit: Arbeiten Sie eng mit Technik, Produktmanagement und Marketing zusammen, um die Entwickleranforderungen mit der Produktstrategie in Einklang zu bringen. Sorgen Sie für strukturierte Feedbackschleifen zwischen externen Entwicklern und internen Teams, um die Benutzerfreundlichkeit des Produkts zu verbessern. Unterstützen Sie Einführungsstrategien für neue entwicklerorientierte Funktionen, APIs und SDKs. Beteiligen Sie sich an Roadmap-Diskussionen, um sicherzustellen, dass die Entwicklererfahrung weiterhin eine strategische Priorität bleibt. Unterstützen Sie erste technische Diskussionen mit potenziellen Kunden und Partnern. Thought Leadership. Repräsentieren Sie das Unternehmen als glaubwürdige technische Stimme im Ökosystem durch öffentliche Reden, Open-Source-Beiträge und Community-Engagement. Bleiben Sie über Branchentrends, Tools und Frameworks, die für die Entwickler-Community relevant sind, immer auf dem Laufenden. Betreuen Sie interne Teams bei effektiven Methoden der Entwicklerkommunikation und des Community-Engagements. Bachelor-Abschluss in Informatik, Softwaretechnik oder einem verwandten Bereich – oder gleichwertige Berufserfahrung. 3+ Jahre Berufserfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung. Vorherige Erfahrung als Developer Advocate, Developer Relations oder Technical Community Manager. Umfangreiche praktische Erfahrung mit JavaScript, TypeScript und Node.js – in der Lage, Code auf Produktionsebene zu schreiben und ihn anderen Entwicklern klar zu erklären. Nachgewiesene Erfahrung beim Erstellen, Testen und Warten von Anwendungen oder APIs. Nachgewiesene Fähigkeit, technische Inhalte (Tutorials, Beispielprojekte, Blogbeiträge, Videos oder Dokumentationen) zu erstellen, die Entwickler weiterbilden und inspirieren. Erfahrung im Präsentieren bei öffentlichen Veranstaltungen wie Entwicklerkonferenzen, Meetups, Webinaren oder unternehmensinternen Vorträgen. Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Präsentationsfähigkeiten, sowohl schriftlich als auch mündlich, mit der Fähigkeit, komplexe technische Konzepte in einfache, ansprechende Botschaften zu übersetzen. Erleben Sie den Kontakt mit Entwickler-Communitys über Veranstaltungen, GitHub, Foren oder soziale Medien. Ausgeprägtes Verständnis der Developer Experience-Prinzipien und Best Practices. Fähigkeit zur effektiven Zusammenarbeit mit Produkt-, Technik- und Marketingteams. Umfangreiche Erfahrung mit Llama.cpp- und ggml-Inferenz-Engines, die die Bereitstellung von Modellen auf bestimmten GPU-Architekturen erleichtert. Erfahrung mit KI- oder ML-Technologien, wie z. B. dem Erstellen oder Integrieren von LLMs, Chatbots oder KI-gesteuerten SDKs und APIs. Fließende Englischkenntnisse – für die Veröffentlichung von Inhalten und die Einbindung von Entwicklern sind hervorragende schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten erforderlich. Bevorzugte Erfahrung im Entwerfen, Dokumentieren oder Bewerben von SDKs oder Entwicklertools. Erfahrung in der Entwicklung oder Integration von Apps (Web, Mobil oder Desktop). 4–6 Jahre Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung oder Entwicklerbeziehungen. Erleben Sie die Nutzung von KI-Tools (wie Cursor, Codex oder ähnlichen KI-gestützten Entwicklungsworkflows), um die Produktivität und die Effizienz der Problemlösung zu steigern. Beiträge zu Open-Source-Projekten oder die Pflege öffentlicher GitHub-Repositories. Verständnis der DevRel-Erfolgsmetriken – Inhaltsreichweite, Community-Engagement und Produktakzeptanz. Erfahrung im technischen Schreiben, in der Entwicklerausbildung oder im öffentlichen Reden. Leidenschaft für den Aufbau von Communities, die Betreuung und die Stärkung von Entwicklern durch Inhalte und Zusammenarbeit. Wichtige Informationen für Kandidaten: Betrug bei der Personalbeschaffung kommt immer häufiger vor. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes, wenn Sie sich auf Stellen bewerben: Bewerben Sie sich ausschließlich über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen für die Rekrutierung keine Plattformen oder Agenturen Dritter, sofern dies nicht ausdrücklich angegeben ist. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Personalvermittlers. Alle unsere Personalvermittler verfügen über verifizierte LinkedIn-Profile. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Die gesamte Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle E-Mails und Plattformen des Unternehmens. Überprüfen Sie die E-Mail-Adressen noch einmal. Die gesamte Kommunikation von uns erfolgt über E-Mails mit der Endung @ tether.to oder @ tether.io. Wir werden niemals nach Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten fragen. Wenn jemand zu irgendeinem Zeitpunkt während des Einstellungsprozesses nach persönlichen Finanzinformationen oder Zahlungen fragt, handelt es sich um Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es umgehend. Im Zweifelsfall können Sie sich gerne über unsere offizielle Website an uns wenden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance Chez Tether, nous ne sommes pas seulement des produits de construction, nous sommes pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises, depuis les échanges et les portefeuilles jusqu'aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets, d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans toutes les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, assurant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants dispose de la plus fiable écurie du monde, USDT , sur laquelle s'appuient des centaines de millions de monde, ainsi que des services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais ce n'est que le début : Tether Power : Pour une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations géo-diverses à la fine pointe de la technologie. Tether Data: En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie pair à pair, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : Démocratiser l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous autonomisons les individus à prospérer dans les économies numériques et de concerts, moteur de la croissance mondiale et des opportunités. L'évolution de l'approche : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par la marque dans l'espace fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les frontières et de fixer de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés maigres et nous avons obtenu notre place de leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos du travail L'objectif premier d'une relation développeur est d'engager, d'éduquer et d'inspirer la communauté développeur - construire la confiance, conduire l'adoption de notre technologie, et faire en sorte que les développeurs aient une expérience exceptionnelle avec nos produits. Il s'agit de créer du contenu technique, de présenter lors d'événements, de recueillir des commentaires et de servir de voix du développeur à la fois externe et interne. Le rôle consiste à combler l'écart entre les développeurs et nos équipes de produits, à s'assurer que nos solutions sont accessibles, bien comprises et adaptées aux développeurs, tout en favorisant la croissance communautaire, en favorisant les meilleures pratiques et en favorisant l'amélioration continue de la façon dont les développeurs découvrent, apprennent et construisent avec notre technologie. QVAC est une plateforme de développement de pointe conçue pour construire des applications d'IA axées sur la vie privée. Contrairement aux outils d'IA traditionnels qui dépendent fortement de l'infrastructure basée sur le cloud, QVAC est conçu pour fonctionner entièrement sur des appareils locaux, donnant aux utilisateurs le plein contrôle de leurs données. Responsabilités Développeur Advocacy & Community Building Établir et entretenir des relations avec les développeurs, les partenaires et les communautés à source ouverte. Engagez-vous et interagissez avec l'écosystème développeur – hébergez des AMA, des heures de bureau, des webinaires et jouez un rôle dans les communautés en ligne. Recueillir et synthétiser les commentaires des développeurs pour informer les équipes de produits et d'ingénierie. Identifier les promoteurs, les projets et les collectivités influents afin d'établir des possibilités de collaboration. Contenu technique & Activation Créez et maintenez des contenus techniques de haute qualité (bulletins, tutoriels, exemples d'applications, vidéos, documentation, guides SDK, etc.) directement destinés aux développeurs. Développer des démos, des prototypes et des implémentations de référence qui présentent des cas d'utilisation dans le monde réel. Contribuer à améliorer l'expérience du développeur grâce à la rétroaction documentaire, aux flux d'embarquement et aux suggestions de conception d'API. Soutenez le développeur à bord par des ateliers, des hackathons et des séances de formation. Produit Evangelism Advocate for the company's technology stack lors d'événements industriels, de rencontres de développeurs et de communautés en ligne. Traduire des concepts techniques complexes en propositions de valeur claires et relatables. Collaborer avec le marketing pour aligner la narration technique avec la messagerie de marque plus large. Suivre et signaler le sentiment communautaire et les mesures d'adoption pour mesurer l'impact de l'évangélisation. Collaboration interfonctionnelle Partenaire étroitement avec l'ingénierie, la gestion des produits et le marketing pour aligner les besoins des développeurs sur la stratégie des produits. Fournir des boucles de rétroaction structurées entre les développeurs externes et les équipes internes pour améliorer la convivialité des produits. Soutenir les stratégies de lancement pour les nouvelles fonctionnalités, API et SDK face au développeur. Contribuer aux discussions sur la feuille de route pour s'assurer que l'expérience du développeur demeure une priorité stratégique. Appuyer les discussions techniques initiales avec les clients et les partenaires potentiels Leadership de la pensée Représenter l'entreprise comme une voix technique crédible dans l'écosystème par des interventions publiques, des contributions de source ouverte et l'engagement communautaire. Restez en avance sur les tendances, les outils et les cadres de l'industrie pertinents pour la communauté des promoteurs. Des équipes internes de mentors sur les pratiques efficaces de communication des développeurs et d'engagement communautaire. Baccalauréat en informatique, génie logiciel ou domaine connexe - ou expérience professionnelle équivalente. 3+ ans d'expérience professionnelle dans le développement de logiciels. Expérience antérieure en tant que défenseur des développeurs, responsable des relations avec les développeurs ou responsable de la communauté technique. Forte expérience pratique avec JavaScript, TypeScript et Node.js - capable d'écrire un code de niveau de production et de l'expliquer clairement aux autres développeurs. Expérience démontrée de construction, de test et de maintenance d'applications ou d'API. Capacité éprouvée de créer du contenu technique (tutoriels, exemples de projets, billets de blog, vidéos ou documentation) qui éduque et inspire les développeurs. Expérience de présentation lors d'événements publics, tels que des conférences de développeurs, des rencontres, des webinaires ou des discussions internes d'entreprises. Excellente capacité de communication et de présentation, écrite et verbale, avec la capacité de traduire des concepts techniques complexes en messages simples et engageants. Expérience d'engagement avec les communautés de développeurs à travers des événements, GitHub, des forums ou des médias sociaux. Connaissance approfondie des principes et des pratiques exemplaires de l'expérience du développeur. Capacité de collaborer efficacement avec les équipes de produits, d'ingénierie et de marketing. Forte expérience avec les moteurs à inférence Llama.cpp et ggml, ce qui facilite le déploiement de modèles dans des architectures GPU spécifiques Expérience avec les technologies AI ou ML, telles que la construction ou l'intégration de LLM, de chatbots ou de SDK et API pilotés par l'IA. Connaissance de l'anglais — Des compétences exceptionnelles en communication écrite et verbale sont requises pour le contenu public et l'engagement des développeurs. Expérience privilégiée concevoir, documenter ou promouvoir des SDK ou des outils de développement. Expérimentez le développement ou l'intégration d'applications (web, mobile ou bureautique). 4-6 ans d'expérience dans le développement de logiciels ou les relations de développeurs. Expérimenter en tirant parti des outils d'IA (comme le Cursor, le Codex ou d'autres workflows de développement assistés par l'IA) pour améliorer la productivité et résoudre les problèmes. Compréhension des mesures de succès DevRel - portée du contenu, engagement communautaire et adoption de produits. Expérience dans l'écriture technique, l'éducation des développeurs ou l'expression publique. Passion pour le développement communautaire, le mentorat et l'autonomisation des développeurs par le contenu et la collaboration. Renseignements importants pour les candidats Les escroqueries de recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit ce qui suit au moment de postuler pour des rôles : Appliquer uniquement par nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plates-formes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement à moins d'indication claire. Tous les rôles ouverts sont énumérés sur notre page officielle des carrières : https://tether.recruitee.com/ Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont vérifié les profils LinkedIn. Si vous n'êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entrevues sur WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute communication se fait au moyen de courriels et de plateformes officiels de l'entreprise. Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute communication de nous viendra de courriels se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ tether.io Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des renseignements financiers personnels ou un paiement à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est une escroquerie. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à contacter notre site officiel.

jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Developer (100% remote Worldwide)

titleByLocale.fr: Senior Fullstack Développeur (100% remote Worldwide)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As a Senior Fullstack Software Engineer, you will play a critical role in building and scaling our GPU-accelerated cloud services platform. You'll work on both the backend infrastructure that powers AI/ML workloads at scale and the frontend interfaces that make these capabilities accessible to developers and data scientists. This position requires deep technical expertise in distributed systems, strong backend development skills, and the ability to create intuitive user experiences. 
 You'll be joining a team that's pushing the boundaries of decentralized AI infrastructure, working on everything from Kubernetes orchestration and managed inference services to API design and real-time monitoring dashboards. Your work will directly impact how developers interact with and deploy AI models in production environments. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Backend Development: Design and implement robust backend services and APIs that handle AI model inference, resource orchestration, and workload distribution across distributed GPU infrastructure 

• Frontend Implementation: Build responsive and intuitive web interfaces for training job management, model deployment workflows, and real-time monitoring dashboards using modern JavaScript frameworks 

• Distributed Systems Architecture: Contribute to the design and implementation of distributed systems using peer-to-peer technologies (Holepunch stack) 

• API Design & Integration: Develop and maintain APIs that support both synchronous and asynchronous inference patterns, ensuring compatibility with industry standards 

• Platform Reliability: Implement monitoring, logging, and telemetry solutions to ensure high availability and performance of the platform services 

• Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with DevOps, AI/ML engineers, and product teams to deliver integrated solutions that meet technical and business requirements 

• Code Quality & Best Practices: Maintain high standards for code quality through peer reviews, testing, and documentation while championing security best practices 

 
 
• 5+ years of experience in fullstack development with strong emphasis on backend systems 

• Expert-level proficiency in Node.js/JavaScript for backend development and React frontend framework 

• Proven experience building and scaling distributed systems or event-driven architectures 

• Strong understanding of API design and implementation, including authentication, rate limiting, and versioning 

• Experience with containerization technologies (Docker) and orchestration platforms (Kubernetes) 

• Proficiency with databases, and a deep understanding of data modeling and optimization 

• Solid understanding of networking, security principles, and best practices for production systems 

• Experience with real-time data streaming and RPC implementations 

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and communicate effectively across time zones 

 
 Preferred: 
 
• Experience with peer-to-peer technologies (Hyperswarm, libp2p, WebRTC) or similar distributed communication protocols 

• Familiarity with AI/ML inference APIs and OpenAI-compatible endpoints 

• Previous experience building AI SaaS or PaaS platforms 

• Knowledge of GPU resource management and ML framework infrastructure 

• Experience with message queuing systems (Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka) 

• Familiarity with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack) 

• Understanding of WebAssembly or edge computing paradigms 

• Contributions to open-source projects in relevant domains 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: 
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ 

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. 

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. 

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. 

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The primary goal of a Developer Relations is to engage, educate, and inspire the developer community - building trust, driving adoption of our technology, and ensuring developers have an exceptional experience with our products. This involves creating technical content, presenting at events, gathering feedback, and serving as the voice of the developer both externally and internally.
 The role is focused on bridging the gap between developers and our product teams, ensuring our solutions are accessible, well-understood, and developer-friendly, while fostering community growth, promoting best practices, and driving continuous improvement in how developers discover, learn, and build with our technology.
 Pear is a combined Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Runtime, Development & Deployment tool. Pear makes it possible to build, share and extend P2P applications using common Web and Mobile technology. Herein is everything needed to create unstoppable, zero-infrastructure P2P applications for Desktop, Terminal & Mobile.

 Responsibilities 
 Developer Advocacy & Community Building 
 
• Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities.

• Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities.

• Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams.

• Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities.

 Technical Content & Enablement 
 
• Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers.

• Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases.

• Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions.

• Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions.

 Product Evangelism 
 
• Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities.

• Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions.

• Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging.

• Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact.

 Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy.

• Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability.

• Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs.

• Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority.

• Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners

 Thought Leadership 
 
• Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement.

• Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community.

• Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices.

 
 
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience.

 
• 3+ years of professional software development experience.

• Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager.

• Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers.

• Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs.

• Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers.

• Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks.

• Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages.

• Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media.

• Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices.

• Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams.

• Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love)

• Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems

• English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement.
 

 Preferred 
 
• Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools.

• Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop).

• 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations.

• Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency

• Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories.

• Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption.

• Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking.

• Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Unisciti a Tether e dai forma al futuro della finanza digitale In Tether non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare perfettamente token garantiti da riserve attraverso blockchain. Sfruttando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti consente di archiviare, inviare e ricevere token digitali in modo istantaneo, sicuro e globale, il tutto a una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è il fondamento di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innova con Tether Tether Finance: la nostra suite di prodotti innovativa comprende la stablecoin più affidabile al mondo, USDT, su cui fanno affidamento centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi pionieristici di tokenizzazione delle risorse digitali. Ma questo è solo l’inizio: Tether Power: guidando la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l’energia in eccesso per l’estrazione di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture all’avanguardia e geodiversificate. Tether Data: alimentando innovazioni nell'intelligenza artificiale e nella tecnologia peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi dell'infrastruttura e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione sicura e privata dei dati. Tether Education: democratizzando l’accesso all’apprendimento digitale di alto livello, consentiamo alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig economy, guidando la crescita e le opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: all'intersezione tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza globale di talenti, che lavora in remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se la tua passione è lasciare il segno nel settore fintech, questa è la tua occasione per collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo oltre i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, siamo rimasti snelli e ci siamo assicurati il ​​posto di leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti capacità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto che fa per te. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Informazioni sul lavoro L'obiettivo principale di Relazioni con gli sviluppatori è coinvolgere, educare e ispirare la comunità degli sviluppatori, creando fiducia, guidando l'adozione della nostra tecnologia e garantendo agli sviluppatori un'esperienza eccezionale con i nostri prodotti. Ciò comporta la creazione di contenuti tecnici, la presentazione agli eventi, la raccolta di feedback e il ruolo di voce dello sviluppatore sia esternamente che internamente. Il ruolo è incentrato sul colmare il divario tra gli sviluppatori e i nostri team di prodotto, garantendo che le nostre soluzioni siano accessibili, ben comprese e adatte agli sviluppatori, favorendo al contempo la crescita della comunità, promuovendo le migliori pratiche e guidando il miglioramento continuo nel modo in cui gli sviluppatori scoprono, apprendono e costruiscono con la nostra tecnologia. Pear è uno strumento combinato di runtime, sviluppo e distribuzione peer-to-peer (P2P). Pear consente di creare, condividere ed estendere applicazioni P2P utilizzando la comune tecnologia Web e mobile. Qui c'è tutto il necessario per creare applicazioni P2P inarrestabili e senza infrastruttura per desktop, terminali e dispositivi mobili. Responsabilità Difesa degli sviluppatori e creazione di comunità Costruisci e coltiva relazioni con sviluppatori, partner e comunità open source. Coinvolgi e interagisci con l'ecosistema degli sviluppatori, ospitando AMA, orari di ufficio, webinar e partecipa alle comunità online. Raccogli e sintetizza il feedback degli sviluppatori per informare i team di prodotto e di ingegneria. Identifica sviluppatori, progetti e comunità influenti per stabilire opportunità di collaborazione. Contenuti tecnici e abilitazione Crea e mantieni contenuti tecnici di alta qualità (post di blog, tutorial, app di esempio, video, documentazione, guide SDK, ecc.) direttamente destinati agli sviluppatori. Sviluppa demo, prototipi e implementazioni di riferimento che mostrano casi d'uso reali. Contribuisci a migliorare l'esperienza degli sviluppatori attraverso feedback sulla documentazione, flussi di onboarding e suggerimenti sulla progettazione delle API. Supporta l'onboarding degli sviluppatori attraverso workshop, hackathon e sessioni di formazione. Promozione del prodotto Sostenitore dello stack tecnologico dell'azienda in occasione di eventi di settore, incontri di sviluppatori e comunità online. Traduci concetti tecnici complessi in proposte di valore chiare e riconoscibili. Collabora con il marketing per allineare lo storytelling tecnico con un messaggio più ampio del marchio. Tieni traccia e segnala il sentimento della comunità e i parametri di adozione per misurare l'impatto dell'evangelizzazione. Collaborazione interfunzionale Collaborare a stretto contatto con l'ingegneria, la gestione del prodotto e il marketing per allineare le esigenze degli sviluppatori con la strategia del prodotto. Fornire cicli di feedback strutturati tra sviluppatori esterni e team interni per migliorare l'usabilità del prodotto. Supporta le strategie di lancio per nuove funzionalità, API e SDK rivolti agli sviluppatori. Contribuisci alle discussioni sulla roadmap per garantire che l'esperienza degli sviluppatori rimanga una priorità strategica. Supportare le discussioni tecniche iniziali con potenziali clienti e partner Leadership di pensiero Rappresentare l'azienda come una voce tecnica credibile nell'ecosistema attraverso discorsi pubblici, contributi open source e coinvolgimento della comunità. Rimani al passo con le tendenze, gli strumenti e i framework del settore rilevanti per la comunità degli sviluppatori. Guidare i team interni sulla comunicazione efficace degli sviluppatori e sulle pratiche di coinvolgimento della comunità. Laurea in informatica, ingegneria del software o settore correlato o esperienza professionale equivalente. Oltre 3 anni di esperienza nello sviluppo di software professionale. Esperienza precedente come difensore degli sviluppatori, relazioni con gli sviluppatori o responsabile della comunità tecnica. Forte esperienza pratica con JavaScript, TypeScript e Node.js: in grado di scrivere codice a livello di produzione e spiegarlo chiaramente ad altri sviluppatori. Esperienza dimostrata nella creazione, test e manutenzione di applicazioni o API. Comprovata capacità di creare contenuti tecnici (tutorial, progetti di esempio, post di blog, video o documentazione) che istruiscono e ispirano gli sviluppatori. Esperienza di presentazione in occasione di eventi pubblici, come conferenze degli sviluppatori, incontri, webinar o colloqui interni all'azienda. Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e presentazione, sia scritte che verbali, con la capacità di tradurre concetti tecnici complessi in messaggi semplici e coinvolgenti. Sperimenta il coinvolgimento con le community di sviluppatori tramite eventi, GitHub, forum o social media. Forte conoscenza dei principi e delle migliori pratiche dell'esperienza degli sviluppatori. Capacità di collaborare efficacemente con i team di prodotto, ingegneria e marketing. Forte esperienza di produzione con React Native e/o Electron (app che distribuiscono app apprezzate dagli utenti reali) Molto a proprio agio con Node.js e i moderni ecosistemi JavaScript/TypeScript Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese: sono richieste eccezionali capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale per i contenuti rivolti al pubblico e il coinvolgimento degli sviluppatori. Esperienza preferita nella progettazione, documentazione o promozione di SDK o strumenti per sviluppatori. Esperienza nello sviluppo o nell'integrazione di app (web, dispositivi mobili o desktop). 4-6 anni di esperienza nello sviluppo di software o nelle relazioni con gli sviluppatori. Esperienza nell'utilizzo di strumenti di intelligenza artificiale (come Cursor, Codex o flussi di lavoro di sviluppo simili assistiti da intelligenza artificiale) per migliorare la produttività e l'efficienza nella risoluzione dei problemi Contributi a progetti open source o mantenimento di repository GitHub pubblici. Comprensione delle metriche di successo di DevRel: portata dei contenuti, coinvolgimento della comunità e adozione del prodotto. Esperienza nella scrittura tecnica, nella formazione degli sviluppatori o nel parlare in pubblico. Passione per la creazione di community, il tutoraggio e il potenziamento degli sviluppatori attraverso contenuti e collaborazione. Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe nel reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggerti, tieni presente quanto segue quando fai domanda per un ruolo: fai domanda solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento se non chiaramente indicato. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina ufficiale delle carriere: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Verifica l'identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci tramite il nostro sito web. Fai attenzione ai metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste tramite WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni avvengono tramite e-mail e piattaforme ufficiali dell'azienda. Ricontrolla gli indirizzi email. Tutte le nostre comunicazioni arriveranno da e-mail che terminano con @ tether.to o @ tether.io Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o un pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, si tratta di una truffa. Per favore segnalatelo immediatamente. In caso di dubbi, non esitate a contattarci tramite il nostro sito Web ufficiale.
