jobs.title: Developer Advocate P2P (100% remote Worldwide)

titleByLocale.fr: Développeur Advocate P2P (100% remote Worldwide)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The primary goal of a Developer Relations is to engage, educate, and inspire the developer community - building trust, driving adoption of our technology, and ensuring developers have an exceptional experience with our products. This involves creating technical content, presenting at events, gathering feedback, and serving as the voice of the developer both externally and internally.
 The role is focused on bridging the gap between developers and our product teams, ensuring our solutions are accessible, well-understood, and developer-friendly, while fostering community growth, promoting best practices, and driving continuous improvement in how developers discover, learn, and build with our technology.
 Pear is a combined Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Runtime, Development & Deployment tool. Pear makes it possible to build, share and extend P2P applications using common Web and Mobile technology. Herein is everything needed to create unstoppable, zero-infrastructure P2P applications for Desktop, Terminal & Mobile.

 Responsibilities 
 Developer Advocacy & Community Building 
 
• Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities.

• Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities.

• Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams.

• Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities.

 Technical Content & Enablement 
 
• Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers.

• Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases.

• Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions.

• Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions.

 Product Evangelism 
 
• Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities.

• Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions.

• Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging.

• Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact.

 Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy.

• Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability.

• Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs.

• Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority.

• Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners

 Thought Leadership 
 
• Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement.

• Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community.

• Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices.

 
 
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience.

 
• 3+ years of professional software development experience.

• Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager.

• Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers.

• Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs.

• Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers.

• Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks.

• Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages.

• Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media.

• Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices.

• Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams.

• Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love)

• Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems

• English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement.
 

 Preferred 
 
• Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools.

• Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop).

• 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations.

• Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency

• Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories.

• Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption.

• Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking.

• Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Preferred • Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools. • Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop). • 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations. • Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency • Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories. • Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption. • Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking. • Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job The primary goal of a Developer Relations is to engage, educate, and inspire the developer community - building trust, driving adoption of our technology, and ensuring developers have an exceptional experience with our products. This involves creating technical content, presenting at events, gathering feedback, and serving as the voice of the developer both externally and internally. The role is focused on bridging the gap between developers and our product teams, ensuring our solutions are accessible, well-understood, and developer-friendly, while fostering community growth, promoting best practices, and driving continuous improvement in how developers discover, learn, and build with our technology. Pear is a combined Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Runtime, Development & Deployment tool. Pear makes it possible to build, share and extend P2P applications using common Web and Mobile technology. Herein is everything needed to create unstoppable, zero-infrastructure P2P applications for Desktop, Terminal & Mobile. Responsibilities Developer Advocacy & Community Building Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities. Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities. Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams. Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities. Technical Content & Enablement Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers. Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases. Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions. Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions. Product Evangelism Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities. Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions. Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging. Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact. Cross-Functional Collaboration Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy. Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability. Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs. Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority. Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners Thought Leadership Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement. Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community. Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience. 3+ years of professional software development experience. Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager. Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers. Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs. Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers. Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks. Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages. Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media. Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices. Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams. Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love) Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement. jobs.title: Economic Policy Analyst (100% Remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Economic Policy Analyste (100% Remote)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We’re hiring an Economic Policy Analyst to shape stablecoin regulation through data. This is a rare opportunity to work at the intersection of blockchain, data science, and regulating the economy of the future.
 
 As an Economic Policy Analyst, you'll combine deep knowledge of stablecoin policy with unparalleled access to data to partner with our Regulatory Affairs and Licensing team in shaping global regulation. You will produce original economic analysis, synthesize emerging research, and translate complex data into clear arguments for regulators and policymakers.
 
 You will work within the Economics team, where our mission is to quantify and communicate the impact of Tether’s technologies, primarily our stablecoin, USDt. We are a lean, fully remote, team that leverages thoughtful decision-making, experiments, technology, and vendor partnerships to scale.
 
 Our work is impactful, opinionated, and precise. We thrive on collaboration, autonomy, and delivering meaningful outcomes without unnecessary bureaucracy. You’ll work on new and complex policy issues with agility, curiosity to learn about the domain, and a willingness to stretch yourself.
 
 Responsibilities 
 You’ll be responsible for:
 
• Original analysis: you will leverage data to answer questions such as the macroeconomic impact of stablecoins within countries, the performance of stability mechanisms, or the role of self-hosted wallets in the ecosystem.

 
• Emerging research: you will monitor and synthesize output from institutions such as the IMF, BIS, and FSB to anticipate and respond to emerging policy concerns.

 
• Stakeholder communication: you will produce the briefs, submissions, and presentations that bring data and economic evidence into global stablecoin regulation.

 
 You’ll be successful if you focus on:
 
• Creativity: You develop novel, rigorous methods to put numbers to hard-to-quantify issues, leading to analysis that shifts policy debates.

 
• Communication: Stakeholders easily understand your findings and your research influences the development of better stablecoin regulation.

 
• Growth: Your approach reflects the scale and speed of the business: you build frameworks, prioritise ruthlessly, and develop a body of work that compounds over time.

 
 You're an experienced and self-motivated economist who is opinionated yet collaborative. You know the techniques and language of economic policy analysis, and are comfortable applying them to problems that don't yet have established answers. Autonomy and remote work brings out the best in you. You have the courage to challenge consensus views and the rigour to back your positions with evidence. You typically work in or to the west of the Central European timezone.
 
 Required skills and experience: 
 
• Deep experience in economic policy analysis and knowledge of econometric techniques for policy evaluation. 

• Knowledge of regulatory issues in the stablecoin and digital asset industry. 

• Expertise in quantitative analysis using languages such as SQL, R, or Python.

• Proven ability to author policy briefs, public submissions, and presentations for internal and external stakeholders. 

• Proven ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a remote environment. 

 
 Preferred skills and experience: 
 
• A PhD or Masters degree in Economics or a related field. 

 
• Experience in statistical analysis of macroeconomic and financial data. 

• An existing network within regulatory bodies or central banks.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Preferred skills and experience: • A PhD or Masters degree in Economics or a related field. • Experience in statistical analysis of macroeconomic and financial data. • An existing network within regulatory bodies or central banks. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

About the job We’re hiring an Economic Policy Analyst to shape stablecoin regulation through data. This is a rare opportunity to work at the intersection of blockchain, data science, and regulating the economy of the future. As an Economic Policy Analyst, you'll combine deep knowledge of stablecoin policy with unparalleled access to data to partner with our Regulatory Affairs and Licensing team in shaping global regulation. You will produce original economic analysis, synthesize emerging research, and translate complex data into clear arguments for regulators and policymakers. You will work within the Economics team, where our mission is to quantify and communicate the impact of Tether’s technologies, primarily our stablecoin, USDt. We are a lean, fully remote, team that leverages thoughtful decision-making, experiments, technology, and vendor partnerships to scale. Our work is impactful, opinionated, and precise. We thrive on collaboration, autonomy, and delivering meaningful outcomes without unnecessary bureaucracy. You’ll work on new and complex policy issues with agility, curiosity to learn about the domain, and a willingness to stretch yourself. Responsibilities You’ll be responsible for: Original analysis: you will leverage data to answer questions such as the macroeconomic impact of stablecoins within countries, the performance of stability mechanisms, or the role of self-hosted wallets in the ecosystem. Emerging research: you will monitor and synthesize output from institutions such as the IMF, BIS, and FSB to anticipate and respond to emerging policy concerns. Stakeholder communication: you will produce the briefs, submissions, and presentations that bring data and economic evidence into global stablecoin regulation. You’ll be successful if you focus on: Creativity: You develop novel, rigorous methods to put numbers to hard-to-quantify issues, leading to analysis that shifts policy debates. Communication: Stakeholders easily understand your findings and your research influences the development of better stablecoin regulation. Growth: Your approach reflects the scale and speed of the business: you build frameworks, prioritise ruthlessly, and develop a body of work that compounds over time. You're an experienced and self-motivated economist who is opinionated yet collaborative. You know the techniques and language of economic policy analysis, and are comfortable applying them to problems that don't yet have established answers. Autonomy and remote work brings out the best in you. You have the courage to challenge consensus views and the rigour to back your positions with evidence. You typically work in or to the west of the Central European timezone. jobs.title: Stablecoin Research Analyst (100% Remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Stablecoin Recherche Analyste (100% Remote)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses — from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs — to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We’re hiring a Research Analyst to identify and communicate the trends that will drive the next wave of stablecoin adoption. The title is negotiable, ranging from analyst to lead analyst. What matters is the experience you bring and the insight you can deliver. This is a rare opportunity to work at the intersection of blockchain, data science, and measuring the economy of the future.
 
 As a Research Analyst, you’ll combine industry knowledge with unparalleled access to data to understand what drives adoption of stablecoins today and in the future. You will develop new ways to understand the ecosystem and validate them with data. You’ll share insights, via reports, presentations, and data visualizations, with internal teams and for external communication. For the deepest insights, you’ll help put them in production for continuous monitoring and dashboarding.
 
 You will work within the Economics team, where our mission is to quantify and communicate the impact of Tether’s technologies, primarily our stablecoin, USDt. We are a lean, fully remote, team that leverages thoughtful decision-making, experiments, technology, and vendor partnerships to scale.
 
 Our work is impactful, opinionated, and precise. We thrive on collaboration, autonomy, and delivering meaningful outcomes without unnecessary bureaucracy. You’ll work on new and complex data analysis with agility, curiosity to learn about the domain, and a willingness to stretch yourself.
 
 Responsibilities 
 You’ll be responsible for researching the stablecoin industry, covering: 
 
• Use cases and users: current and emerging use cases for stablecoins, and the user journey and adoption of these use cases. 

• Market structure: current and emerging venues for stablecoin usage, and their competitive dynamics. 

• Opportunities: future channels for stablecoin adoption and their timing and venues. 

 You’ll be successful if you focus on: 
 
• Curiosity: You develop and test hypotheses that lead to novel insights, which change how the business thinks and acts. 

• Communication: Stakeholders easily understand your findings and act on them; your external research is cited and shared across the industry. 

 
• Growth: Your approach to research reflects the scale and speed of the business: you build context, prioritise ruthlessly, and automate wherever possible. 

 
 You’re an experienced and self-motivated researcher who is opinionated yet collaborative. You’re an expert in your domain yet willing to work on new problems and support the team. Autonomy and remote work brings out the best in you. You have the courage to be wrong in your analysis and the pride to learn why because, above all else, you care about the impact your work has. You typically work in or to the west of the Central European timezone, which may include American timezones.
 
 Required skills and experience: 
 
• Deep knowledge of the stablecoin and digital asset industry.

• Deep expertise in quantitative analysis using languages such as SQL, R, or Python, and expertise in version control (e.g. GitHub).

• Proven ability to present findings to senior internal stakeholders and author external-facing research.

• Proven ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a remote environment.

 
 Preferred skills and experience: 
 
• An existing network within the stablecoin and digital asset industry.

• Experience working with blockchain data.

• Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g. Databricks) and dbt.

• Experience with JavaScript for dashboard development.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

This is a rare opportunity to work at the intersection of blockchain, data science, and measuring the economy of the future. As a Research Analyst, you’ll combine industry knowledge with unparalleled access to data to understand what drives adoption of stablecoins today and in the future. You will develop new ways to understand the ecosystem and validate them with data. You’ll share insights, via reports, presentations, and data visualizations, with internal teams and for external communication. For the deepest insights, you’ll help put them in production for continuous monitoring and dashboarding. You will work within the Economics team, where our mission is to quantify and communicate the impact of Tether’s technologies, primarily our stablecoin, USDt. We are a lean, fully remote, team that leverages thoughtful decision-making, experiments, technology, and vendor partnerships to scale. Our work is impactful, opinionated, and precise. We thrive on collaboration, autonomy, and delivering meaningful outcomes without unnecessary bureaucracy. You’ll work on new and complex data analysis with agility, curiosity to learn about the domain, and a willingness to stretch yourself. Responsibilities You’ll be responsible for researching the stablecoin industry, covering: • Use cases and users: current and emerging use cases for stablecoins, and the user journey and adoption of these use cases. • Market structure: current and emerging venues for stablecoin usage, and their competitive dynamics. • Opportunities: future channels for stablecoin adoption and their timing and venues. You’ll be successful if you focus on: • Curiosity: You develop and test hypotheses that lead to novel insights, which change how the business thinks and acts. • Communication: Stakeholders easily understand your findings and act on them; your external research is cited and shared across the industry. • Growth: Your approach to research reflects the scale and speed of the business: you build context, prioritise ruthlessly, and automate wherever possible. You’re an experienced and self-motivated researcher who is opinionated yet collaborative. You’re an expert in your domain yet willing to work on new problems and support the team. Autonomy and remote work brings out the best in you. You have the courage to be wrong in your analysis and the pride to learn why because, above all else, you care about the impact your work has. You typically work in or to the west of the Central European timezone, which may include American timezones. Required skills and experience: • Deep knowledge of the stablecoin and digital asset industry. • Deep expertise in quantitative analysis using languages such as SQL, R, or Python, and expertise in version control (e.g. GitHub). • Proven ability to present findings to senior internal stakeholders and author external-facing research. • Proven ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a remote environment. Preferred skills and experience: • An existing network within the stablecoin and digital asset industry. • Experience working with blockchain data. • Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g. Databricks) and dbt. • Experience with JavaScript for dashboard development. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Expansion Manager - Tokenization (100% remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Expansion Manager - Tokenization (100% remote)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We are looking for a highly structured and analytical professional to join the Tokenization Expansion Team as an Expansion Manager.
Hadron by Tether is Tether’s institutional platform for real-world asset tokenization.
 The role reports directly to the Head of Tokenization Expansion and will support the execution and delivery of client and partner initiatives across multiple regions.
 You will work at the intersection of digital assets, tokenization, and institutional finance, coordinating client onboarding, managing partnerships with institutional players, and ensuring smooth execution across business, product, and technology teams.
 This is a hands-on role within a small, high-performance team. It requires adaptability, precision, and strong ownership - as well as the willingness to travel frequently across regions to meet clients, partners, and regulators when needed.
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Support the Head of Tokenization Expansion in managing active client and partner projects from onboarding to delivery.

• Act as an Account Manager for assigned clients, ensuring consistent communication, alignment of expectations, and timely follow-up on all requests.

• Coordinate communication and execution between clients, product, and tech teams.

• Manage relationships with ecosystem partners.

• Conduct research, prepare memos, and synthesize insights for business and product decisions.

• Track project milestones, maintain accurate reporting, and ensure timely delivery.

• Assist in drafting client proposals, commercial documents, and presentations.

• Help structure internal workflows and process improvements to enhance scalability.

• Support the functional development of the Hadron platform according to client and market needs.

 
 Requirements 
 
 
• 3-5 years of experience in strategy consulting, investment banking, corporate finance or business development.

• Solid understanding of financial assets, capital markets, and how institutional finance operates.

• Strong academic background (economics, finance, engineering, or related fields).

• Excellent analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills.

• Proven ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously with strong attention to detail.

• Comfortable working autonomously in high-stakes, dynamic environments.

• Experience or strong interest in blockchain, fintech, or digital assets is a plus.

• Availability to travel internationally when required.

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Requirements • 3-5 years of experience in strategy consulting, investment banking, corporate finance or business development. • Solid understanding of financial assets, capital markets, and how institutional finance operates. • Strong academic background (economics, finance, engineering, or related fields). • Excellent analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills. • Proven ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously with strong attention to detail. • Comfortable working autonomously in high-stakes, dynamic environments. • Experience or strong interest in blockchain, fintech, or digital assets is a plus. • Availability to travel internationally when required. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance : Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT, relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data : Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET, our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education: Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job: 
 The Data & Payments Analyst supports the Compliance and Data & Payments functions by assisting with operational, administrative, and analytical activities related to transaction monitoring, KYT, Travel Rule processes, and payment operations. This role focuses on execution, accuracy, learning, and development, providing foundational support to ensure processes are completed efficiently, consistently, and in line with internal procedures and regulatory expectations. 
 The role also supports Acquire and Redeem payment processes, internal reviews, alert handling, and case management, while progressively developing AML, blockchain, and investigative competencies under supervision. 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
• Support Data & Payments and Compliance teams with operational and analytical tasks. 

• Assist in Transaction Monitoring (TM), KYT, and Travel Rule processes. 

• Support Acquire & Redeem payment processing activities. 

• Perform basic case reviews and data validation. 

• Maintain accurate case files and documentation. 

• Support alert triage and escalation processes. 

• Assist in internal data requests and reporting. 

• Support client and banking partner communications. 

• Follow documented procedures and workflows. 

• Contribute to internal projects and process improvement initiatives. 

• Develop AML, blockchain, and investigative knowledge. 

• Escalate issues, risks, and anomalies to senior team members. 

• Maintain data accuracy and operational integrity. 

• Other duties as assigned by senior team members 

 

 In addition to the skill set preferred requirements listed below the incumbent must be able to work independently with minimum supervision, (seeking guidance as required), flexible as to working arrangement and hours and confident in making decisions as delegated by the Data and Payments Lead and Head of AML. 
 
• Secondary education (University or College Preferred). 

• Experience in an analytical or investigative function. 

• Introductory level AML experience including customer and enhanced due diligence(CDD/EDD), and AML/CTF/Sanctions Investigations. 

• Basic knowledge of blockchain technology, (enhanced in the role). 

• CBP designation (Preferred). 

• ACAMS designation (Preferred). 
 

 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT, basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, oltre a servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Data Tether: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una centrale di talento globale, che lavora a distanza da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Il Data & Payments Analyst supporta le funzioni Compliance and Data & Payments, aiutando con attività operative, amministrative e analitiche relative al monitoraggio delle transazioni, KYT, processi di Travel Rule e operazioni di pagamento. Questo ruolo si concentra sull'esecuzione, l'accuratezza, l'apprendimento e lo sviluppo, fornendo un supporto fondamentale per garantire che i processi siano completati in modo efficiente, coerente e in linea con le procedure interne e le aspettative normative. Il ruolo supporta anche processi di pagamento Acquire e Redeem, recensioni interne, gestione degli avvisi e gestione dei casi, sviluppando progressivamente AML, blockchain e competenze investigative sotto supervisione. ## Responsabilità: • Support Data & Payments e Compliance team con compiti operativi e analitici. • Assistere nel monitoraggio delle transazioni (TM), nei processi KYT e Travel Rule. • Support Acquire & Recuperare attività di elaborazione dei pagamenti. • Eseguire le recensioni dei casi di base e la convalida dei dati. • Mantenere i file di caso e la documentazione accurate. • Supporta processi di triage e di escalation. • Assistere alle richieste e alla segnalazione dei dati interni. • Supporta le comunicazioni dei clienti e dei partner bancari. • Seguire procedure documentate e flussi di lavoro. • Contribuire a progetti interni e iniziative di miglioramento dei processi. • Sviluppare AML, blockchain e conoscenze investigative. • Escalare problemi, rischi e anomalie ai membri del team senior. • Mantenere l'accuratezza dei dati e l'integrità operativa. • Altri compiti assegnati dai membri del team senior Oltre ai requisiti prescelti indicati di seguito all'incumbent devono essere in grado di lavorare in modo indipendente con la minima supervisione, (chiedendo indicazioni come richiesto), flessibile per quanto riguarda la disposizione di lavoro e le ore e fiducioso nel prendere decisioni come delegate dai Dati e Pagamenti Piombo e Capo di AML. ## Requisiti: • Istruzione secondaria (Università o Collegio Preferito). • Esperienza in funzione analitica o investigativa. • Esperienza di livello introduttivo AML tra cui il cliente e una maggiore diligenza (CDD/EDD), e AML/CTF/Sanctions Investigations. • Conoscenza di base della tecnologia blockchain, (prova nel ruolo). • designazione CBP (preferito). • designazione ACAMS (preferito). ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe di reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: • Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. • Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. • Doppio check indirizzi e-mail. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether. I Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalare immediatamente.

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreiben Sie Tether und Gestalten Sie die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Pionier einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen befähigen Unternehmen – von Börsen und Geldbörsen bis hin zu Zahlungsprozessoren und Geldautomaten –, über Blockchains lückenlos reservatgestützte Token zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist der Grundstein für alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jede Transaktion zu gewährleisten. Innovate mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite verfügt über die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stallmünze, USDT, die von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit begehrt wird, sowie wegweisende digitale Asset-Tokenization-Dienste. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Fahren Sie nachhaltiges Wachstum, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Leistung für Bitcoin Bergbau mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiverse Anlagen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie reduzieren wir die Infrastrukturkosten und erhöhen die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education: Democratizing access to top-tier digitales Lernen, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und gig-Wirtschaften zu leben, das globale Wachstum und die Chance zu treiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drängen wir die Grenzen von dem, was möglich ist, und schaffen eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in leistungsfähigen, beispiellosen Weisen verschmelzen. Warum bei uns? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von jeder Ecke der Welt entfernt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran sind, eine Marke im Fintech-Raum zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zu kooperieren, Grenzen zu drängen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, blieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Marktführer in der Branche. Wenn Sie hervorragende englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten haben und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform auf dem Planeten beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Über den Job: Der Data & Payments Analyst unterstützt die Funktionen Compliance und Data & Payments, indem er mit operativen, administrativen und analytischen Aktivitäten im Zusammenhang mit der Transaktionsüberwachung, KYT, Travel Rule-Prozessen und Zahlungsvorgängen unterstützt. Diese Rolle konzentriert sich auf die Ausführung, Genauigkeit, das Lernen und die Entwicklung und bietet grundlegende Unterstützung, um sicherzustellen, dass Prozesse effizient, konsequent und im Einklang mit internen Verfahren und regulatorischen Erwartungen abgeschlossen werden. Die Rolle unterstützt auch Akquire- und Redeem-Zahlungsprozesse, interne Überprüfungen, Alarmbehandlung und Case-Management, während die Entwicklung von AML, Blockchain und investigative Kompetenzen unter Aufsicht. Responsabilità: • Unterstützung von Data & Payments und Compliance-Teams mit operativen und analytischen Aufgaben. • Assist in Transaction Monitoring (TM), KYT und Travel Rule Prozesse. • Unterstützen Sie die Aktivitäten zur Zahlungsabwicklung. • Durchführung grundlegender Fallprüfungen und Datenvalidierung. • Bewahren Sie genaue Falldateien und Dokumentation. • Unterstützung von Alarmversuchen und Eskalationsprozessen. • Bestehende interne Datenanfragen und Berichterstattung. • Unterstützung der Kunden- und Bankpartnerkommunikation. • Befolgen Sie dokumentierte Verfahren und Workflows. • Beitrag zu internen Projekten und Prozessverbesserungsinitiativen. • Entwicklung von AML, Blockchain und investigativem Wissen. • Eskalieren Sie Probleme, Risiken und Anomalien für Senioren. • Aufrechterhaltung der Datengenauigkeit und der operativen Integrität. • Sonstige Aufgaben, die von leitenden Teammitgliedern zugewiesen werden Zusätzlich zu den im Folgenden aufgeführten Qualifikationsanforderungen müssen die Vorzugsanforderungen in der Lage sein, unabhängig mit der Mindestbeaufsichtigung zu arbeiten (siehe Anleitung nach Bedarf), flexibel in Bezug auf die Arbeitsvereinbarung und Stunden und zuversichtlich in der Entscheidungsfindung, wie sie von der Data and Payment Lead and Head of AML delegiert werden. • Sekundarbildung (University oder College Preferred). • Erfahrung in einer analytischen oder investigativen Funktion. • Einführungsebene AML-Erfahrung einschließlich Kunden und verbesserte Due Diligence (CDD/EDD), und AML/CTF/Sanctions Investigations. • Grundkenntnisse der Blockchain-Technologie (verstärkt in der Rolle). • CBP-Bezeichnung (vorgezogen). • ACAMS-Bezeichnung (vorgezogen). Â Informazioni importanti per i candidati Recruitment Betrug sind immer häufiger geworden. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte bei der Beantragung von Rollen: • Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine Plattformen oder Agenturen von Drittanbietern zur Rekrutierung, sofern nicht klar angegeben. Alle offenen Rollen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Rekruten. Alle unsere Rekruten haben LinkedIn-Profile überprüft. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie Ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. • Seien Sie vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen. • Doppel-Check-E-Mail Adressen. Alle Kommunikation von uns wird von E-Mails kommen, die in @ tether.to oder @ tether enden. io • Wir werden keine Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten verlangen. Wenn jemand während der Einstellung nach persönlichen finanziellen Informationen oder Zahlung an jedem Punkt fragt, ist es ein Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es sofort.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance Chez Tether, nous ne sommes pas seulement des produits de construction, nous sommes pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises, depuis les échanges et les portefeuilles jusqu'aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets, d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, à une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, assurant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innover avec Tether Tether Finance : Notre suite de produits innovants présente la plus fiable écurie du monde, USDT, sur laquelle s'appuient des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que des services de tokenisation numériques. Mais ce n'est que le début: Tether Power: Pour une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans les installations géo-divers de pointe. Tether Data : Alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education: Démocratiser l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous habilitons les individus à prospérer dans les économies du numérique et des concerts, favorisant la croissance mondiale et les opportunités. Tether Evolution : A l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par la marque dans l'espace fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les frontières et de fixer de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés maigres et nous avons obtenu notre place de leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos de la tâche : L'analyste des données et des paiements appuie les fonctions Conformité et données et paiements en aidant aux activités opérationnelles, administratives et analytiques liées à la surveillance des transactions, au KYT, aux processus de règles de voyage et aux opérations de paiement. Ce rôle est axé sur l'exécution, l'exactitude, l'apprentissage et le développement, en fournissant un soutien fondamental pour s'assurer que les processus sont réalisés de façon efficace, uniforme et conforme aux procédures internes et aux attentes réglementaires. Le rôle appuie également les processus de paiement d'acquisition et de rachat, les examens internes, le traitement des alertes et la gestion des cas, tout en développant progressivement les compétences en matière de LMA, de blockchain et d'enquête sous supervision. ## Responsabilità: • Supporter les données et les paiements et les équipes de conformité avec des tâches opérationnelles et analytiques. • Aider aux processus de surveillance des transactions (TM), de KYT et de règles de voyage. • Soutenir les activités de traitement des paiements d'acquisition et de rachat. • Effectuer des examens de cas de base et la validation des données. • Tenir des dossiers et des documents précis. • Soutenir les processus de triage et d'escalade. • Aider aux demandes de données internes et aux rapports. • Soutenir les communications avec les clients et les partenaires bancaires. • Suivre les procédures et les flux de travail documentés. • Contribuer aux projets internes et aux initiatives d'amélioration des processus. • Développer les connaissances en matière de LAM, de blockchain et d'investigation. • Accélérer les problèmes, les risques et les anomalies pour les membres supérieurs de l'équipe. • Maintenir la précision des données et l'intégrité opérationnelle. • Autres tâches assignées par les membres de l'équipe supérieure En plus des exigences de choix énumérées ci-dessous, le titulaire doit être en mesure de travailler de façon indépendante avec un minimum de supervision (demande d'orientation au besoin), de faire preuve de souplesse quant à l'organisation du travail et aux heures de travail et de prendre des décisions avec confiance, comme l'a délégué le responsable des données et des paiements et le chef de la LMA. ## Requisiti: • Enseignement secondaire (université ou collège préféré). • Expérience dans une fonction d'analyse ou d'enquête. • Expérience d'introduction à la LMA, y compris client et diligence raisonnable renforcée (CDD/EDD), et enquêtes sur la LMA/CTF/Sanctions. • Connaissance de base de la technologie blockchain (renforcée dans le rôle). • Désignation du CBP (préféré). • Désignation ACAMS (préféré). ## Information importantei per i candidati Les escroqueries de recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus fréquentes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit ce qui suit lors de la demande de rôles : • Appliquer uniquement par nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plates-formes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement, sauf indication contraire. Tous les rôles ouverts sont listés sur notre page de carrière officielle : https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Vérifier l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont vérifié les profils LinkedIn. Si vous n'êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. • Faites attention aux méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entrevues sur WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute communication se fait par le biais de courriels et de plateformes officiels de l'entreprise. • Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute communication de nous viendra de courriels se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ sether. io Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des renseignements financiers personnels ou un paiement à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est une escroquerie. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement.

titleByLocale.it: SR Legal and Compliance Analista (100% REMOTE)
titleByLocale.en: SR Legal and Compliance Analyst (100% REMOTE)
titleByLocale.fr: SR Legal and Compliance Analyste (100% REMOTE)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We are seeking a Senior Legal & Compliance Analyst to serve as the primary liaison between the company and law enforcement, regulators, and government authorities on asset recovery matters. This role involves managing complex, multi-jurisdictional requests with potential significant legal, financial, and reputational implications. The ideal candidate is a strategic, confident professional who thrives in high-stakes environments and possesses a deep understanding of global legal and compliance frameworks.
 The Senior Analyst will review and process asset recovery requests, negotiate agreements, draft legal correspondence and memoranda, and provide guidance to internal stakeholders on associated legal and compliance risks.
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Serve as the primary point of contact for law enforcement, regulators, and government authorities on asset recovery matters, coordinating communications and supporting negotiations.

• Draft, review, and manage routine indemnity agreements, correspondence, and memoranda under Legal oversight, ensuring compliance with cross-border and internal requirements.

• Perform detailed legal and compliance reviews, evaluating cross-jurisdictional implications, analyzing findings from on-chain investigations, and identifying any potential operational risks.

• Advise internal teams on compliance obligations and risk mitigation, escalating complex matters to Legal and senior management as appropriate.

• Mentor junior analysts, fostering best practices in documentation, stakeholder engagement, and adherence to compliance standards.

 
 
• Bachelor’s degree in Law, Legal Studies, Compliance, Finance, or a related field.

• A minimum of 8-10 years of experience in a legal or compliance environment, engaging with regulatory authorities, law enforcement, or government representatives.

• Strong understanding of digital assets and blockchain technology, or a willingness to learn, combined with comprehensive knowledge of financial regulations and compliance frameworks, including AML/KYC and sanctions requirements.

• Proven ability to draft high-quality legal correspondence, agreements, and internal advisories.

• Exceptional negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills; capable of managing sensitive and confidential matters.

• Highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
 Preferred Qualifications 

• Experience in cross-border legal coordination or mutual legal assistance..

• Leadership or senior advisory experience within legal or compliance teams.

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
