jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 
 This team operates at the intersection of distributed systems and GPU infrastructure, powering compute-intensive workloads at scale. We're looking for a Staff Node.js Engineer to take ownership of backend architecture across services that orchestrate GPU resources, manage infrastructural workflows, and expose them through robust, high-performance APIs. 
 
 This is a senior technical role with meaningful architectural scope. You'll drive system design decisions, lead complex backend initiatives, and partner with leadership to shape the long-term technical direction of the platform. The ideal candidate thrives in ambiguity, has strong opinions backed by production experience, and is comfortable operating close to the metal when GPU and infrastructure workloads demand it. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Architect, design, and implement scalable backend services in Node.js that form the core of this team platform. 

• Lead system design for complex, distributed backend initiatives - from requirements through production rollout. 

• Own technical decisions around performance, reliability, and scalability of services interacting with GPU management and low-level infrastructure. 

• Collaborate closely with infrastructure, platform, and product teams to align backend architecture with business needs. 

• Establish and uphold engineering standards: code quality, testing, observability, and documentation. 

• Mentor senior and mid-level engineers; contribute to technical hiring and team growth. 

• Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks, scaling limitations, and architectural debt. 

 
 
• 7+ years of professional backend engineering experience, with deep expertise in Node.js . 

• Proven track record of architecting and scaling distributed backend systems in production. 

• Strong system design skills: microservices, API design, data modeling, async patterns, event-driven architectures. 

• Experience with relational and non-relational databases, message queues, and caching layers. 

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal). 

• Based in a timezone with 4–6 hours of overlap with IST working hours (10am–7pm IST). 

 
 Preferred (Bonus) 
 
• Networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, gRPC, custom protocols, performance tuning. 

• Virtualization / containerization experience (Docker, Kubernetes, VMs, hypervisors). 

• Exposure to GPU infrastructure, GPU scheduling, or compute orchestration systems. 

• Experience operating backend systems in infrastructure-heavy or hardware-adjacent domains. 

• Prior work in fintech, crypto, or blockchain environments. 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: 
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ 

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. 

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. 

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. 

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, oltre a servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, lavorando da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Questo team opera all'incrocio di sistemi distribuiti e infrastrutture GPU, alimentando carichi di lavoro ad alta intensità di elaborazione su scala. Stiamo cercando un Ingegnere Staff Node.js di prendere la proprietà dell'architettura backend attraverso i servizi che orchestrano le risorse della GPU, gestiscono i flussi di lavoro infrastrutturali e li espongono attraverso API robuste e ad alte prestazioni. Questo è un ruolo tecnico senior con un significativo ambito architettonico. Potrai guidare le decisioni di progettazione del sistema, condurre complesse iniziative backend, e partner con la leadership per modellare la direzione tecnica a lungo termine della piattaforma. Il candidato ideale prospera in ambiguità, ha forti opinioni sostenute dall'esperienza di produzione, ed è comodo operare vicino al metallo quando la GPU e i carichi di lavoro infrastruttura lo richiedono. ## Responsabilità • Architetto, design e implementare servizi di backend scalabili in Node.js che formano il nucleo di questa piattaforma di team. • Progettazione del sistema di piombo per iniziative di backend complesse e distribuite - dai requisiti attraverso il rollout di produzione. • Decisioni tecniche proprie circa le prestazioni, l'affidabilità e la scalabilità dei servizi che interagiscono con la gestione della GPU e l'infrastruttura di basso livello. • Collaborare a stretto contatto con infrastrutture, piattaforme e team di prodotti per allineare l'architettura backend con le esigenze aziendali. • Stabilire e sostenere gli standard di ingegneria: qualità del codice, test, osservanza e documentazione. • Ingegneri senior e di medio livello; contribuire all'assunzione tecnica e alla crescita del team. • Identificare e risolvere i colli di bottiglia delle prestazioni, le limitazioni di scala e il debito architettonico. ## Requisiti • 7+ anni di esperienza professionale di backend engineering, con profonda esperienza in Node.js . • Provato track record di architettura e scaling sistemi backend distribuiti in produzione. • Forte capacità di progettazione del sistema: microservizi, progettazione API, modellazione dei dati, modelli asincroni, architetture orientate agli eventi. • Esperienza con database relazionali e non relazionali, code di messaggi e strati di cache. • Eccellente capacità di comunicazione inglese (scritto e verbale). • Con sede in un fuso orario con 4–6 ore di sovrapposizione con le ore di lavoro TSI (10:00–7pm IST). ## Bonus • Fondamenti di rete: TCP/IP, gRPC, protocolli personalizzati, tuning delle prestazioni. • Esperienza di virtualizzazione / containerizzazione (Docker, Kubernetes, VM, ipervisori). • Esposizione all'infrastruttura GPU, alla programmazione GPU o ai sistemi di orchestrazione di elaborazione. • Provare i sistemi di backend operativi nei domini infrastruttura-pesanti o hardware-adiacenti. • Lavoro prioritario in ambienti fintech, cripto o blockchain. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe di reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: • Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. • Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. • Doppio check indirizzi e-mail. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether. I Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalarlo immediatamente. Quando in dubbio, non esitate a raggiungere il nostro sito ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job This team operates at the intersection of distributed systems and GPU infrastructure, powering compute-intensive workloads at scale. We're looking for a Staff Node.js Engineer to take ownership of backend architecture across services that orchestrate GPU resources, manage infrastructural workflows, and expose them through robust, high-performance APIs. This is a senior technical role with meaningful architectural scope. You'll drive system design decisions, lead complex backend initiatives, and partner with leadership to shape the long-term technical direction of the platform. The ideal candidate thrives in ambiguity, has strong opinions backed by production experience, and is comfortable operating close to the metal when GPU and infrastructure workloads demand it. Responsibilities • Architect, design, and implement scalable backend services in Node.js that form the core of this team platform. • Lead system design for complex, distributed backend initiatives - from requirements through production rollout. • Own technical decisions around performance, reliability, and scalability of services interacting with GPU management and low-level infrastructure. • Collaborate closely with infrastructure, platform, and product teams to align backend architecture with business needs. • Establish and uphold engineering standards: code quality, testing, observability, and documentation. • Mentor senior and mid-level engineers; contribute to technical hiring and team growth. • Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks, scaling limitations, and architectural debt. • 7+ years of professional backend engineering experience, with deep expertise in Node.js . • Proven track record of architecting and scaling distributed backend systems in production. • Strong system design skills: microservices, API design, data modeling, async patterns, event-driven architectures. • Experience with relational and non-relational databases, message queues, and caching layers. • Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal). • Based in a timezone with 4–6 hours of overlap with IST working hours (10am–7pm IST). Preferred (Bonus) • Networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, gRPC, custom protocols, performance tuning. • Virtualization / containerization experience (Docker, Kubernetes, VMs, hypervisors). • Exposure to GPU infrastructure, GPU scheduling, or compute orchestration systems. • Experience operating backend systems in infrastructure-heavy or hardware-adjacent domains. • Prior work in fintech, crypto, or blockchain environments. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreiben Sie Tether und Gestalten Sie die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Pionier einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen befähigen Unternehmen – von Börsen und Geldbörsen bis zu Zahlungsprozessoren und Geldautomaten –, über Blockchains lückenlos recycelte Token zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist der Grundstein für alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jede Transaktion zu gewährleisten. Innovate mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite verfügt über das weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stallcoin, USDT, das von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit begehrt wird, sowie wegweisende digitale Asset-Tokenization-Dienste. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Fahren Sie nachhaltiges Wachstum, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Leistung für Bitcoin Bergbau mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiverse Anlagen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie reduzieren wir die Infrastrukturkosten und erhöhen die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und gig-Wirtschaften zu leben, das globale Wachstum und die Chance zu treiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drängen wir die Grenzen von dem, was möglich ist, und schaffen eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in mächtigen, beispiellosen Weisen verschmelzen. Warum bei uns? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von jeder Ecke der Welt entfernt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran sind, eine Marke im Fintech-Raum zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zu kooperieren, Grenzen zu drängen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, blieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Marktführer in der Branche. Wenn Sie hervorragende englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten haben und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform auf dem Planeten beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Über den Job Dieses Team arbeitet an der Schnittstelle von verteilten Systemen und GPU-Infrastruktur, die rechnerintensive Workloads im Maßstab macht. Wir sind auf der Suche nach einem Staff Node.js Engineer, um das Eigentum an Backend-Architektur über Dienstleistungen zu übernehmen, die GPU-Ressourcen orchestrieren, infrastrukturelle Workflows verwalten und durch robuste, leistungsstarke APIs aussetzen. Dies ist eine hochrangige technische Rolle mit aussagekräftigem architektonischem Umfang. Sie leiten Systemdesign-Entscheidungen, führen komplexe Backend-Initiativen und Partner mit Führung, um die langfristige technische Richtung der Plattform zu gestalten. Der ideale Kandidat blüht in Mehrdeutigkeit, hat starke Meinungen durch Produktionserfahrung unterstützt und ist bequem in der Nähe des Metalls, wenn GPU und Infrastruktur-Workloads es erfordern. • Architekt, entwerfen und implementieren skalierbare Backend-Dienste in Node.js, die den Kern dieser Teamplattform bilden. • Lead-System-Design für komplexe, verteilte Backend-Initiativen - von Anforderungen über Produktionsrollout. • Eigene technische Entscheidungen über Leistung, Zuverlässigkeit und Skalierbarkeit von Dienstleistungen, die mit GPU-Management und Low-Level-Infrastruktur interagieren. • enge Zusammenarbeit mit Infrastruktur-, Plattform- und Produktteams, um die Backend-Architektur mit den geschäftlichen Bedürfnissen auszurichten. • Aufbau und Einhaltung von technischen Standards: Codequalität, Prüfung, Einhaltung und Dokumentation. • Mentor Senior- und Mid-Level-Ingenieure; Beitrag zur technischen Einstellung und Teamwachstum. • Erkennen und lösen Leistungsengpässe, Skalierungsbeschränkungen und architektonische Schulden. • 7+ Jahre professionelles Backend-Engineering-Erlebnis, mit tiefem Know-how in Node.js . • Bewährte Erfolgsbilanz von Architekten und Skalierung verteilter Backend-Systeme in der Produktion. • Starke Systemdesign-Fähigkeiten: Mikroservices, API-Design, Datenmodellierung, Async-Muster, ereignisgesteuerte Architekturen. • Erfahrungen mit relationalen und nicht-relationalen Datenbanken, Nachrichtenwarten und Cache-Schichten. • Ausgezeichnete englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten (schriftlich und verbal). • In einer Zeitzone mit 4–6 Stunden Überlappung mit IST-Arbeitsstunden (10–7 Uhr IST). • Networking Fundamentals: TCP/IP, gRPC, benutzerdefinierte Protokolle, Performance Tuning. • Virtualisierungs- / Containerisierungserfahrung (Docker, Kubernetes, VMs, Hypervisors). • Exposition gegenüber GPU-Infrastruktur, GPU-Scheduling oder Berechnung von Orchestrationssystemen. • Erleben Sie Betriebssysteme in Infrastruktur- oder Hardware-Adjacent-Domains. • Vorarbeit in Fintech-, Krypto- oder Blockchain-Umgebungen. Â Informazioni importanti per i candidati Recruitment Betrug sind immer häufiger geworden. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte bei der Beantragung von Rollen: • Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine Plattformen oder Agenturen von Drittanbietern für die Rekrutierung, sofern nicht klar angegeben. Alle offenen Rollen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Rekruten. Alle unsere Rekrutierer haben LinkedIn-Profile überprüft. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie Ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. • Seien Sie vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen. • Doppel-Check-E-Mail Adressen. Alle Kommunikation von uns wird von E-Mails kommen, die in @ tether.to oder @ tether enden. io • Wir werden keine Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten verlangen. Wenn jemand während des Einstellungsprozesses persönliche Finanzinformationen oder Zahlung an jedem Punkt verlangt, ist es ein Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es sofort. Wenn im Zweifel, fühlen Sie sich frei, durch unsere offizielle Website zu erreichen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance Chez Tether, nous ne sommes pas seulement des produits de construction, nous sommes pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises, depuis les échanges et les portefeuilles jusqu'aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets, d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans toutes les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, assurant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants dispose de la plus fiable écurie du monde, USDT , sur laquelle s'appuient des centaines de millions de monde, ainsi que des services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais ce n'est que le début : Tether Power : Pour une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations géo-diverses à la fine pointe de la technologie. Tether Data: En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie pair à pair, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : Démocratiser l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous autonomisons les individus à prospérer dans les économies numériques et de concerts, moteur de la croissance mondiale et des opportunités. L'évolution de l'approche : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par la marque dans l'espace fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les frontières et de fixer de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés maigres et nous avons obtenu notre place de leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos du travail Cette équipe opère à l'intersection des systèmes distribués et de l'infrastructure GPU, alimentant à grande échelle les charges de travail à forte intensité de calcul. Nous sommes à la recherche d'un ingénieur du staff Node.js pour s'approprier l'architecture backend à travers les services qui orchestrent les ressources GPU, gèrent les flux de travail infrastructurels et les exposent grâce à des API robustes et performantes. Il s'agit d'un rôle technique de premier plan ayant une portée architecturale significative. Vous dirigerez les décisions de conception du système, dirigerez des initiatives de soutien complexes, et vous établirez un partenariat avec le leadership pour façonner l'orientation technique à long terme de la plateforme. Le candidat idéal prospère dans l'ambiguïté, a des opinions fortes soutenues par l'expérience de production, et est à l'aise de fonctionner près du métal lorsque GPU et les charges de travail d'infrastructure l'exigent. ## Responsabilités • Architecte, conception et mise en œuvre de services de backend évolutives dans Node.js qui forment le noyau de cette plateforme d'équipe. • Conception d'un système de plomb pour des initiatives complexes et réparties - des exigences au déploiement de la production. • Les décisions techniques concernant la performance, la fiabilité et l'évolutivité des services qui interagissent avec la gestion GPU et les infrastructures de bas niveau. • Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes d'infrastructure, de plate-forme et de produits pour aligner l'architecture backend sur les besoins des entreprises. • Établir et maintenir des normes techniques : qualité du code, essais, observabilité et documentation. • Mentor ingénieurs de niveau supérieur et intermédiaire; contribuer à l'embauche technique et à la croissance de l'équipe. • Recenser et résoudre les goulots d'étranglement, les limites d'échelle et la dette architecturale. ## Requisiti • 7+ ans d'expérience professionnelle en backend, avec une expertise profonde dans Node.js . • Expérience éprouvée de l'architecture et de la mise à l'échelle des systèmes backend distribués dans la production. • Fortes compétences en conception de système : microservices, conception d'API, modélisation de données, modèles asynchrones, architectures événementielles. • Expérience avec les bases de données relationnelles et non relationnelles, les files d'attente de messages et les couches de cache. • Excellentes compétences en communication anglaise (écrite et verbale). • Basé sur un fuseau horaire de 4 à 6 heures de chevauchement avec les heures de travail IST (10h-19h IST). ## Bonus • Fondements de réseau: TCP/IP, gRPC, protocoles personnalisés, réglage des performances. • Virtualisation / expérience de conteneurisation (Docker, Kubernetes, VMs, hyperviseurs). • Exposition à l'infrastructure GPU, programmation GPU, ou calcul des systèmes d'orchestration. • Expérimentez les systèmes d'exploitation dans des domaines lourds d'infrastructures ou proches du matériel. • Travail antérieur dans les environnements fintech, crypto ou blockchain. ## Information importantei per i candidati Les escroqueries de recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus fréquentes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit ce qui suit lorsque vous postulez pour les rôles : • Appliquer uniquement par nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plates-formes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement à moins d'indication claire. Tous les rôles ouverts sont listés sur notre page de carrière officielle: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Vérifier l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont vérifié les profils LinkedIn. Si vous n'êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. • Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entrevues sur WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute communication se fait au moyen de courriels et de plateformes officiels de l'entreprise. • Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute communication de nous viendra de courriels se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ sether. io • Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des renseignements financiers personnels ou un paiement à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est une escroquerie. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à contacter notre site officiel.

 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The Asset Recovery Specialist supports end-to-end asset recovery activities arising from asset freezes imposed due to legal or law enforcement requests. The role ensures effective risk assessment of each matter, including the legitimacy and feasibility of the asset recovery request, while maintaining compliance with internal policies, procedures and governance requirements.
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Serve as the primary point of contact for law enforcement, regulators, and government authorities on asset recovery matters, coordinating communications and supporting negotiations.

• Draft, review, and manage routine indemnity agreements, correspondence, and memoranda under Legal oversight.

• Perform detailed legal and compliance reviews, evaluating cross-jurisdictional implications, analyzing findings from on-chain investigations, and identifying any potential operational risks.

• Advise internal teams on compliance obligations and risk mitigation, escalating complex matters to Legal and senior management as appropriate.

• Mentor junior analysts, fostering best practices in documentation, stakeholder engagement, and adherence to compliance standards.

 

 
• Bachelor’s degree in Law, Legal Studies, Compliance, Finance, or a related field

• 3–5 years of relevant experience in asset recovery, financial crime compliance, legal operations, or similar roles involving engagement with regulators or law enforcement.

• Strong understanding of financial regulations and compliance frameworks (AML/KYC, sanctions), with exposure to cross-jurisdictional matters and asset freezing/recovery processes.

• Solid asset tracing and analytical capabilities, including the ability to assess transaction flows, identify risks, and interpret findings from investigations (on-chain knowledge is a plus).

• Proven ability to manage cases end-to-end with sound judgment, including risk assessment, prioritization, clear documentation, and timely escalation of complex issues.

• Excellent legal drafting, reporting, and communication skills.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Regulatory Affairs and Licensing Lead - Mexico and Colombia

titleByLocale.it: Regolamentazione e Licensing Lead - Messico e Colombia
titleByLocale.en: Regulatory Affairs and Licensing Lead - Mexico and Colombia
titleByLocale.de: Regulatory Affairs and Licensing Lead - Mexico and Colombia
titleByLocale.fr: Regulatory Affairs and Licensing Lead - Mexico and Colombia

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team. The successful candidate is someone with a deep understanding of legal and regulatory requirements pertaining to the crypto-asset industry in Mexico and Colombia and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. 
 The successful candidate will report directly to the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, serving as the primary point of contact for regulatory and licensing matters within Mexico and Colombia. This is a senior position designed for professionals with proven experience engaging with or working within financial regulators, supervisory authorities, or policy-making bodies. The ideal candidate combines strategic insight with hands-on execution, demonstrates a diplomatic, solutions-oriented approach in navigating complex regulatory environments, and is able to anticipate regulatory changes and adapt strategies proactively to evolving market and legal environments. You will represent the company in regulatory discussions, contribute to regional initiatives under the guidance of the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, and ensure local implementation aligns with the company’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. 
 To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, crypto-assets and the regulatory requirements. Engage with industry associations, chambers, and other stakeholder groups to promote innovation and collaboration. 
 
You will have a focus around translating regulatory requirements in Mexico and Colombia into clear and actionable strategic recommendations, managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business. 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 
• Regulatory Strategy Development: development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s in the region from which to operate. Ensure local implementation aligns with Tether’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. 

• Regulatory Advocacy and Collaboration : participating in regulatory agency interactions, engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for stablecoin issuers, advocating for policies that promote innovation while ensuring safety and compliance. Actively contribute to public consultations, working groups, and industry forums, maintaining a high standard of professionalism and institutional diplomacy. 

• Policy Analysis and Guidance : Provide analysis on local regulatory proposals, and advise the business on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance. Produce concise internal policy briefs and recommendations to inform senior management decision-making. 

• Regulatory approval process : contribute to the process of obtaining necessary license approvals in identified markets, where appropriate. Support the preparation and coordination of documentation and responses to regulatory inquiries, ensuring strategic consistency and accuracy. 

• Cross-functional Leadership : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., expansion, legal, compliance, finance) to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements and to proactively address emerging regulatory challenges. Serve as the local regulatory lead, ensuring effective communication and alignment with regional priorities. 

 

 
• Minimum of 5 years regulatory experience within the financial services or crypto-asset industry. 

• Preferred: Minimum of 5–8 years regulatory experience within financial services, fintech, or crypto-asset industries. 

• Ability to apply knowledge of key regulatory frameworks in Mexico and Colombia both strategically and operationally and provide direction to resolve complex regulatory issues. 

• Demonstrated diplomatic skills and ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships. 

• Expertise in preparing regulatory analysis including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities, such as regulatory consultation response submissions. 

• Proven experience working with or within regulatory authorities (e.g., central banks, financial supervisory agencies, or ministries of finance) is strongly preferred. 

• Demonstrated ability to draft or contribute to public policy responses, regulatory filings, or industry position papers. 

• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. 

• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must have hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently, with excellent verbal and written communication skills 

• Fluency in English and native proficiency in the local language of Mexico and Colombia. 

• University degree. 

• Advanced degree in Law, Economics, Political Science, or a related field preferred. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Support the preparation and coordination of documentation and responses to regulatory inquiries, ensuring strategic consistency and accuracy. • Cross-functional Leadership : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., expansion, legal, compliance, finance) to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements and to proactively address emerging regulatory challenges. Serve as the local regulatory lead, ensuring effective communication and alignment with regional priorities. • Minimum of 5 years regulatory experience within the financial services or crypto-asset industry. • Preferred: Minimum of 5–8 years regulatory experience within financial services, fintech, or crypto-asset industries. • Ability to apply knowledge of key regulatory frameworks in Mexico and Colombia both strategically and operationally and provide direction to resolve complex regulatory issues. • Demonstrated diplomatic skills and ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships. • Expertise in preparing regulatory analysis including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities, such as regulatory consultation response submissions. • Proven experience working with or within regulatory authorities (e.g., central banks, financial supervisory agencies, or ministries of finance) is strongly preferred. • Demonstrated ability to draft or contribute to public policy responses, regulatory filings, or industry position papers. • Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. • Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must have hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently, with excellent verbal and written communication skills • Fluency in English and native proficiency in the local language of Mexico and Colombia. • University degree. • Advanced degree in Law, Economics, Political Science, or a related field preferred. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team. The successful candidate is someone with a deep understanding of legal and regulatory requirements pertaining to the crypto-asset industry in Mexico and Colombia and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. The successful candidate will report directly to the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, serving as the primary point of contact for regulatory and licensing matters within Mexico and Colombia. This is a senior position designed for professionals with proven experience engaging with or working within financial regulators, supervisory authorities, or policy-making bodies. The ideal candidate combines strategic insight with hands-on execution, demonstrates a diplomatic, solutions-oriented approach in navigating complex regulatory environments, and is able to anticipate regulatory changes and adapt strategies proactively to evolving market and legal environments. You will represent the company in regulatory discussions, contribute to regional initiatives under the guidance of the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, and ensure local implementation aligns with the company’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, crypto-assets and the regulatory requirements. Engage with industry associations, chambers, and other stakeholder groups to promote innovation and collaboration. You will have a focus around translating regulatory requirements in Mexico and Colombia into clear and actionable strategic recommendations, managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business. Responsibilities • Regulatory Strategy Development: development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s in the region from which to operate. Ensure local implementation aligns with Tether’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. • Regulatory Advocacy and Collaboration : participating in regulatory agency interactions, engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for stablecoin issuers, advocating for policies that promote innovation while ensuring safety and compliance. Actively contribute to public consultations, working groups, and industry forums, maintaining a high standard of professionalism and institutional diplomacy. • Policy Analysis and Guidance : Provide analysis on local regulatory proposals, and advise the business on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance. Produce concise internal policy briefs and recommendations to inform senior management decision-making. • Regulatory approval process : contribute to the process of obtaining necessary license approvals in identified markets, where appropriate. Support the preparation and coordination of documentation and responses to regulatory inquiries, ensuring strategic consistency and accuracy. • Cross-functional Leadership : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., expansion, legal, compliance, finance) to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements and to proactively address emerging regulatory challenges. Serve as the local regulatory lead, ensuring effective communication and alignment with regional priorities. • Minimum of 5 years regulatory experience within the financial services or crypto-asset industry. • Preferred: Minimum of 5–8 years regulatory experience within financial services, fintech, or crypto-asset industries. • Ability to apply knowledge of key regulatory frameworks in Mexico and Colombia both strategically and operationally and provide direction to resolve complex regulatory issues. • Demonstrated diplomatic skills and ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships. • Expertise in preparing regulatory analysis including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities, such as regulatory consultation response submissions. • Proven experience working with or within regulatory authorities (e.g., central banks, financial supervisory agencies, or ministries of finance) is strongly preferred. • Demonstrated ability to draft or contribute to public policy responses, regulatory filings, or industry position papers. • Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. • Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must have hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently, with excellent verbal and written communication skills • Fluency in English and native proficiency in the local language of Mexico and Colombia. • University degree. • Advanced degree in Law, Economics, Political Science, or a related field preferred. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Engagement Manager, AI Implementations

titleByLocale.fr: Engagement Manager, AI Implementations

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, we are seeking an Engagement Manager to lead the implementation of AI-driven initiatives powered by QVAC, Tether’s SDK for local AI and delegated inference. The role focuses on orchestrating complex, multi-stakeholder deployments of decentralized AI solutions across enterprise, government, and institutional environments. 
 This position combines client engagement, technical coordination, and delivery oversight to ensure successful onboarding and execution of AI use cases, ranging from edge AI deployments to privacy-preserving inference systems. The Engagement Manager plays a central role in aligning client objectives with product capabilities, coordinating internal and external stakeholders, and driving implementations from initial scoping through production rollout. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Client & Partner Engagement 
 
• Act as the primary point of contact for clients and partners during AI implementation initiatives, ensuring clear communication, expectation alignment, and structured execution. 

• Guide clients in translating business requirements into AI deployment strategies leveraging QVAC capabilities (local inference, delegated compute, privacy-preserving architectures). 

• Support Expansion team in shaping AI-related opportunities by providing input on feasibility, integration complexity, and delivery approach. 

• Identify opportunities to extend implementations across additional use cases, geographies, or Tether technologies. 

 Implementations Oversight 
 
• Lead end-to-end coordination of QVAC-based implementations from kickoff through production deployment. 

• Define implementation roadmaps, milestones, and dependencies across AI models, infrastructure, and integration layers. 

• Ensure alignment between client expectations and actual product capabilities, avoiding scope drift or mispositioning. 

• Track progress across multiple concurrent AI deployments, ensuring timely delivery and readiness for production environments. 

 Cross-functional Coordination 
 
• Coordinate closely with product, engineering, and research teams to align on QVAC capabilities, limitations, and roadmap evolution. 

• Facilitate integration between client systems and QVAC components, including model deployment pipelines, APIs, and compute environments. 

• Work with legal and compliance teams where required, particularly in sensitive AI deployments involving data locality or privacy constraints. 

• Maintain structured communication flows across all stakeholders involved in the implementation lifecycle. 

 Governance & Reporting 
 
• Establish and maintain governance frameworks including implementation plans, risk tracking, and decision logs. 

• Produce executive-level updates summarizing progress, risks, blockers, and next steps. 

• Ensure documentation of implementation architectures, deployment patterns, and key learnings for reuse across future projects. 

• Support escalation management and ensure timely resolution of technical or operational challenges. 

 

 Core Experience 
 
• 5+ years of experience in program management, technical account management, or delivery roles within AI, data infrastructure, or complex technology environments. 

• Proven experience managing cross-functional implementations involving multiple stakeholders (internal teams, clients, external partners). 

• Strong ability to operate at the intersection of technical and business domains. 

 Technical Understanding 
 
• Familiarity with AI/ML deployment concepts, including model inference, edge/local AI, and distributed compute architectures. 

• Understanding of APIs, SDK integrations, and system architecture patterns. 

• Ability to engage in technical discussions with engineering teams while maintaining business-level clarity with clients. 

 Communication & Execution 
 
• Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, including experience working with enterprise or government entities. 

• Structured approach to project tracking, documentation, and governance. 

• Ability to manage ambiguity and operate in fast-evolving, early-stage environments. 

 Nice to Have 
 
• Experience with decentralized technologies, blockchain, or privacy-preserving systems. 

• Exposure to AI infrastructure tooling or MLOps workflows. 

• Experience in regulated industries or public sector projects. 

• Basic familiarity with programming or scripting environments (Python, APIs, CLI tools). 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Cross-functional Coordination • Coordinate closely with product, engineering, and research teams to align on QVAC capabilities, limitations, and roadmap evolution. • Facilitate integration between client systems and QVAC components, including model deployment pipelines, APIs, and compute environments. • Work with legal and compliance teams where required, particularly in sensitive AI deployments involving data locality or privacy constraints. • Maintain structured communication flows across all stakeholders involved in the implementation lifecycle. Governance & Reporting • Establish and maintain governance frameworks including implementation plans, risk tracking, and decision logs. • Produce executive-level updates summarizing progress, risks, blockers, and next steps. • Ensure documentation of implementation architectures, deployment patterns, and key learnings for reuse across future projects. • Support escalation management and ensure timely resolution of technical or operational challenges. Core Experience • 5+ years of experience in program management, technical account management, or delivery roles within AI, data infrastructure, or complex technology environments. • Proven experience managing cross-functional implementations involving multiple stakeholders (internal teams, clients, external partners). • Strong ability to operate at the intersection of technical and business domains. Technical Understanding • Familiarity with AI/ML deployment concepts, including model inference, edge/local AI, and distributed compute architectures. • Understanding of APIs, SDK integrations, and system architecture patterns. • Ability to engage in technical discussions with engineering teams while maintaining business-level clarity with clients. Communication & Execution • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, including experience working with enterprise or government entities. • Structured approach to project tracking, documentation, and governance. • Ability to manage ambiguity and operate in fast-evolving, early-stage environments. Nice to Have • Experience with decentralized technologies, blockchain, or privacy-preserving systems. • Exposure to AI infrastructure tooling or MLOps workflows. • Experience in regulated industries or public sector projects. • Basic familiarity with programming or scripting environments (Python, APIs, CLI tools). Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: • Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ • Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. • Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. • Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io • We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.en: Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future?
